[**June 24, 1795:** Jay's Treaty, enacted on June 24, 1795, was a diplomatic agreement between the United States and Great Britain. This treaty, negotiated by Chief Justice John Jay, aimed to address various issues stemming from the Treaty of Paris of 1783, which ended the American Revolutionary War.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0b1aaba0182d43af900acb1e5056e5c8&_e=vdY7fJB3BRJrJxU2uj1MI6PU4OvXx3Fx01S5OhaOhN7G1DLWrSjCFR1drEf6ocMnQt8eAhDbaZvDSjJh9pMltdIGbhvoJv6r3rQOUwSrCb8Zy12n2D6gz1a6pS4mn-q8f8TGyYV-Npy1IUb6JrK3bakKFK-lIEqPUYllPS3ez2OipAiK5icz9MAM0bWM0IwNd9yQwKJIyKnKoN0cPm7aleG3IELOeLnr2nqaFUOlH5GEXfxUONiQT1pZGiOx5Wf2mWawjpbhuOFADFTtrePaAU5huDSH5xslVTKb5R7hdIo%3D) **Source -[loc.gov](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0b1aaba0182d43af900acb1e5056e5c8&_e=vdY7fJB3BRJrJxU2uj1MI6PU4OvXx3Fx01S5OhaOhN7G1DLWrSjCFR1drEf6ocMnQt8eAhDbaZvDSjJh9pMltdIGbhvoJv6r3rQOUwSrCb8Zy12n2D6gz1a6pS4mn-q8f8TGyYV-Npy1IUb6JrK3bdQh6q85pPBBofad4gSJBJs1f7xZIldla48TsE3SxiObUIUMih7Gl36-9SmfqPgvA9uLYvCglk75zxRxMd_U4BbLxgA8srfXD0wrSaOz_UFDm5jWnsQomdwEF6P2pKYbleYhdAmt77eFzWYHh3ObqNI%3D)**

George Halas took over and moved the team to Chicago in 1921, winning the APFA championship in their first season and renaming the team the Bears in 1922.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0b1aaba0182d43af900acb1e5056e5c8&_e=vdY7fJB3BRJrJxU2uj1MI6PU4OvXx3Fx01S5OhaOhN4eoCetkwcZwNBS6TKV70QK-VsMW1SeVngRY4aX4zNuwG799T2YijShGecAd2YO-OWlRKn0gKRzR77AwFEYXYZY5dbxXdA28Quf3MLblGSTK-vHwiSk8rrWzCO1rPrbgGPgPzd8b5CAZJvXdDRgQ9UlgJAqpqQpoR69A_SVWA5JJw8ECqa9NvxxUADF-U03N_aP1gnAHdC_-fXFPcFo43jVYFdkKfawJtO1xGqoOwG_2A%3D%3D) **Source -[britannica.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0b1aaba0182d43af900acb1e5056e5c8&_e=vdY7fJB3BRJrJxU2uj1MI6PU4OvXx3Fx01S5OhaOhN4eoCetkwcZwNBS6TKV70QK-VsMW1SeVngRY4aX4zNuwG799T2YijShGecAd2YO-OWlRKn0gKRzR77AwFEYXYZY4hJzzCzETpdZTnkriSWtLVRXLaaExoPg03scgB_vLS308lfZ9RJ3MD6hoz_Pl_uBnWYiKhNFa1W2tuA1JxmVOS0Zw2BYWG5CRZNPNzLGWsZMaPz-TuVWaKJALvFipooETAepW8Aa_eJEzcapcIk2YQ%3D%3D)**

[**June 24, 1953:** After dating for two years, John F. Kennedy proposed to Jacqueline Bouvier with a 2.88-carat diamond-and-emerald ring from Van Cleef and Arpels. Their engagement generated considerable media attention and marked the beginning of their influential and iconic partnership.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0b1aaba0182d43af900acb1e5056e5c8&_e=vdY7fJB3BRJrJxU2uj1MI6PU4OvXx3Fx01S5OhaOhN4m27oV-XP7BED1htaFVAPyDrLbDtOUcujvXFWCx1rUSTLNi0uOp2nbZaEegjMJub0LKsi7mZc6Eo-JnZIseCfDkl90_ijaDirfEK4c-OykER7szbqSetXID5VTo47kS77eFiAUxazEstixysflucEJqCpm1JOIvfrCpptVzUAKkhx7XYtefvDPHyY8w80hb9nwl1eSKHT3ECspobmtHm0iHofebHuDIOsANxNrqMMxrbOmLx8OsfGIV-d9m7TE7TI%3D) **Source -[history.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=0b1aaba0182d43af900acb1e5056e5c8&_e=vdY7fJB3BRJrJxU2uj1MI6PU4OvXx3Fx01S5OhaOhN4m27oV-XP7BED1htaFVAPyDrLbDtOUcujvXFWCx1rUSTLNi0uOp2nbZaEegjMJub0LKsi7mZc6Eo-JnZIseCfDkl90_ijaDirfEK4c-OykEUXxLe1hniJsggDXNG_31l8-qa5DShuCeumoHommmK8jFUhOVhFv1GOrxoNNqKBvVHxyVViKmBCMMtbvhlhOEMOZHakv8xRUOHplXz-jz829aikylKoqucLK2Q-VZkBUZSF5YI0DiRJSCwu3-CHb7WI%3D)**

name: Al Franken
subject: I got a favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friends,

I got a favor to ask you.

[**My friend and former Senate counsel Josh Riley is running for Congress in NY-19, and his first FEC deadline is just 6 days away. Will you join me right now by splitting a contribution of $10 or more between Josh Riley and the Voter Protection Project?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48163?t=6&akid=8647%2E878179%2EMvObGi) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48163?t=7&akid=8647%2E878179%2EMvObGi) I can’t say enough good things about Josh.

Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. **Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too!** | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48163?t=8&akid=8647%2E878179%2EMvObGi)
---
If that isn’t enough to convince you, **NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House.** _Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball,_ and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help!

**So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win.**

[**Can Josh and I count on your support? The first big fundraising deadline of Josh’s campaign is coming up, and all eyes are on him. Please split a contribution between the Voter Protection Project and Josh’s campaign today.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48163?t=9&akid=8647%2E878179%2EMvObGi)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Josh Riley and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/48164?t=10&akid=8647%2E878179%2EMvObGi)
---

clean_body: | Friends, I got a favor to ask you. I can’t say enough good things about Josh. Josh is the hardest working person I know. Together we passed bills expanding rights for survivors of domestic abuse and providing new funding for addiction treatment and mental health programs. We also made a lot of Republican witnesses look very bad. Josh really cares about all the stuff I care about – and probably the stuff you care about too! | If that isn’t enough to convince you, NY-19 is a must-win for Democrats to take back the House. Cook Political Report, Sabato’s Crystal Ball, and all the other smart people who know this stuff have already rated it a “toss-up.” It’s a true swing district, but Biden won it by 4% in 2020 and I know Josh can win it in 2024 – with our help! So this is pretty much the full package: a great candidate who will always do what’s right, and a big race we absolutely have to win. name: Larry Hogan
subject: Wanted: Real Leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by An America United](https://links
body:
| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=1da84b8b23124a33b4aeec5b79e633f3&_e=hIn5dyXhbhw6enZV7dOr6wqxVE8dfieZ7uIjwPPbU5UUdW0iJ6QGs2zT1lgyCLzLsfdStzihBQitN-lwdJkYlR8C328wgdrkygmK7EFwyyEDuVeuOolkSffjedxogV8x81FT9FIX-8TQH661pTxfNrV4IMtGf9xGypZJmOLD3xE3R_F3w1xr7_Bih7Jfl-B8WI34fwPAMqhvXfxOlV8sNQ%3D%3D)
---
Hi there, An America United is about defending our democracy and fighting for common sense leadership and solutions that put people over politics. What comes to your mind first when you hear the phrase, _"American Leadership?"_ Personally, I think of President Ronald Reagan, or my father, Congressman Larry Hogan, Sr. Both of these men stood for something and had the courage of their convictions. Today, I write this to you with hope. Hope that our current leaders can move past the toxic politics plaguing our political discourse and work to solve more of our nation's problems. But this change needs to start from the top... Minimizing our efforts to help Ukraine, spewing nicknames, and congratulating deadly dictators like Kim Jong Un is unacceptable for anyone running for office. Especially from a former president. _**This isn't the America that I know and it isn't helping us find a better way forward.**_ Our country needs real leadership that will stand up for American values rather than pandering to the extremist political fringes. That is what we are fighting for at An America United. **The success of our mission depends on your inclusion. Please take a moment to follow us on all social platforms, and invite a few friends, too. Join the team that will help change the course of history.** Thank you,**Larry Hogan

clean_body: | | | Hi there, An America United is about defending our democracy and fighting for common sense leadership and solutions that put people over politics. What comes to your mind first when you hear the phrase, "American Leadership?" Personally, I think of President Ronald Reagan, or my father, Congressman Larry Hogan, Sr. Both of these men stood for something and had the courage of their convictions. Today, I write this to you with hope. Hope that our current leaders can move past the toxic politics plaguing our political discourse and work to solve more of our nation's problems. But this change needs to start from the top... Minimizing our efforts to help Ukraine, spewing nicknames, and congratulating deadly dictators like Kim Jong Un is unacceptable for anyone running for office. Especially from a former president. This isn't the America that I know and it isn't helping us find a better way forward. Our country needs real leadership that will stand up for American values rather than pandering to the extremist political fringes. That is what we are fighting for at An America United. The success of our mission depends on your inclusion. Please take a moment to follow us on all social platforms, and invite a few friends, too. Join the team that will help change the course of history. Thank you,Larry Hogan Former Governor of Maryland | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Join An America United on social media! | | ---|--- | | | | Contributions to An America United are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

name: Special Elections Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Re-electing Justin Jones and Justin Pearson will deal a huge blow to the GOP
body:
You won’t believe what just happened. TN Republican legislators and their allies flooded Rep. Jones’ opponent with HUGE donations (up to $1,000+) ahead of this month’s special election primary. | | |
---

Earlier this month, you heard from two members of the Tennessee Three, Reps. Johnson and Pearson, about how the Tennessee GOP has used their supermajority in the legislature to enact their extreme agenda and work to ban abortion, protect the gun lobby, restrict voting rights, and so much more.
They know firsthand that it takes people power to fight back against Republican attacks on our democracy, and they called on you to fight the Republican agenda head-on by re-electing state Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson.
**In a few short weeks, Democrats can get it done. We can deal a huge blow to the GOP by officially re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson of the Tennessee Three to the state House.**
It’s crucial we show the Republican Party that they can’t simply expel their colleagues for speaking out against their hate-fueled platform. **Special elections like these are key to defending Democratic power and chipping away at Republican strongholds, and we need all our grassroots supporters on our side.**
[Will you chip in a 5X-impact gift of $7 or more ahead of Tennessee’s vital special elections so we can defeat extreme Republicans and elect state Democrats nationwide? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yoKG8CTelWWDHki88pvURtoTCHVT1OXtIgr2pBrEat8XQSlMnXdR84gkz3UKVI6cxMOdTOArKUB7G4rU3OXWyyi-lupU8MpLzRJTVUn_1WaE_Njp-A21Tsy13yro5j9xohuEJgmmprWoS2O2sefjre2xopGnPcWI_3chZ3Q638yPAnrlzac5ZFZunziyMvpJh_dIxWpyyopcWaNfPg_LNaf5D5MvpjD5N5jYm71-_bAmlE5wDeB_Z4NS9nkNqdasJ5kAx_Djt1D0NRQY4eoAv3CipjTK7KKhWtttb3iR2-DIgjZN8vnQkGrPrSR13TcDaDQ9XoZADVleyv-XKa6bmSjzIKitVIYqliBA21uk0mmh-SPraWuaEA1gMMpBIObk0yKSCJEdQ4RvKJ2ssBblZjrLgRlwzDf8mBW-4jkFnWJBl--5hKboeXw5gL1Bl-NXmZ4IPu9SYF_dhWr-penLfk/3xc/UxmIPBYnQ2afGQsHa6SIJA/h6/uakt9LzbHO8EChj8DcgXc6jM4xqFKWWK8JkRcOMNgMg)
It’s races like these where grassroots donations can make the most impact – re-electing Reps. Jones and Pearson will be a monumental step in our fight to build a better America. With these wins, we can keep two Democratic fighters standing up to Republicans’ anti-democratic actions and pushing for progress in Tennessee.
Together, we can face this fight directly and elect the Democratic leaders we need in states like Tennessee and beyond.

name: moms by choice for choice
subject: Peter, Stand Against Stefanik
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE CALIFORNIA
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Peter,
As we mark another year since the landmark Roe v. Wade decision, it’s imperative we rally to protect the freedoms it enshrined. This becomes especially urgent given recent threats from Representative Elsie Stefanik and her colleagues, who intend to introduce a bill to ban abortion nationwide .
Stefanik’s continuous support for former President Trump, despite his recent arrest on numerous federal counts, ties her to his controversial policies—including staunch anti-choice stances. Her pride in the Republican Party’s pro-life leadership further highlights her commitment to limiting a woman’s right to choose .
Now, more than ever, we need your help. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4roevwade] We are less than a week away from our most crucial end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4roevwade] Once our figures are public, Republicans often seize the opportunity to launch attacks, while they amass millions from dark money sources to spread anti-choice narratives and sponsor bills that curtail abortion rights.
Your contribution—be it $5, $10, or $50—can help us stand up to Stefanik, halt the war on women, counter the misleading narrative, and champion a woman’s right to choose. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4roevwade]
Peter , in these critical moments, can we count on your support?
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moms4roevwade]

Thank you for everything!
Simona Grace

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: on the ballot in 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
It's been a year since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court ruled to officially overturn _Roe v. Wade_. In the year since then, we’ve watched state after state pass increasingly extreme abortion bans. name: Justin | Campaign Manager
subject: Working with Will
body:
Here's what I've learned...
| | | [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztduttk-jhlkdhlhhk-r/)
---
|
---
| | I've known Will for a while. He's an open book and genuinely interested in what people have to say — no matter what side they align with. _Simply put, he's a**modern** **Republican** who believes that we are better together and that we can find common sense solutions in these complicated times. _**** _**Will is running for President**_ and his vision for America and can-do, positive attitude is a refreshing change from what we're used to in the White House. [_**Show Will that you are willing to listen to him with a donation of just $1 today:**_](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztduttk-jhlkdhlhhk-y/)
---
[](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztduttk-jhlkdhlhhk-j/)
---
For the last 20 years Will has worked on the frontlines of keeping America safe. After 9/11 he hunted down terrorists in the Middle East -- so trust me when I tell you the last thing he's afraid of is talking to folks who have differing opinions. Since his first campaign for congress, I've never known Will to back down from a fight. But he's always been able to find common ground, even when he disagrees with someone. He knows there's more that unites us than divides us -- and that's the spirit he will bring to this campaign and the White House. It's time for a fresh voice on the national stage. It's time for Will Hurd. _**Do you agree?**_
---
[](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-ztduttk-jhlkdhlhhk-t/)
---
Let's work to elect a leader who LISTENS, because it's through listening and genuine conversation that we can solve the many problems our nation is facing. We need Will. It's that simple. Thank you, **Justin Hollis** _Campaign Manager | Will Hurd for America_
---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand (via RBG)
subject: photos attached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
| Friend,

I was only 6 years old when _Roe v. Wade_ was first decided. [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18152?t=6&akid=1866%2E564421%2Ess49VK) I grew up, entered adulthood, went to law school, fell in love, got married and had two beautiful boys in a world where women's reproductive rights were always protected — where I had the choice to live whatever kind of life I wanted. [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18152?t=7&akid=1866%2E564421%2Ess49VK) But a year ago, six radical conservatives on the Supreme Court ruled to take away the freedom to choose that millions of us had counted on for decades. [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18152?t=8&akid=1866%2E564421%2Ess49VK) **Today, a generation of young women are growing up in a world where that right isn’t guaranteed — where far-right extremists are working every single day to take away their right to choose and control their bodies.**

In the year since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, we’ve watched radical state legislators pass increasingly extreme abortion bans, outlaw interstate travel to receive reproductive health care, make abortions a felony and attack the right to birth control.

And if Republicans retake the Senate, far-right extremists within their ranks will do whatever it takes to pass a nationwide abortion ban.

[**You have my word that I will never, ever give up the fight to restore our reproductive rights. But this isn’t a battle I can win on my own. That’s why we’ve set a $25,000 goal to defend and expand our pro-choice Senate majority. Can I count on you to split a donation between Ron Be Gone and me before midnight? Please, this is the fight of our generation — none of us can afford to sit on the sidelines.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18152?t=10&akid=1866%2E564421%2Ess49VK) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18159?t=16&akid=1866%2E564421%2Ess49VK)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18160?t=17&akid=1866%2E564421%2Ess49VK)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/18161?t=18&akid=1866%2E564421%2Ess49VK)
With gratitude and hope,

Kirsten

(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

subject: Putting them on trial
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmauan8co3di6tki65mmms6onl0mpbb0a91pv4n0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7k09dm4362cbrddh7lsru4pclk29jtqjbcia018_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs)

---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zocbq3tmpvm27se5isv8e60u8qhcfs2avact6cgo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs)

---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn8ho7h4sj6g8fgnounaqan2u0m9kessnigdsrdo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1mvru9sn40ek8vc0e6clk7bat1v6s0kj0mqrqm0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9h21sg4e7gf753d78brg1sro6cn3k1gdfgnt1ag_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

name: Sean Spicer
subject: I wouldn’t be reaching out if it wasn’t serious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
I know you’re busy, so I’ll keep this huddle brief:

| |
---
| | | Sean Spicer here reaching out on behalf of Speaker McCarthy.

I know you're busy, so I'll keep this huddle brief:
* With the White House, Senate, and House Majority on the line, **2024 will be the most consequential election of our lives.**
* The Democrats have already released a list of **GOP seats to target** ahead of 2024.
* AND I hate to admit this but Republicans are already falling behind in the money game.

I don't know about you, but I do not want to live through two more years of TOTAL Democrat control. That's why it's imperative we reach our goals NOW and stay on pace.

**[Now that you understand the stakes, I'm counting on you to step up for Speaker McCarthy's BIGGEST deadline of the year:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zecl7tlltvv9trqgu1rbabqnsc49m16jn81r5dl0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs "Now that you understand the stakes, I’m counting on you to step up for Speaker McCarthy’s BIGGEST deadline of the year:")**

| | | [DONATE ANY AMOUNT TO MAKE AN IMPACT](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zos0185mds2rnpj5j2o3rj2vvns0vc232cl9o6jo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs)

|

This isn't some arbitrary goal that we made up. This deadline is significant because we have to report our contributions to the FEC, which is then made available to the public. If Democrats see that we fell short of our goal, there's no telling what could happen...

**[Anything you can contribute today will make a difference towards reaching this End of Quarter Goal and defeating the Democrats in 2024!](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf1k85odjjn1snf9gn87p27cj1j3g7vb23gfuo38_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdgeeoj6cjh2bs "Anything you can contribute today will make a difference towards reaching this End of Quarter Goal and defeating the Democrats in 2024!")**

If you've read through this far, thank you for your time and attention.

I hope to see you step up,

Sean Spicer

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26337%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mr5Y1g2G7knNcqQpN6iO7A&sysid=1)
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26338%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=70Fz8kO77AmyuyxhBCoEkA&sysid=1)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26339%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2AhKzdnFBe6Y3od94j8UJQ&sysid=1)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26330%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Adr0NbXRDs652zOgGMeFxQ&sysid=1)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26331%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MA6%2fA2Wqeqsp66eep%2bBXVQ&sysid=1)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26332%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OnJ%2f5OBkfyW31O52OGmBxg&sysid=1)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26333%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xs1GomB%2fktLfb1bGIYkf8A&sysid=1)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c26334%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K0ZMlgQCimLVRFps%2b8ey%2bg&sysid=1)**.

---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Join the Fight Against Chemical Abortion
body:
Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a “safe” and “pain-free” way to abort unborn children.

| [ ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2ogf930pei31ku1so4osa0a9hsg37l1gtsa6pog_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdge9p74c5h2bs)
---
#
Hello Friend,

As proud Americans, we stand for our values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. However, in recent years, the** **[**sanctity of life has been under attack, particularly through the proliferation of chemical abortions.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb95jg47514btv9vctkug8jqma0l5fbc85h9nhk8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdge9p74c5h2bs)

Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother's health.

For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications.

For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent.

We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. [**Will you step forward and pledge to stand against abortion?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zok4hqmot85m83fndemnrtdbo20smjv05e81osq0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdge9p74c5h2bs)

By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government.

We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: **[https://action.sbaprolife.org/chemical-abortion-pledge](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlioc8mei7vhemootvqqv16qvanf11rkj3uga3d0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdge9p74c5h2bs)**

Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

GOP Presidential

name: Chaz R.
subject: Why Will?
body:
Let me tell you!
| | | [](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-zthkiut-jhlkdhlhhk-r/)
---
| | **"Why support Will Hurd?"**

I get this question a lot, so let me tell you what I say:

▶️ Will Hurd is not going to cower to our enemies, domestic or abroad.

▶️ He is not going to let people like Trump bully him and get away with it. ▶️ He wants to rebuild our big-tent Republican Party so it looks more like America because everyone's ideas should be welcomed, not just the loudest voices from the extremes. ▶️ He believes we need to use innovation to modernize our party and our country because we know Republican solutions work, We just have to end the divisive culture we're so used to from Washington, D.C. [_**If you find yourself agreeing with me, can you join me and help Will with just $1 or more today?**_](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-zthkiut-jhlkdhlhhk-y/)
---
[](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-zthkiut-jhlkdhlhhk-j/)
---
I know when people hear Will's positive and forward-thinking message, they’ll agree he’s the right choice. In order for this to happen, we must hit our first 1,000 donors this week if we want to stay on track to hit our goal. By giving [_**just $1**_](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-zthkiut-jhlkdhlhhk-t/) you can help Will qualify for the first debate, where he will share his ideas and fresh approach to our country's greatest challenges. [**_He believes in us... will you show him that you're on board with this important movement?_**](https://hurdwwillhurd.cmail20.com/t/t-l-zthkiut-jhlkdhlhhk-i/) Thank you,**Chaz R.**_**Hurd For America Digital Team**_

name: Kamala Harris
subject: re: serving as Vice President

subject: I’m about to say something really controversial
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA
body:
If you agree with me, will you show your support by chipping in $5, $25, or even $50?

| |
---
| | | I'm about to say something really controversial in Joe Biden's America.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrmn6nqe2sng92saeqm8o4o78258j1q8tceov33g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "WATCH MY VIDEO")
---

---
| | | [WATCH MY VIDEO - STAND WITH ME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn6dkimb23u7t4dkiqjbmq97sd4ijaolbfqor7so_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "WATCH MY VIDEO - STAND WITH ME")
---

_If you 're able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.
And if you're a man, you should play sports against men._
_America needs more victors and less victims._
I'm Tim Scott and I approve this message because these aren't just conservative values, they're American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**Friend, this is the message I 'm sharing in my latest TV ad! I need your help reaching more people in Iowa with this content so that we can WIN.**

**_[If you agree with me, will you show your support by chipping in $5, $25, or even $50?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z79kr5tse9cuso3k3cb2o5b0rhjvqsq40autljng_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "If you agree with me, will you show your support by chipping in $5, $25, or even $50?")_**

---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfhkbf57fn3kdln785jjcgk1t19guqtojon0k4lg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "STAND WITH ME")
---

Thank you,

Tim Scott

---
* * *
---
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs0sfvfmkr7evb5ddoadrc1ope0dq7kj1mtlo4h8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!")
---

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That's why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8dsp2i5c8bve3nbkqg78hrj17s8bho6v6enq5b8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zklq4d0cedhncs26385tjqnsmhgje4ki8fkjsj2g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here's the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn 't going to be easy.** I'll need your help to win.

---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd5i9c743fg7hj3aksblevf4cq13d5d9hi9ejpho_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!")
---

**_[Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4ig046su1eio1jthp4jntcvnd7em87b399ot99g_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob4cjh2bs "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden's America, so even if it's just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim
---

#
Friend,

What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

Knowledge gaps. Lies. Distortion. Shoddy reporting. These kill unborn babies. But until the deception is exposed the killing won't stop.

That's why I invite you to learn the truth in our eye-opening new ebook [_**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcqh30ch2h5q67b019ckn8cqgmuiqmadfo58he7o_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob0cdh2bs)

This brief, hard-hitting, fact-filled ebook is free. I urge you--as a pro-life American--to download it now and get the truth.

Scholars from SBA Pro-Life America's research arm the Charlotte Lozier Institute to reveal FIVE FACTS about abortion. **[These realities are currently being concealed or ignored](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsd6iff1udmcf0r17daj9i4qrvbecguftt8l1qvg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob0cdh2bs)** by government agencies and the industry of Big Abortion.

That's why we're blowing the whistle--and letting you in on it. We're telling allies in federal and state governments, the media, and the American people because everyone deserves to know the truth. The truths revealed in this ebook can set women free and save unborn babies.

I'm thrilled to send you the new eBook _**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_ You can start reading your eBook by clicking this link:

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/five-things-ebook](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zl1mvobp69d2uc35umdqul2rhltfl9g0tc7jb410_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie2ob0cdh2bs)**

| [DONATE TO TEAM DESANTIS](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62867954:J5prGlIDN:m:1:3299561967:4CB1BCEED813B666707D0BC71C979863:r)
---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62867954:J5prGlIDN:m:1:3299561967:4CB1BCEED813B666707D0BC71C979863:r)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: ICYMI News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2tbtj377gu86j86odd958a98cb71qlffe7e645o_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie9o72cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf8ji1c6jacsr9vc131h1l4o75ccceo2bhkfmra0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie9o72cph2bs) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp7fgrjpae8t623p0vqcrm2robhqii7uovk6toc8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie9o72cph2bs) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo3a4ll6tsof8haeqb94j8sc7t3j7dc9a26nisn0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie9o72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4chh66or5c3h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhc44jhopb7lh96eqs7d7i68hgnhn1a7973gjda0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie9o72cph2bs)_

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm71991855dpnirprut3mipafrmbh1g2kdm5o0c0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cdie9o72cph238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: Their final attack on me . . .
body:
14 years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=463b29d24bfb49baa0ee3f2df66004e5&_e=tSsr6q2X8IqTY6qOTJWN9Ta8-BmNyKU3fXHwC74rF1lAqlhhgGT2O1oQwZa2QNDnCz7-5JBXNvhqFDhsxR2L-JhAHV6YJ5HWbtsjPPpxp04_4xSWFbi_mEoRTg2sL2xNDO_DcRqLIEMsIKIee06rsCND79nFCHrWMEZd-R_g3AVavjmi021MGC9roV1FgVFeAzzVG2F47QRzTmT6UDXfALq0RmexG9W1gtFYYxXQRy5ik2b1tEpsdupFPIGKpe94DQRcjlOKHz2b9pIfG8gwyCTi-1df-rIlC6LreqaSHOdEwq8rFkXqNIW9_WhAGakYEO_me6v6UVBD_-UchViDg7wN37bxiDNZ5iKAfY0Kk2K0yOrPpbLJ2NubYiBfgalb)
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=463b29d24bfb49baa0ee3f2df66004e5&_e=tSsr6q2X8IqTY6qOTJWN9Ta8-BmNyKU3fXHwC74rF1lAqlhhgGT2O1oQwZa2QNDnCz7-5JBXNvhqFDhsxR2L-JhAHV6YJ5HWbtsjPPpxp04_4xSWFbi_mEoRTg2sL2xNDO_DcRqLIEMsIKIee06rsCND79nFCHrWMEZd-R_g3AVavjmi021MGC9roV1FgVFeAzzVG2F47QRzTmT6UDXfAOPKRCX6ZyT9m3dZhMlJpzQ6TRxYOb4jbBBfTnhoqeWgOdhaSg2IDnBh338hEIZnGV6djnxxfgf68DYhbz2ZqXUC-AKTADFxzUDgr73YQlAJ1VU0o92w6hzqTy4qjlcqgnzze1fhKf2c30KFBYnhLK2Zih_morRawUCTp3eXij1-)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent's home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You've seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I'm unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I've chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan's quote on leadership: "Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**."

I've been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That's why I'm writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=463b29d24bfb49baa0ee3f2df66004e5&_e=tSsr6q2X8IqTY6qOTJWN9Ta8-BmNyKU3fXHwC74rF1lAqlhhgGT2O1oQwZa2QNDnCz7-5JBXNvhqFDhsxR2L-JhAHV6YJ5HWbtsjPPpxp04_4xSWFbi_mEoRTg2sL2xNDO_DcRqLIEMsIKIee06rsCND79nFCHrWMEZd-R_g3AVavjmi021MGC9roV1FgVFeAzzVG2F47QRzTmT6UDXfACH30bSr2YRLxHCKVlfnS00lrHT560P76DFj53Bh3tKY3nAZPeaXVGABu2uR2saq_LfmE3bqspqkuwd6x-Ss6BNmI4uaHxq7cNB3czryYLREXq9JB2rUiaVQW293CtW2kktRlArXXjAQ0M9EKMK3oba60SLMcCZpqqtCXXw-EsMh)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=463b29d24bfb49baa0ee3f2df66004e5&_e=tSsr6q2X8IqTY6qOTJWN9Ta8-BmNyKU3fXHwC74rF1lAqlhhgGT2O1oQwZa2QNDnCz7-5JBXNvhqFDhsxR2L-JhAHV6YJ5HWbtsjPPpxp04_4xSWFbi_mEoRTg2sL2xNDO_DcRqLIEMsIKIee06rsCND79nFCHrWMEZd-R_g3AVavjmi021MGC9roV1FgVFeAzzVG2F47QRzTmT6UDXfAJBR5XUKGqpCFULs1iobJcQ_LtexTC15T8TLP2PhAOPkYPMK3yIApsaNzRys1IRa8KjAWMp0J2Sss0xkBO-qzAYY628F2T96QqZsvll9MtF6fNPo9uJ7kKk7wKiPbVyidpCFscimDYe2eDIsLJjlMAeFfyUsChTCT22D0C6L2l-m)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn't my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren't cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That's where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=463b29d24bfb49baa0ee3f2df66004e5&_e=tSsr6q2X8IqTY6qOTJWN9Ta8-BmNyKU3fXHwC74rF1lAqlhhgGT2O1oQwZa2QNDnCz7-5JBXNvhqFDhsxR2L-JhAHV6YJ5HWbtsjPPpxp04_4xSWFbi_mEoRTg2sL2xNDO_DcRqLIEMsIKIee06rsCND79nFCHrWMEZd-R_g3AVavjmi021MGC9roV1FgVFeAzzVG2F47QRzTmT6UDXfACG-jsBiK1FHBEPItuibefGGIM4-lzinSsADsBFVFJxyn15spmHKaZ_dx3yatdLAEdMIj21iY1czVtVD2lP_V9QSRmaSI3o_h5SFyn6W_qzEDMUXBvtbR84W6HEQz22jgtP3w_gURRyG47qv9lN8AMK7qwDPDadB2FY9edCGxeW-)?**

When you do, I'll be following up as the case progresses but I'll also keep you informed of the great work I'm doing at OMG . . . and it's exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I'll admit is thrilling. And I'm starting armed with all of the lessons I've learned to avoid the pitfalls I've experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we're more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

**[I'm asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=463b29d24bfb49baa0ee3f2df66004e5&_e=tSsr6q2X8IqTY6qOTJWN9Ta8-BmNyKU3fXHwC74rF1lAqlhhgGT2O1oQwZa2QNDnCz7-5JBXNvhqFDhsxR2L-JhAHV6YJ5HWbtsjPPpxp04_4xSWFbi_mEoRTg2sL2xNDO_DcRqLIEMsIKIee06rsCND79nFCHrWMEZd-R_g3AVavjmi021MGC9roV1FgVFeAzzVG2F47QRzTmT6UDXfAPVAHmc1VJD4bejwhkkSXmaFUOY383n0gXauiSpF4XHWXW8dRr0vBGB4aEBnw_qiKUgcSYLh4vCBuyoAu-lEpAjk8ABfRd9i2QZzeSJmwpbfZAX-BAU5OVAb1dv8WARcdkFUOkdEBjkSu8_S1tdipVZZg7P4kZ1LJT08EJRe_KKz)**. And I'll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=463b29d24bfb49baa0ee3f2df66004e5&_e=tSsr6q2X8IqTY6qOTJWN9Ta8-BmNyKU3fXHwC74rF1lAqlhhgGT2O1oQwZa2QNDnCz7-5JBXNvhqFDhsxR2L-JhAHV6YJ5HWbtsjPPpxp04_4xSWFbi_mEoRTg2sL2xNDO_DcRqLIEMsIKIee06rsCND79nFCHrWMEZd-R_g3AVavjmi021MGC9roV1FgVFeAzzVG2F47QRzTmT6UDXfADN8McXwXTZAwm2szjqUGOoXEQHfbQjzqZamkjRrwET6ERS7o4wpt5mW3Vk_ydTsd4eC3B33DU0OFawORoX8bzpL7mjwoYMrvIyeosXOay9wVDrnusvyQ5wbH0opB1amsppSdcL7n_E6dwXSGyg9-m_y13-9kJrIfFDCey4Moa0o)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O'Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=463b29d24bfb49baa0ee3f2df66004e5&_e=tSsr6q2X8IqTY6qOTJWN9Ta8-BmNyKU3fXHwC74rF1lAqlhhgGT2O1oQwZa2QNDnCz7-5JBXNvhqFDhsxR2L-JhAHV6YJ5HWbtsjPPpxp04_4xSWFbi_mEoRTg2sL2xNDO_DcRqLIEMsIKIee06rsCND79nFCHrWMEZd-R_g3AVavjmi021MGC9roV1FgVFeAzzVG2F47QRzTmT6UDXfALJytzs_67sEum9kovbHLu1uHgh02c51j1sVzXWmQTQTGOJ_LsK8ZJKY4YHVnXO0FXzVwR05DXbBgZU8ybIniJMYR7rNdgcGZuYL78fYW8rW5Ja_jUEsKHSuhN7RELrgYudmfP6zkEg52_BN161slqw5pM9aSOFrpo_fEHMipgyP)**.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden isn’t wasting any time
body:
His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

| [ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d4ae927a14446ee8efddb9204dfc34d&_e=gCB5roBqLgp6kKiyyz91rilSovnObQm6_mIvieCdjiuc_XNku5Y6mEXE2IsTJ85FJyeEYLxpF6I3b_uZwlX1lUu-iR7vsSiIPLl71z10leHqaigceGa7nMEziB8eyzT9Fqo2RbVxmuuwizHLA3pc1oMgifQSt9_bJlWX9dRsSb8xNuCLBBBZIDp7iBY0MHrE185TylkcxoZZepa6mMIBkxeGmDAK7sLEipZFMLoAjwhBNQHqfWVwu-YkdAn-bthjEUz4aoK11-UnNw892UsjxB0Xn_wnLRi1BAabLOQm3V_KljCROSysjQ-oyn9-gDAkS59kEN5itFuPoxS0VBm3roW5IxLs3NWyU5S2FZ1h2DgJOzf50oDR-AJajt4o8cVAcgebfsDQcVzDol7S2P-84kLiVlQPtcBsSh3hrF9A3Sw%3D)
---
Friend,

Five seconds.

That's how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth.

His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to:
* Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars.
* Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals.
* Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers.

Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there.

Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package!

On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals.

This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous.

But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives--with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

**[But in order to do this critical work, we need your help.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d4ae927a14446ee8efddb9204dfc34d&_e=gCB5roBqLgp6kKiyyz91rilSovnObQm6_mIvieCdjiuc_XNku5Y6mEXE2IsTJ85FJyeEYLxpF6I3b_uZwlX1lUu-iR7vsSiIPLl71z10leHqaigceGa7nMEziB8eyzT9Fqo2RbVxmuuwizHLA3pc1oMgifQSt9_bJlWX9dRsSb8xNuCLBBBZIDp7iBY0MHrE185TylkcxoZZepa6mMIBkxeGmDAK7sLEipZFMLoAjwhBNQHqfWVwu-YkdAn-bthjEUz4aoK11-UnNw892UsjxJpEzO8Ue2Gdt1JG-ME97OTDKwmzQUj5Ez42mWTi09-Q86qE5pEGdr4T4AsPBLZrs7sB2mD0dD5c1i0NvuAtBAH9D1sfo4VcetoVAFWfL_vKpgefFXMGRfILE3hNk97VoGthQ4YhWPs0BVPiac8cDvQ%3D)**

Your gift today will allow us to expand our policy research efforts to further educate lawmakers across the country. And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion.

You can make your gift right now using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d4ae927a14446ee8efddb9204dfc34d&_e=gCB5roBqLgp6kKiyyz91rilSovnObQm6_mIvieCdjiuc_XNku5Y6mEXE2IsTJ85FJyeEYLxpF6I3b_uZwlX1lUu-iR7vsSiIPLl71z10leHqaigceGa7nMEziB8eyzT9Fqo2RbVxmuuwizHLA3pc1oMgifQSt9_bJlWX9dRsSb8xNuCLBBBZIDp7iBY0MHrE185TylkcxoZZepa6mMIBkxeGmDAK7sLEipZFMLoAjwhBNQHqfWVwu-YkdAn-bthjEUz4aoK11-UnNw892UsjxLA4AXVH1nn8PXo__ntcQO_sSxpiqC2f8ElUBl8lcbRmaWISea2whqE7DsZFsLZB2R7UeGHHQuxqDrxRq4VVyOWUQ9nxX5J8kncsMQwceKE3ij-DPz1sQw1lkWBfcfM339xVL1lEr5mV4-pKRNAOhbA%3D)**

But please remember that time is of the essence. As President Biden ramps up his campaign efforts, we must be prepared to counter him every step of the way.

That's why your gift is urgently needed now.

Make your gift today to fight back against the Biden administration using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4d4ae927a14446ee8efddb9204dfc34d&_e=gCB5roBqLgp6kKiyyz91rilSovnObQm6_mIvieCdjiuc_XNku5Y6mEXE2IsTJ85FJyeEYLxpF6I3b_uZwlX1lUu-iR7vsSiIPLl71z10leHqaigceGa7nMEziB8eyzT9Fqo2RbVxmuuwizHLA3pc1oMgifQSt9_bJlWX9dRsSb8xNuCLBBBZIDp7iBY0MHrE185TylkcxoZZepa6mMIBkxeGmDAK7sLEipZFMLoAjwhBNQHqfWVwu-YkdAn-bthjEUz4aoK11-UnNw892UsjxAy8KAeI8VgIFL_aRcrbrhMxr-6vj77HJFdhlJFuTWrSXndHuv-E6SkM_5Bn2UIfGgINfiKzYHLgRCJ5MuTJXGi0FZ4-hL8-QVDAS7Ry_D1aT62c3_PF_otbUNcy82SBBawLHmaJhROM9wjs-RODZDk%3D)**

By doing so, you will help advance a culture of life that protects unborn children and their mothers from abortion.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
THOUSANDS of Americans have already gotten their copy of The College Scam -- have you?

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=313d18abba7748979acd20e5009ca529&_e=ZD3t5mXkvy3wm5X_ZOSw-mMSByWJZiMDoDxF_jIvteoaYz76i1dalB-Ix8h62A3zQ_8LcaORjtXorweEm05HuOOoy8QMy30FE2wh2P8zHPW5p6FFMXzRar2us2UdrZ7LZT3-wpAguTFFXaOZIkN_3NnJyms2ZHwI5KaisEPV7qdCz1G3UPPSbykV_QE1Jd3Gx8VOARGv5X18I3lhm_3YtgfTzcO2XdHERw6qL43S_mJjNYuMc3DG4TUOrjWNcamq04GmBaDHDg8sgPiSa5-z-M14vxRfo-TexmcmkHbSIwtBr_Dhq8FKgL74kx2uqB5-)

subject: Your invitation: National Survey on Socialism
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?"

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88a61a2781e64ef1a788a360b2176c49&_e=98PbegoPA8LTfS7srI5sU_eg1hP-3oJFao0xoT-PXNglGI-jWRkIPjmkqX0SOJAUW4sjNV0GS9fIzIpmRh7fwRgwRrSkbqaqzeM3zYOde8-gFZpxw_ij2_CEB5MZ4-Y7lS83Q78lcbmDWJ0AOwaU6K-SuD9TqLbNekP318sIooHHKwbjxehD2nk_usXDE-H3AwX1tyUzC5VEVEVU6ygA9lIvCwAkST2oDG2OixmAt7l9uW2DMTV2nPkK-IbuwAqlGgEG86OaqZcc-27PqeZ_vcpfSjIB0eeMjSevRvJrjoQiRKrGFByv7knGc9Mrm_jCT45GAd42AfT_Y4TJyUOnb_jew0D3d49Di9CliQZ4SLYYxhyWH_dbwHffczNpkXvTan5g4aq1FUChd-aJ_VLHNoJ11YvkjqhJ6wMwxacbn14%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York _magazine posed the question: "When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?" This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a "Great Reset" of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ --Hillsdale College's digest of liberty--author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as "'capitalism with Chinese characteristics'--a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below." Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for--and opposition to--socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88a61a2781e64ef1a788a360b2176c49&_e=98PbegoPA8LTfS7srI5sU_eg1hP-3oJFao0xoT-PXNglGI-jWRkIPjmkqX0SOJAUW4sjNV0GS9fIzIpmRh7fwRgwRrSkbqaqzeM3zYOde8-gFZpxw_ij2_CEB5MZ4-Y7lS83Q78lcbmDWJ0AOwaU6K-SuD9TqLbNekP318sIooHHKwbjxehD2nk_usXDE-H3AwX1tyUzC5VEVEVU6ygA9lIvCwAkST2oDG2OixmAt7l9uW2DMTV2nPkK-IbuwAqlafa_r7Y6S-fhJm6xe_Prcqk9w-HCcLILkZgrGd87cq_TK0gE6R8dfNz-tGkfvAKygY-o-K9bbkoAYbS0xwkLhUpN4RrsVaNFb493j6mN7UjGGDPRsv58uOapJ09ZzvazTXv9Qq8DgE_dukJyy2mPyj27a5cXIUYSigYis4PmVjA%3D)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages. ** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left's "long march through the institutions"--including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. ** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism **in the next five days**, **your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=88a61a2781e64ef1a788a360b2176c49&_e=98PbegoPA8LTfS7srI5sU_eg1hP-3oJFao0xoT-PXNglGI-jWRkIPjmkqX0SOJAUW4sjNV0GS9fIzIpmRh7fwRgwRrSkbqaqzeM3zYOde8-gFZpxw_ij2_CEB5MZ4-Y7lS83Q78lcbmDWJ0AOwaU6K-SuD9TqLbNekP318sIooHHKwbjxehD2nk_usXDE-H3AwX1tyUzC5VEVEVU6ygA9lIvCwAkST2oDG2OixmAt7l9uW2DMTV2nPkK-IbuwAqlx5sMQeSFS2dtzSsj4x3RHoUXT3SJG0cBrDKgw4sA3V74OX64vRpyio_6iXO7ZYutU48b1Ow8H5pAopSTJuwuJPZRlpcKEbU1QEZtwkfw7f5AyVAbzLPLRjSt7BA7YvHxeBzE-rmbjR1yZydi4IDWMLbIRBFcXFhVhId-PevfegA%3D)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Freedom Nation Today

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory--which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race--are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale's work to reach and teach millions has never been more urgently needed. That 's why I need your thoughts quickly. By responding to the National Survey on Socialism in the next five days, your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to reach and teach increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, "Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy." If you agree, please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember--it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

| [ ](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=293c815f940449f5ba8221297314b637&_e=5a7vXadUQ8zyUZTUiD4TU0ddx2aEwhpmBCAjnxXrJVi4r5-vCUQIlX2sX2_ij6qr50xV-Sre-3hWBgZ-Jlc-iy4NnVZ7U0pZIUdPM-XEZWBFHtFTIs9LVB7TMUloQeBB9m0Dtzu78xHDIFTyN_joOQ-Yzv4V12jLOoxhNsM2OUmrSvx3be4uBn42aBCV9jwrJ3Dn1os22M7mFuaSYl-Ng_Z68CXN-_dSZ3RPKp_FgJlBYGI_7KG7TmWg8-WS_XADvLGUd9oOTYxRJukrrP0yz0Kbe_SSiYkJMSYbsn7QSF38Z8hae3OZWBCjPCVYKGO5TzLJ2rO48PfPpYCVebixD1ZHbZ08LCVQtpnt_Z1r0-bZknm0n0Gi8ub7q3Tqy9-7cPyJw6t8_QGfqw1qbt2Icg%3D%3D)

#
Friend,

What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

Knowledge gaps. Lies. Distortion. Shoddy reporting. These kill unborn babies. But until the deception is exposed the killing won't stop.

That's why I invite you to learn the truth in our eye-opening new ebook [_**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=293c815f940449f5ba8221297314b637&_e=5a7vXadUQ8zyUZTUiD4TU0ddx2aEwhpmBCAjnxXrJVi4r5-vCUQIlX2sX2_ij6qr50xV-Sre-3hWBgZ-Jlc-iy4NnVZ7U0pZIUdPM-XEZWBFHtFTIs9LVB7TMUloQeBB9m0Dtzu78xHDIFTyN_joOQ-Yzv4V12jLOoxhNsM2OUmrSvx3be4uBn42aBCV9jwrJ3Dn1os22M7mFuaSYl-Ng_Z68CXN-_dSZ3RPKp_FgJlBYGI_7KG7TmWg8-WS_XAD7daT_o-TwrNIq5gpXi4-6r5ymzJNANkGJgCwPPp5NKAOKwn456_A5-3MBjV1wG0N5zdVy0t5euGHQaabn10u8PJSXMiOeRsmsJhSU_3WfA_a_hnGYZLjE2IaA8YjLRY7-Fq7FfFaHvunMCqan6OlLA%3D%3D)

This brief, hard-hitting, fact-filled ebook is free. I urge you--as a pro-life American--to download it now and get the truth.

Scholars from SBA Pro-Life America's research arm the Charlotte Lozier Institute to reveal FIVE FACTS about abortion. **[These realities are currently being concealed or ignored](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=293c815f940449f5ba8221297314b637&_e=5a7vXadUQ8zyUZTUiD4TU0ddx2aEwhpmBCAjnxXrJVi4r5-vCUQIlX2sX2_ij6qr50xV-Sre-3hWBgZ-Jlc-iy4NnVZ7U0pZIUdPM-XEZWBFHtFTIs9LVB7TMUloQeBB9m0Dtzu78xHDIFTyN_joOQ-Yzv4V12jLOoxhNsM2OUmrSvx3be4uBn42aBCV9jwrJ3Dn1os22M7mFuaSYl-Ng_Z68CXN-_dSZ3RPKp_FgJlBYGI_7KG7TmWg8-WS_XADoJdygVO8mc5qmvT1BMVb6e1iHcTOLbw2Y-ArFRF95eWaFy6OD6ux5Km57dCSGti0uTle_XkpAYZDecFU8aNHBgatFoOguXrceybyHcmHZVcR4vGCkdxX0ArZscsD8USj_c5nHxKL-MzfVWtajfY17Q%3D%3D)** by government agencies and the industry of Big Abortion.

That's why we're blowing the whistle--and letting you in on it. We're telling allies in federal and state governments, the media, and the American people because everyone deserves to know the truth. The truths revealed in this ebook can set women free and save unborn babies.

I'm thrilled to send you the new eBook _**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_ You can start reading your eBook by clicking this link:

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/five-things-ebook](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=293c815f940449f5ba8221297314b637&_e=5a7vXadUQ8zyUZTUiD4TU0ddx2aEwhpmBCAjnxXrJVi4r5-vCUQIlX2sX2_ij6qr50xV-Sre-3hWBgZ-Jlc-iy4NnVZ7U0pZIUdPM-XEZWBFHtFTIs9LVB7TMUloQeBB9m0Dtzu78xHDIFTyN_joOQ-Yzv4V12jLOoxhNsM2OUmrSvx3be4uBn42aBCV9jwrJ3Dn1os22M7mFuaSYl-Ng_Z68CXN-_dSZ3RPKp_FgJlBYGI_7KG7TmWg8-WS_XADWwZfv8h5D0O24XKkUF8YK_8JLXkn7pDNTmEccPYr9SrAlO4J28bapobhiOWLgNz6IvF553eA1W8zM1DOyce1UFEzhL07mu5Av61Gh6vVgwC98uZveyF3Q2KBktxKdsP665-juehB9RdwOqLcraxXKA%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support. You are helping save lives and redeem the future of America.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Conservative Liberty Wire
