name: Gov. Tim Walz via Blue Amp Action
subject: proud of what we’re doing in Minnesota
body:
Seize the moment
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb28cd8cd-4d43-4bac-9dfc-b1f17c81f2bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, When Minnesotans swept in a one-seat Democratic governing trifecta last November by a margin of 321 votes, we came together and agreed on two things: First, our mission was to make Minnesota the best place in the country to live, work, and raise a family. And second, that we would use every ounce of our power to make that vision a reality. **In other words, we realized we had a one-in-a-generation opportunity to make transformational change, and we weren’t going to let it go to waste.** So, while Republicans in other states were banning books, bullying the LGBTQ+ community, and making child labor easier, we got to work protecting the freedoms, safety, and rights of all Minnesotans. We became the first state in the country to codify abortion rights into state law since Roe v. Wade was overturned, banned the harmful practice of conversion “therapy,” made Minnesota a refuge for gender-affirming care, and enacted common sense gun reforms. We put Minnesota on the path to 100% clean energy, passed a budget to give educators the resources they need to teach our children, funded essential projects to rebuild our roads and critical infrastructure, passed universal school meals for Minnesota students, and so much more. The forces of hatred and bigotry are on the march across the country and around the world. But in Minnesota, we came together to make a clear statement: That march stops at our borders. I’m telling you this not to brag (that would be very un-Minnesotan). I’m telling you this because I believe with all my heart that if we come together and rise above the politics of fear and division, every state can be a place where no community is left behind and nobody gets told they don’t belong. [If you are ready to embark on this journey with me as we look to defend and expand on our progress over the coming year and beyond, I’m asking you to join our movement by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3870d709-88b9-4030-89c2-da528a70fc69/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d684903-8252-415e-9694-68162a12c9d1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| I’ve always believed that the point of getting elected isn’t to bank political capital. It’s to burn political capital to improve lives. I’m damn proud of what we’re doing in our state, and not just because we’re showing the people of Minnesota that Democrats are capable of delivering on the promises we make. We’re showing people across this country just how much promise is contained in a progressive vision shared by so many. We’re drawing a roadmap for 49 other states by doing whatever it takes to be a state that works for everyone. And we’re proving that not only can you campaign on compassion and foresight and decency, you can actually govern that way, too. **[Peter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6e96109-ecc7-4bee-a35e-7f0a4e118615/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ , if you’re with me, split a donation that works for you between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today to help us build this movement.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta2ca8de7-5156-483e-8111-eed3bd738235/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** I’m grateful, Gov. Tim Walz
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15534f68-e0f8-486b-8bbf-5488416e16ad/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Stand Against Chemical Abortion
body:
Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children.

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=582bec069bee4bd6b148f4733a06816d&_e=V2oMbBOnehBHe6_bPvJvldDk8eLij9t0C_nTgLVC5aQJrduMDgxKOyqs8VfDEgIHetrdndEeXYmNPojIaOHap7rj9NUucmwZrmHCwxISz-jYlWJA-pIWJcnsniuY_W7iaG7q1q_ex1luXR6gFCJX1WXa86AdwCT15lOY3DLcv93ZYcjkIj8Idikrq3IsG9MB_D1MWNa-8dcSRVmC8MGFbrPTdUyalKFmP7Phn6nkMsZyD0Bv882NB3A2IA9gf9MlrTPc0C41gl8GAA6Tj1SOlA2VI8CYyjU6pqmx0mMuo2Yw5gRw8odVZDyohXIUkjsEB2neg15szMGbIimfyo3JsmjxjJqYbt7Bkg2aAtrK1WzhutcGRUx2ah1xjxroxdSRGgXN9ijn1ZSSpmO5snDCaFd2eczCYP8looTUg3wXeX0%3D)
---
#
Hello Friend,

As proud Americans, we stand for our values of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. However, in recent years, the** **[**sanctity of life has been under attack, particularly through the proliferation of chemical abortions.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=582bec069bee4bd6b148f4733a06816d&_e=V2oMbBOnehBHe6_bPvJvldDk8eLij9t0C_nTgLVC5aQJrduMDgxKOyqs8VfDEgIHetrdndEeXYmNPojIaOHap7rj9NUucmwZrmHCwxISz-jYlWJA-pIWJcnsniuY_W7iaG7q1q_ex1luXR6gFCJX1WXa86AdwCT15lOY3DLcv93ZYcjkIj8Idikrq3IsG9MB_D1MWNa-8dcSRVmC8MGFbrPTdUyalKFmP7Phn6nkMsZyD0Bv882NB3A2IA9gf9MlrTPc0C41gl8GAA6Tj1SOlGk0qGRkvKj7Ieei6EItPVJBt-PiJ9vQrcBq4S3jbv7ydHU5SFowomGohW-TDJZP5qiTa2-7FE8PDdeRB2c7Nj9oQKP0DB7-9Hqq00JZvTStYu1Ea8nb3bZyC1EIjUU1FtAzxboG2IRaTJ6bFDEcws4%3D)

Chemical abortion is being touted by abortion activists as a "safe" and "pain-free" way to abort unborn children. The reality is that chemical abortion not only takes the life of an innocent child, but also poses grave risks to a mother's health.

For mothers, chemical abortion can cause serious health problems, including heavy bleeding, infection, and even death. Moreover, the safety of this procedure has been called into question in recent years due to the rising number of incidences of incomplete abortion, ectopic pregnancy, and other complications.

For unborn children, chemical abortion means grisly death. The drugs used in this procedure are designed to stop the heart of the developing fetus, leading to its expulsion from the womb. This callous disregard for the sanctity of human life is a tragedy that we must do all we can to prevent.

We must make sure that mothers have the truth about what chemical abortion is and the effects it can have on their health. [**Will you step forward and pledge to stand against abortion?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=582bec069bee4bd6b148f4733a06816d&_e=V2oMbBOnehBHe6_bPvJvldDk8eLij9t0C_nTgLVC5aQJrduMDgxKOyqs8VfDEgIHetrdndEeXYmNPojIaOHap7rj9NUucmwZrmHCwxISz-jYlWJA-pIWJcnsniuY_W7iaG7q1q_ex1luXR6gFCJX1WXa86AdwCT15lOY3DLcv93ZYcjkIj8Idikrq3IsG9MB_D1MWNa-8dcSRVmC8MGFbrPTdUyalKFmP7Phn6nkMsZyD0Bv882NB3A2IA9gf9MlrTPc0C41gl8GAA6Tj1SOlHsxaIsCZvcaBdv9UZrXIPqbqkf04el2s-LD9cN6qdW-WnHX_cSW8YzZOIuE0NtFv-CHVYRBJ5gXD1eA6Q6tgPH4l8kgJmdJPY1oCF-i8gvVVhaZ1AN3MLFK4q6tBJeYq_PV96OWe3ccSd5MBFkUnwc%3D)

By signing this pledge, you will be joining more than 1 million concerned citizens who are taking a stand against this barbaric practice and urging lawmakers to enact legislation that protects life at all levels of government.

We need your voice to help us put pressure on lawmakers to draft and pass laws that protect the unborn and their mothers from the dangers of chemical abortion. Sign the pledge here: **[https://action.sbaprolife.org/chemical-abortion-pledge](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=582bec069bee4bd6b148f4733a06816d&_e=V2oMbBOnehBHe6_bPvJvldDk8eLij9t0C_nTgLVC5aQJrduMDgxKOyqs8VfDEgIHetrdndEeXYmNPojIaOHap7rj9NUucmwZrmHCwxISz-jYlWJA-pIWJcnsniuY_W7iaG7q1q_ex1luXR6gFCJX1WXa86AdwCT15lOY3DLcv93ZYcjkIj8Idikrq3IsG9MB_D1MWNa-8dcSRVmC8MGFbrPTdUyalKFmP7Phn6nkMsZyD0Bv882NB3A2IA9gf9MlrTPc0C41gl8GAA6Tj1SOlBS_9bjH8UUXHEykoM4FoSOB6ofbGC-g2ia3UTPMa-XhE_0k5qmKxiPMbzaqwT-dvu237YEsR7tu1Ay4dywZuONSBplk1tsZaRf__1eD_LAejD974hi0Mg2mamdkUet25gurhPrCHJ0YNcjVe_N_uIQ%3D)**

Please don't wait to make your voice heard. Join us today and let's fight for life together.

Sincerely,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Defend the Constitution

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Biden isn’t wasting any time
body:
His ad claims it’s all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

| [ ](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5id0rno7vd51ke5hacps5ciqvssb1muhao0m1ho_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg6cob4chh2bs)
---
Friend,

Five seconds.

That's how long it took President Biden to endorse abortion in his latest campaign ad. It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth.

His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite.

Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to:
* Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars.
* Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals.
* Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers.

Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there.

Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package!

On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals.

This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous.

But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way.

That's why I'm emailing you today.

SBA Pro-Life America is fighting back against the Biden administration and its radical abortion agenda every single day. Our team is working around the clock to advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns. And we are fighting to end abortion by electing national leaders who advocate for laws that save lives--with a special calling to promote pro-life women leaders.

**[But in order to do this critical work, we need your help.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5tflhmdltrp1ar4iphasmq2184qhtnmdbk337f8_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg6cob4chh2bs)**

Your gift today will allow us to expand our policy research efforts to further educate lawmakers across the country. And it will help us to grow our voter education initiative to ensure that pro-life Americans know the truth about where the Biden administration and other pro-abortion leaders stand on abortion.

You can make your gift right now using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2bhi10j80hlh1l0kdnlefoj8j69f6u8ov8lisro_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg6cob4chh2bs)**

But please remember that time is of the essence. As President Biden ramps up his campaign efforts, we must be prepared to counter him every step of the way.

That's why your gift is urgently needed now.

Make your gift today to fight back against the Biden administration using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stand-up-to-biden-harris](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6bflqtham2vnpgq2pg2kbcfted44na8a2t3fgi8_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg6cob4chh2bs)**

By doing so, you will help advance a culture of life that protects unborn children and their mothers from abortion.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Pro Life Update

It's what he's running on. It's what he stands for: Taxpayer-funded abortion on demand up to birth. His ad claims it's all about freedom, but his actions show the opposite. Since coming into office, the Biden administration has worked to: Illegally force American taxpayers to fund abortion with their hard-earned dollars. Ignore violent threats and attacks on pro-life organizations and individuals. Trample on the rights of parents and healthcare providers. Just six days after being sworn in, Biden signed an executive order to repeal the Global Protect Life policy--forcing American taxpayers to fund groups promoting abortion overseas. But he didn't stop there. Within months, he rolled back President Trump's Protect Life Rule, funneling taxpayer dollars to abortion businesses through Title X. And he forced Americans to fund abortion in his Covid-19 relief package! On top of all this, the Biden administration has been weaponizing the DOJ against the pro-life community. They put a target on anyone how dares to tell the truth that abortion takes the life of an innocent child--all while ignoring violence against peaceful pro-life organizations and individuals. This is not only outrageous--it's dangerous. But that hasn't stopped President Biden from going all-in on a radical pro-abortion agenda to fire up his base going into 2024. He is determined to rewrite all the rules--including the U.S. Constitution--to get his way. That's why I'm emailing you today. name: Paul "Bud" Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: I was at D-Day
body:
My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1lbdfbdb9mv396omjc6dt051rife0qjusfv276o_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi739d3ecg0gdcghgl1ltkglbmpe2898tfjvk7j0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zmncfa98nc1rcheme5f175jp3m5q609ldvlse88o_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqtrt3n1im3vsdmj6eslbmai7eonk8duo0tbnrmg_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1ab5994pkrjbhs39fjkf5spk74tf5pmu4dfl1ho_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zssclnai3c8qahf505enmucr1nf5rjskv3khtv80_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6041h4blfq8gav2fu02vcor0e3jsokkuj3m4reo_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** ’**s why I** ’**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zprb9v471p8a4d6ee8r9tir6oq91r9totinmhu2g_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs) Thank you,
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za20vboc9t1ocqr65gsqh78r7iv6hfpndurecqkg_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs)
---
Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center
---
[Support the American Veterans Center](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvkf2divlc7hsbdqanl6t5bpa5u6hllonjr71dt0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg62pj4c3h2bs)
---
|
---

A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. © American Veterans Center
1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Save endangered orcas
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842169?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Cruise ship pollution pushing _endangered orcas_ toward extinction! [Act now to help SAVE orcas!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842170?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** **Only 73 Southern Resident orcas remain** after the tragic deaths of **Cappuccino and Marina!** Cappuccino was one of the most memorable orcas in his pod, with checkmark-shaped saddle patches and a notch in his tall dorsal fin. Marina was known for being the most prolific matriarch in her pod, with many researchers often referring to her as _“the grandma whale.”_ _**Now, both are gone.**_ **We could be among the last generation to share the Earth with these beautiful creatures.** The three main threats to their survival -- food shortage, chemical pollution, and ship disturbances -- **_are ALL caused by corporate cruise companies!_[Friend, will you take immediate action to regulate cruise pollution and protect endangered orcas? >> ](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842171?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842172?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Imagine being a mama whale, swimming through calm marine waters with your calf when a loud noise approaches. The mechanical sound gets louder and louder, heading right for you and your baby. This is what orcas hear when cruise corporations send their titanic ships through these habitats. Sometimes, the ships can even **_STRIKE_** and** _KILL_** the whales.
These ships also drive away Chinook salmon that Southern Resident orcas rely on to feed themselves and their babies. It’s no wonder why some orcas have _**STARVED TO DEATH. **_
Greedy cruise companies have shown they care more about their bottom line than this endangered species. **That’s why we need YOU to send a message to the EPA asking it to regulate cruise ships. [We need 1,383 more people to sign before 11:59 pm TONIGHT to hit our goal! Please, Friend, help rein in greedy cruise companies and save orcas!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842173?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842172?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Marcie Keever
Oceans and vessels program director,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=461cfb07c3b0452e996d9c936b2c2439&_e=3SPA5Hvr5mKMsm2WseTLj3THpVfEa9N4nI7gS_HbU4DN0RRsdVN4q3_Y-GEGPoaKSlwraXI0NRSroXB6vHfr6AW85ET_uR1Sj4dIXKqENu1a3pXijmTiQhWZSWA7e6WBZUPrcd5zebp7eVnCVDatbuTs65c3fPj7ciXRO_rh-imuQ39oCb-V_m7hZHPnK02-WPXnC4kjsKqM3mfH41FEDO9V5VI-nINxG_JL9-os2TdXlO-lFQE-3mn4qtntbfrqk4HoCRBB4LUCNp56-X0FXE6D6SUc0x7Y8J1BSYVLS8Nh1e8C_kRvlhFOeu9LX2Hpp4W1hbtZqw4ZBaFttKhz22uChwo3YrTaxyZa-_O15RAFy03jyvzbSk1T7RfVngvyGVo7ROz1nlM1Dgt_HbgdPqakuFLq6tvBbN_nF4fmP08%3D)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: The truth about America’s Christian heritage
body:
Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different.

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e458de1cf3b4c3b8faba5ca417c5401&_e=nSavmwLrFEvTk0TeDKm4nE4WgSqtQysNh_h8m9V_AV4OGZaWgqtqphcUuGfuxv6SunSQ69jRaJPgLH9lesork03NbJKOy9yB4bOACfyjnOtDfS7TlkhQKqUhaIFdu8BtK6ubIVqCXX46AbQELRhRFWK1yLuUWBEePibguy4GjQsPHloJSZHQn1a4SbiPkbmD1rQ-nBP7iT0XlNGQcMABxrQR500E26zSiT682fSh4JCRHfPFRgjO0cmmtuszu96SvYLa5gdIvI6hkVaWbEl10NqQSoSRgboZqlB9Iwkiv7AOMRhIJGFgkANWyeV3miDHZKxOaGmXmRfxlatyfJb9JkcXVTwqm7cb3QkYA1BHySOir-bjhArXHpb1EpTpT5JyCJwTXSJanscspyGelsLqWOwAV91TQuT7bH8BOg7bj5g%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists would have you believe that our founders intended for a complete separation between Church and State and that Christianity should be absent from all aspects of our government. However, the reality is quite different. Our nation was founded on Christian principles, and the founders wanted our government to uphold those principles.

I've written a book whose title boldly declares what I know to be true: _America Is a Christian Nation_. Many would dispute that claim, but my book provides evidence for this truth using the very words and actions of the founders themselves. The book is a short read, accompanied by beautiful patriotic photos that I think you'll appreciate.
---
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e458de1cf3b4c3b8faba5ca417c5401&_e=nSavmwLrFEvTk0TeDKm4nE4WgSqtQysNh_h8m9V_AV4OGZaWgqtqphcUuGfuxv6SunSQ69jRaJPgLH9lesork03NbJKOy9yB4bOACfyjnOtDfS7TlkhQKqUhaIFdu8BtK6ubIVqCXX46AbQELRhRFWK1yLuUWBEePibguy4GjQsPHloJSZHQn1a4SbiPkbmD1rQ-nBP7iT0XlNGQcMABxrQR500E26zSiT682fSh4JCRHfPFRgjO0cmmtuszu96SdpS5YHnBaJ3lMbMBEw42dJbm7Meaa6pA7Lc_02vFoFcam3xVE_PpNUZe9a8MWkFoDhvvRVCE4pDmO7CMRTCctClgTm07fqaJaBBeG2YgxiPdRxccfa10-do7ARqPv71Re7GPGZKsjEkOB58a2f5MB90_1SywIZLdWePIXarCDsM%3D)
---
| | I would love for you to read this book and discover the truth about our nation's Christian heritage. As a token of appreciation for any gift you can make to Pathway to Victory today, we'll send you a copy of the book. You can secure your copy by donating here: [https://ptv.org/donate/america-is-a-christian-nation-by-dr-robert-jeffress/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e458de1cf3b4c3b8faba5ca417c5401&_e=nSavmwLrFEvTk0TeDKm4nE4WgSqtQysNh_h8m9V_AV4OGZaWgqtqphcUuGfuxv6SunSQ69jRaJPgLH9lesork03NbJKOy9yB4bOACfyjnOtDfS7TlkhQKqUhaIFdu8BtK6ubIVqCXX46AbQELRhRFWK1yLuUWBEePibguy4GjQsPHloJSZHQn1a4SbiPkbmD1rQ-nBP7iT0XlNGQcMABxrQR500E26zSiT682fSh4JCRHfPFRgjO0cmmtuszu96SaAvGPtmRvuFFkSd_4KP3nL6KVfQE3xchsP1lNZV9Mm6-lle5giERlqm4GWMsZTfQ6Bz2Yg6i8NciZ8Iq_arSs-sglDnAshryipoZgOX6sVI2j-9psxbSV7g1ra_Day0cqHH9xLa-uSa_waNhmkF-J58AQCRj0uUMwh-BBs8luOE%3D)

Your donation will be matched dollar-for-dollar thanks to a $500,000 matching challenge that ends on July 4th.

As believers, we must preserve America's unique heritage and fight for our religious freedoms. By understanding our nation's Christian roots, we can work to bring our country back to its founding principles. At the end of my book, I provide suggestions for how to do just that.

I hope you'll consider donating to _Pathway to Victory_ and receiving your copy of _America Is a Christian Nation_ so you can know without a doubt that the foundation of our country was solidly established in the principles of the Bible.

Gratefully,
Dr. Robert Jeffress

body:

_If you’re able-bodied, you work.
If you take out a loan, you pay it back.
And if you commit a violent crime, you go to jail.
And if you’re a man, you should play sports against men._
_America needs more victors and less victims._
I’m Tim Scott and I approve this message because these aren’t just conservative values, they’re American values. And as President, I will defend them.

**Friend, this is the message I’m sharing in my latest TV ad! I need your help reaching more people in Iowa with this content so that we can WIN.**

you show your support by chipping in $5, $25, or even $50?")_**

Tim Scott

YOUR SUPPORT!")

Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership.

It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. **It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president.**

**_[That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669389%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=T9HyMGaJ1WbEq9qJOLeoxQ&sysid=1 "That’s why I announced I
am running for President of the United States.")_**

---
| | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c669380%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uf4DXqkglny9axQIS4Xnqg&sysid=1 "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE")
---

The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here’s the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream _because I have lived it._ My family went from cotton to congress in a **single lifetime.**

**This isn’t going to be easy.** I’ll need your help to win.

---

even $15 to help me win?")_**

This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden’s America, so even if it’s just $5 I would be so grateful.

Thank you for your support!

-Tim

"If you agree with me, will you show your support by chipping in $5, $25, or even $50?" | | | "STAND WITH ME" Thank you, Tim Scott | | | "TIM SCOTT IS RUNNING FOR PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES - TELL TIM HE'S GOT YOUR SUPPORT!" Friend, I believe our country is hungry for positive, conservative leadership. It is time for us to restore hope, create opportunities, and protect America. It is time for us to be proud to be Americans and proud of our president. "That’s why I announced I am running for President of the United States." | | "SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN HERE" The Democrats have chosen a culture of grievance over greatness. Here’s the thing though - I know the power of the American Dream because I have lived it. My family went from cotton to congress in a single lifetime. This isn’t going to be easy. I’ll need your help to win. | "I NEED YOUR HELP TO WIN!" "Can you chip in $5, $10 or even $15 to help me win?"** This campaign relies on very generous gifts from people just like you. Trust me, I know that times are tough in Joe Biden’s America, so even if it’s just $5 I would be so grateful. Thank you for your support! -Tim | PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR AMERICA 7620 Rivers Ave, Ste. 370 #312 North Charleston, SC 29406 American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: STOP THE PRO-ABORTION AGENDA NOW!
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them.

| [ ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zredde3ng3m8k2dub7bb0306h97kakuv21j33058_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg6aoj2cth2bs)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbp0n958sp79pmck9nhgdisb2evdqgd8ll8v3v20_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg6aoj2cth2bs) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5harn2eh0np2qv1ve8emq5d3o248p0co0o17poo_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg6aoj2cth2bs)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zff5p74s0b6ulf5b3ealf0jeb02elk2i3u6ms0qo_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg6aoj2cth2bs)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

Trump Train News

name: American Defense News
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.

This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zolkuo56heu042iqb961avqcm8veh2unmsvafb9o_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg66p34c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zebe9o10v1ulotg9ja18nnige5r48utk9g9ee9cg_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg66p34c3h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaeajk5pa3o4t56oepf4t4n5ltcru431n6f8bgr8_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg66p34c3h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztj625lc8a4mfrt0gfn3nnrhmb9ss4cedk4kcln0_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg66p34c3h2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg3qtfd09icoilbju658oa6iehsi9hp4bggh8c10_rp22sh2s8i66o77ctg66p34c3h2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

subject: STOP THE PRO-ABORTION AGENDA NOW!
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them.

| [ ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37ab09388c244371a42243ac482e37e1&_e=e-_XDAmoY-4HfTSIBjBq6RPxDRsEX7fsPQMiEy3xRP7XJHrF-Q6g573rahXkJPDYOh9uwEyx2puG2EY3tQGOCZeT9U2nUoWDsBunnHXlQxQURf97QOgBAJ3ZBzNCe1hxmVtmzWPDks1S3QdGjIsYrceylEnD_4705cqs2kJmrKboA_ZASp6sQE51abeUmPWlqJDmREfrvRNd_KeIgrIOxPgflnKdgZ81njDuSxYjy1Fb5A2nZo3oZJyzpzpdxDHf2iIqa5AN5mMxRaJQ0ScddQkK09ILzed5cCnMgvqwtBSDMZMT2rXzMU_Yry4RkpNKGZPH4LyPVcfLstOQNqsUW3L7UGmDsWrp97nat-bDVNUFNaG83tUOIf7ZE7xkmcg6YXyl1ClDqzFf4HoPniFC3oMcCQmzCld5eGjzjK9TzM8%3D)

#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37ab09388c244371a42243ac482e37e1&_e=e-_XDAmoY-4HfTSIBjBq6RPxDRsEX7fsPQMiEy3xRP7XJHrF-Q6g573rahXkJPDYOh9uwEyx2puG2EY3tQGOCZeT9U2nUoWDsBunnHXlQxQURf97QOgBAJ3ZBzNCe1hxmVtmzWPDks1S3QdGjIsYrceylEnD_4705cqs2kJmrKboA_ZASp6sQE51abeUmPWlqJDmREfrvRNd_KeIgrIOxPgflnKdgZ81njDuSxYjy1Fb5A2nZo3oZJyzpzpdxDHf2iIqa5AN5mMxRaJQ0ScddTr2Nb7x9fXkd6jU4CchZdRrYn094MuB_KtCYJ-jDGtUyMoBmCi3mWUU4MDqFxMRXsLO9qesRmVKB0kKBGFwgAux6tCYDSJqbgg3hod_fEp5DGtpQKnWnBdK58JKfxdguzgp7d7WfOkav-TVst2lIl0%3D) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37ab09388c244371a42243ac482e37e1&_e=e-_XDAmoY-4HfTSIBjBq6RPxDRsEX7fsPQMiEy3xRP7XJHrF-Q6g573rahXkJPDYOh9uwEyx2puG2EY3tQGOCZeT9U2nUoWDsBunnHXlQxQURf97QOgBAJ3ZBzNCe1hxmVtmzWPDks1S3QdGjIsYrceylEnD_4705cqs2kJmrKboA_ZASp6sQE51abeUmPWlqJDmREfrvRNd_KeIgrIOxPgflnKdgZ81njDuSxYjy1Fb5A2nZo3oZJyzpzpdxDHf2iIqa5AN5mMxRaJQ0ScddQngE4lbnqncjqj0097r0aKAo5Xrs54V2P2phBs8lM_71jKqs4M5c2aiDaTWJl1dglAmbgH1wRi-BVAn920ANJFVIL2IVyZiKNB5kfr59geRwbzyd27uTtvjDkKbOHhmCuKyeMHiH0B6WXtDTOlvNCI%3D)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=37ab09388c244371a42243ac482e37e1&_e=e-_XDAmoY-4HfTSIBjBq6RPxDRsEX7fsPQMiEy3xRP7XJHrF-Q6g573rahXkJPDYOh9uwEyx2puG2EY3tQGOCZeT9U2nUoWDsBunnHXlQxQURf97QOgBAJ3ZBzNCe1hxmVtmzWPDks1S3QdGjIsYrceylEnD_4705cqs2kJmrKboA_ZASp6sQE51abeUmPWlqJDmREfrvRNd_KeIgrIOxPgflnKdgZ81njDuSxYjy1Fb5A2nZo3oZJyzpzpdxDHf2iIqa5AN5mMxRaJQ0ScddTi_98p_aaMjfzIGN_4n6kb57bQKynUzZp96GM_lhs2zX8tXy5XSA62qo3rbY2CGsA1VnzsHbXkyGvKbJUJBexavc8sruto7OrBv1eNw5quYHvM_Km4yhJbQ29y8e-Byyvx3-L1GiwkUsuo3xbNdS_8%3D)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth! The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life. But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn. The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand. Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts! For LIFE , Marjorie Dannenfelser President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

name: Col. Mike Waltz, me (2)
subject: AI has become a threat to humanity
body:
I’m reaching out to my most loyal supporters with an urgent ask| | | Peter, Every day, there’s a dangerous new revelation about Artificial Intelligence.

If you haven’t been keeping up, AI can now:
---
* Imitate anyone’s voice, letting **_scammers_** pose as your loved ones over the phone.
* Start businesses, create websites, and invest online
* Be used to create Deep-Fake videos of world leaders

---
And worst of all, AI has **_no off-switch._**

I’m taking immediate action to combat the dangers of AI, which is why our team put together an EMERGENCY PETITION for every patriot.

[**Will you join me and sign your name and DEMAND Congress take action to stop the dangers of AI?**](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5d380ee9377845dca80d7d183d289474&_e=aDBblez-IZkn-LEgzT4Wy8MYY4s1xAVBtGJioTzXnUt6QJDCMzKmKixOrCHAA7MseCQ9xQ9jcBDY7W-XIBc7__KKJfSm0lGMpG97YnL7bGPjELi1y5cC1_mLi7pcnoFN_OwGanyOC7rbM0w8kgWBvIYhr1tkUMvLEJ6vz5RWguXuZvp1g43jyiLndwskR3FQiKKs9It1pjOK8Jms36goqJ6LwzKunNB43KI73IoKgcwuzyI95F2yMRMT4h15BSse0MshGjTAu2vWEP6IcZybckRlHO5fMZF_IXnFHjYIXWQbHcTq7KUg0sWBwb5BNBpx9Qjt9H_CbT1JazyMa-vEiHNFurzYbc2C8lCieSQM945XRVQzXoFhHpeIDs_dj3HO)

Thank you,

Peter,

Today marks the beginning of our first full month since launching our 2024 election bid:
**RON DESANTIS FOR PRESIDENT **
In May, we raised over $8.2M because of over 40,000 generous donors. **This month, we want to prove how much your support means to us. **

**Our team has decided to build a giant donor wall with the names of our first 100,000 donors (that includes our first 40,000 donors already). Not because we don't enjoy our beige walls but because when we say you 're a part of this team we mean it - your support is the foundation of our campaign.**

Every day when our team is in the office, we think about the mission and the people across the country who have chipped in because they're focused on it with us. We take that responsibility and that trust very seriously, and we want everyone who works here to see it.

**[So with that in mind, why wouldn't we put you on the actual brick-and-mortar of Ron DeSantis for President HQ?](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=ea611dcd681c4d77b1817c626ab79f0c&_e=-NjPMDZOvr0ZdEa2Pk5TnFozz8rN3Z_yI2dttAqKj8h4ADUm84MKL54XR2Pdmg4_0fZgOnV6O9u3U_TUk_OPRSpn-Q5ZcqaLNpe5bHmIN2UK2xl8okdDf2JaheRgJKRHwuOONCrSF1PgW3ldmjmy4WrVvEH8R0F4UN2GDoRQGr6-vQiksOgTcxMxv9N51zc8ex9bVFIEysj7bV6l7Qnv9RZa1kGv7yKDgpKHqkbkAoL_ARslolzDEW3kt8k4D5y_oUP0yWZwTDpI4lNasprhG1pnpHiUJkFVq3T-O2EX_0F55X9Ycjt5XOFVteQ_xtBCPWdjDOZP2ULDvrxcQTm01iQO3DHnk3dXYB6AZ32jEDTu18tr-HiO_sgmnyexVkhu "So with that in mind, why wouldn’t we put you on the actual brick-and-mortar of Ron DeSantis for President HQ?")

Don't believe us? **

**We 'll be pushing out live updates weekly so you can see how your support holds up the walls of our home base. **

Peter, we have pledged to you to never lose sight of our mission -- to achieve our Great American Comeback. Despite what the woke mob will tell you, **STEP 1 is building the resources we need to win this election.**

We are so excited to see your name on our walls here at HQ. **[Chip in ANY amount you can today to leave your mark on what will be an unprecedented moment for our nation.](http://links.donatetorondesantis.com/u/click?_t=39b5827fb2524894a9b1d5b4f58e45b1&_m=ea611dcd681c4d77b1817c626ab79f0c&_e=a6AKf5_LxXzSjrKH5XypnzJMKGLT5T4c6ldFGBMIpYOaLLuByOD9c3EdFjSa26ryZAQ8hTM7UPzLPkc0NB0ySv8Rsidfv29Yo5yNVyFEuwH0nRWzZr-0u9rLUKEm6guyXnHlPU_sVuOOh7urZf1lii5hyfCKeGlStdo4uHubySHdtbx4KAiIXgcHuMIJamezaj_X3kZZEEZIiyefQJ-7MdE8qt2ZxmZodj8vN4nAG67JcU9dydXXCEkaOro56kQ-4ppNguvdq896vwXUKi3g7z1kfrV_cDV1MwlEZW24gTE8zull9P1CrGiuq1iFHkh02IqIuURvRih42bbMZu7D69ZTx9_KHzZSJGweCerP08wisBIwrdL0XQjcJpmt7sr7 "Chip in ANY amount you can today to leave your mark on what will be an unprecedented and historic moment for our nation.")**

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

We can either sit back and allow Republicans to build a massive war chest and lie their way into power again... = = | = = | = = | = = Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. Now, as the top Democrat in the House, he’s fighting to stop MAGA extremism and reclaim the majority for Democrats. Hakeem is committed to electing a record number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. But he can’t compete with Republicans’ special interest cash without our support. Is there any way you could chip in to help? = We know you’re getting a lot of emails, but that’s because Democrats have a clear path to winning back the House – and Hakeem isn’t letting a single second go to waste. Jeffries for Congress PO BOX 65322 Washington, DC 20035 United States | mailto:info@hakeemjeffries.com | | | Paid for by Jeffries for Congress

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Stopping abortion on demand
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn

| [ ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmn2rsdkhejfmu29s40hns7q7qdpalklnj2nhsig_rp22sh2s8i66o77cti64ob2clh2bs)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsn41ojf3ps4jdlrgae427o9oe0hp5c84en7jnpg_rp22sh2s8i66o77cti64ob2clh2bs) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqlbmdc35habskis40nso3cncqf6kk06g2tmv7j8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cti64ob2clh2bs)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdf2cebo6rrj4v7v4f160n824cpf6l6f9l1a8cm8_rp22sh2s8i66o77cti64ob2clh2bs)**

We cannot wait any longer - every moment counts!

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

1600 Daily

body:
I just held Adam Schiff accountable.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
Friend,
---
The House just passed my resolution to punish Adam Schiff for his unethical behavior.
---
**I've now formally _CENSURED_ Schiff and referred him for an ethics investigation over his role in the phony Trump-Russia collusion witch hunt!**
---
I'll be honest with you: This resolution doesn't go as far as I would like (Schiff ought to be expelled from Congress), but it's the best I could do with a narrow Republican House majority.
---
**Securing its passage is still a win for the American people. Accountability will be restored in Washington!**
---
But now that my resolution has passed, the swamp has vowed to retaliate against me.
---
That's why I'm asking for your help defending myself from their slander machine as I keep fighting to drain the swamp and make Washington accountable to YOU once again.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution of ANY AMOUNT to stand with me now that I've done the bare minimum to hold Adam Schiff accountable - for 1500% impact.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._6oXA)
---

[](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25 >> $400](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 >> $800](http://trk.secureandprosper.-4mlQsrRNXp2MbGX__LQ)

---

[CONTRIBUTE $100 >> $1,600 ](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250 >> $4,000](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://trk.secureandprosper.-8UwplIY88KUaIyxHoDw)
---

Special counsel John Durham's report completely debunked the Left's phony Trump-Russia collusion narrative.
---
It concluded that neither law enforcement nor U.S. intelligence agencies had any actual evidence of collusion between President Trump and Russia.
---
**Just like President Trump has always maintained, it was all a witch hunt orchestrated by Hillary Clinton, Adam Schiff, and their allies to sabotage the Trump campaign and his presidency.**
---
Ultimately, the Trump-Russia collusion hoax ripped our country apart, cost taxpayers more than $32 million, and damaged our foreign relations (potentially permanently)...
---
_...and Schiff has the audacity to keep pushing the LIE to this day!_
---
This kind of treasonous, unethical behavior cannot be allowed to go unpunished.
---
Which is why I REFUSED to back down after my first resolution failed to pass last week.
---
Instead, I kept fighting - and because of strong support from grassroots conservatives like YOU, many of the Republicans who voted with the Democrats last week switched their votes today.
---
I want to make one thing perfectly clear: _**This is only the beginning.**_
---
I'm in Washington because you trusted me to come in here and do the right thing - and that's what I'm going to do, no matter the cost to my own political career.
---
I will ALWAYS be a voice for those whose voices have been ignored and whose wishes have long been disregarded by the corrupt uniparty establishment in Washington.
---
With your support, we'll drain the swamp one step at a time.
---
[**So please, make a grassroots contribution of ANY AMOUNT to stand with me now that I've done the bare minimum to hold Adam Schiff accountable - for 1500% impact.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._p2Qlg)
---
Thank you,

| | | _**[Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump 's new federal indictment:](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zld31j6ouevnakbkeatrh087q5f4t4ftqfsen4d0_rp22sh2s8i66o77cti64ob2clh2bs "Mark Levin DROPS THE HAMMER on Trump’s new federal indictment:")**_

**" President Trump is 76 years old. If the Department of Justice gets its way, he will die in federal prison... They don't want to just win elections, they want to take control of this country, they want one-party rule. And they have used the Department of Justice and the FBI to get what they want."**

Mark Levin is spot on.

The Deep State, Radical Democrats, and Liberal prosecutors joined forces to take down President Trump ONCE AND FOR ALL. That's why they're indicting him for:

_Not one... not two... not three... not four... not five... not six ... but SEVEN federal charges!_

They're throwing the book at President Trump to make an example out of him: this is what happens if you want to stand up to the Radical Left.

**Step One:** Put President Trump away for good. **Step Two:** Send a message to every Conservative that they could be next. **Step Three:** intimidate them into silence. **Step Four:** TOTAL DEMOCRAT CONTROL.

That's one path forward. Luckily, we have another option...

We're calling on each and every brave Conservative to join us in standing up to the Radical Left right here and right now.

_**[GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump 's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z3b8q1f47n2uuip9sgnnsbcn9ubrju9aknd5g9so_rp22sh2s8i66o77cti64ob2clh2bs "GO ON RECORD: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_

Look:

It won't be easy going toe-to-toe with the Deep State and the Radical Democrats. It'll take numbers.

We'll need an OVERWHELMING number of brave Conservatives - at least 1,000,000 strong - to speak up and prove that these Liberals don't represent the will of the American People.

**But it will be impossible to make the case without you. **

So if there was ever a moment to act with some haste - THAT MOMENT IS RIGHT NOW.

_**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump 's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt ](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbhru2eon14kotpejt2h5ri962lsak0lo7h63njo_rp22sh2s8i66o77cti64ob2clh2bs "BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign the petition demanding Trump's freedom from the corrupt Witch Hunt")**_

We'll be on the lookout for your name.

Thanks for having the courage to act in these trying times,

- House GOP

name: Tiernan Donohue
subject: A real test of our strength
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=182%2E552475%2EMX_d07)
Peter, in just a few days, we’re going to hit the first end-of-quarter FEC deadline since launching our re-election campaign.
This deadline is a real test of our strength. After June 30th, what we’ve raised will be made public for Mitch McConnell, Bob’s potential Republican opponents, and all of Pennsylvania to see.
**We’re setting a goal to raise $75,000 online before the end of the quarter,** because all eyes will be on our team to see if we have the support — and the resources — necessary to keep PA blue.
**[So we’re asking everyone: Can you chip in $5 today so we can post the strongest numbers possible on our end-of-quarter financial report?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230625-1?refcode=em20230625-1&refcode2=182_552475_MX_d07&akid=182%2E552475%2EMX_d07)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230625-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230625-1&refcode2=182_552475_MX_d07&akid=182%2E552475%2EMX_d07)**
This quarterly fundraising deadline is one of the biggest hurdles we’ll face in our race. That’s because CNN and Roll Call both rank Pennsylvania as one of the top 10 most competitive Senate seats — so our race is sure to be one of the most competitive and expensive in the country.
Republicans will spend millions upon millions to try to oust Bob, flip Pennsylvania red, and take the Senate majority. It’s up to us to stop them.
With so much at stake, we have to hit the ground running _now_ to build a campaign that can and will win on Election Day. This first end-of-quarter deadline will set the bar for the mobilizing, advertising, and staffing decisions we make for the rest of the campaign. **Peter, we cannot fall short of our $75,000 goal.**
**[Please, chip in $5 — or whatever you can — to help us reach our end-of-quarter goal and show that the support of our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey is strong.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230625-1?refcode=em20230625-1&refcode2=182_552475_MX_d07&akid=182%2E552475%2EMX_d07)**
Thank you for everything you do!
Tiernan

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Thank you in advance, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
For many people it may be the last thing they see before they decide to endorse me or sit this race out.
#

Hey everyone, Ruben Gallego here.
Our first full official FEC fundraising deadline of this campaign is coming up fast and I am reaching out to ask for your help.
What I am asking you to do today is to make a donation – of any amount you can afford.
Because when this deadline ends, not only are we legally required to report how much money we raise, but we will also share the number of donations we have received.
And I want to report a lot of donations because each one sends a message to National Democrats about the level of grassroots support and enthusiasm our campaign has received.
For many people it may be the last thing they see before they decide to endorse me or sit this race out.
So that's our goal. A lot of donations. As many as we can get before this FEC deadline ends. Can you add to the total today?
[**Can I count on you to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford to our campaign for U.S. Senate today? I need your help as I take some time off from the campaign to be with my newborn child.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june23.4TsbMb&refcode=em230625-1-f&t=1&akid=744%2E734936%2EQZHpwL)

Republicans promised accountability when we took back the House. He used his office to make him and his family RICH. He has hidden classified documents for YEARS! He has weaponized the federal government to ATTACK American citizens! And we know without a shadow of a doubt that Joe Biden is implicated in a foreign bribery pay-to-play scheme, taking MILLIONS OF DOLLARS from China AND Ukraine. There's too much evidence to ignore. We must impeach Biden now, Fellow American. Joe Biden is a disgrace to the Oval Office and should be stripped of his position and held responsible for his high crimes against the United States. The American people know they can’t depend on the so-called ‘Department of Justice’ to investigate the Biden family’s corruption, and so it’s up to the U.S. Congress to hold him accountable once and for all. For Liberty, Rep. Andy Ogles (R-TN) P.S. name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Ilhan and the Progressive Caucus
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)
Friends,
We are engaged in many struggles right now for the future of our country and our planet. We are trying to save the planet from the ravages of climate change. We're trying to create an economy that works for all and not just the billionaire class. We're trying to defend our democracy against those who are moving us toward authoritarianism. And that's just to name a few.
But it is not all doom and gloom. One thing that makes me optimistic about the future is that there are more really strong young progressives — often people of color — in the House now than ever before.
But we cannot stop here.
We need to continue electing candidates who will take on corporate greed, authoritarianism, and bigotry and who are prepared to fight for justice. And in order to do that, we must bring our people together in a multi-generational, multi-racial movement to take on the big-money interests that have so much political and economic power in our country.
**[So today, I am asking you to join me in supporting strong progressive candidates across the country by splitting a contribution between Ilhan Omar and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.AiljbI&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=2&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your split contribution between Ilhan Omar and the Congressional Progressive Caucus will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/770?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.GnxYJd&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=3&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/15?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.UnNw3H&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=4&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/8?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.ek5dmy&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=5&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/9?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.jtWqe1&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=6&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/10?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.-vI5at&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=7&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.veAqRm&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=8&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**
---
****
In 1991, I co-founded the Congressional Progressive Caucus alongside 5 of my colleagues because I believed that working people needed more of a voice in Congress. And today, I’m proud to see that it has grown to more than 100 members, including Ilhan Omar, and is now one of the largest caucuses in Congress.
In the midst of all the struggles facing our nation and our planet, we cannot simply remain on the defensive. We need to continue building our movement to transform this country. And that means electing progressive leaders who will fight to protect social security, raise the minimum wage, get big money out of politics, and guarantee health care as a human right.
But it is not going to be easy.
Big Pharma, Big Oil, and other corporate interests have in past election cycles spent many millions of dollars attacking progressive candidates.
The good news is that despite the avalanche of right-wing spending, we have still been able to elect many strong candidates like Ilhan.
The bad news is that some excellent progressive candidates have been defeated by this right-wing money.
It should not be a radical proposition to say that the very wealthiest people in this country should not be able to control our political system and who represents us in government.
This great nation and its government belongs to ALL of our people, not just right-wing billionaires and their Super PACs.
**[So please, split a contribution between Ilhan and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC and help us take on the outrageous sums of money flowing into our political system.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.AiljbI&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=9&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**
All across the country, people are coming together and saying “enough is enough.” They are tired of tinkering around the edges of the problem — on climate change, on racial justice, on economic justice.
We’ve already shown what’s possible when working people stand together — and if we continue to do so, together we will elect a Congress that works for all of us, not just the 1%.
Thank you again for supporting Ilhan and the Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC if you can afford to do so.
In solidarity,
Sen. Bernie Sanders
**[DONATE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june23-cpc.AiljbI&refcode=em230625-1-t1&t=10&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=11&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=12&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=13&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=14&refcode2=279_791427_XsichN&akid=279%2E791427%2EXsichN)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

_Biden is falling into the hands of our adversaries while allowing and encouraging investigations into his political opponents._

_**China, Russia, and Iran want to portray our country as corrupt. Sadly, Biden is helping them!**_

_Joe Biden and his Department of Justice are shaking Americans' faith in our justice system as the president's son gets a slap on the wrist with misdemeanor charges and no jail time.

It's no surprise that China now feels emboldened enough to put a military base within 100 miles of our coast.

When they look at Joe Biden, they see a President more concerned with protecting his son than protecting the American people.

We must stop these attacks on our country and focus on the issues that matter, like protecting our national security, unleashing American energy, and unshackling the economy._

name: John Fetterman
subject: The first thing people Google about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’m going to tell you about my tattoos, Derek.
#
Derek,
We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my tattoos are *literally* the first thing people Google about me.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49697?refcode=em20230625-8424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8424%2E434096%2EA2yyrc)
Well enough Googling. **Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself, Derek.**
**On my left arm I have the zip code 15104.** That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49697?refcode=em20230625-8424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8424%2E434096%2EA2yyrc)
**On my right arm I have nine different dates.** These are the dates when people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as mayor, starting in 2005. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic loss of life.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49697?refcode=em20230625-8424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8424%2E434096%2EA2yyrc)
My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence.
**Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world, Derek.** In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through.
In my 15 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth and art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center.
We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as Mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence.
**Derek, I’m fighting in the U.S. Senate for you + your community as if it were my very own.**
That promise is written on my arms. Literally.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49697?refcode=em20230625-8424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8424%2E434096%2EA2yyrc)
[If you want to have my back as I fight like h*ll for working people, chip in a few bucks or whatever you can today. ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49697?refcode=em20230625-8424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8424%2E434096%2EA2yyrc)
**[Contribute Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/49697?refcode=em20230625-8424&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=8424%2E434096%2EA2yyrc)**
Thanks for all you do,
John
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230625-8424-footer&t=25&refcode2=8424_434096_A2yyrc&akid=8424%2E434096%2EA2yyrc)**

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.
clean_body: I’m going to tell you about my tattoos, Derek. Derek, We both know I don’t look like a typical politician. Maybe that’s why my tattoos are literally the first thing people Google about me. Well enough Googling. Today I’ll tell you about my tattoos myself, Derek. On my left arm I have the zip code 15104. That’s Braddock, Pennsylvania, my home and the community I was honored to serve as mayor for 15 years. Gisele and I are raising our kids here in Braddock, right across the street from Andrew Carnegie’s first steel mill. On my right arm I have nine different dates. These are the dates when people were killed through violence in Braddock while I served as mayor, starting in 2005. Seven out of nine were gun deaths. I actually have to get one more date added because in June of 2018, there was another tragic loss of life. My first tattoo came after January 16, 2006. It was my second week on the job as mayor after winning my election by a single vote. I received a call and was summoned to a police crime scene where a pizza delivery man had been robbed and killed by gun violence. Every time Braddock lost someone was the worst feeling in the world, Derek. In a close-knit community like Braddock, it’s very likely that you know the victim and their family. It’s an incredibly wrenching and personal experience as a mayor — but nothing compared to what the families have to go through. In my 15 years as mayor, I worked with the community to take on gun violence and other important issues that Braddock faced every day. I helped initiate youth and art programs for the students of our community and we worked together to create a community center. We also worked to develop buildings that had been written off, kick-started our economy, and reduced deadly violence. My proudest moment as Mayor of Braddock is when our community went 5 1⁄2 years without the loss of life due to gun violence. Derek, I’m fighting in the U.S. Senate for you + your community as if it were my very own. That promise is written on my arms. Literally. Thanks for all you do, John John Fetterman U.S. Senator, Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
