body:
| | | This is why Elon Musk is one of the greatest minds today...
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62868258:JUO7-lI7N:m:1:3299561967:299609196BA1DA47265627A9B96EF49B:r)
---
Elon is right - our children are being indoctrinated to hate America and espouse marxist ideas, and most parents don't even know it. But thankfully, we have a plan to put an end to the radical indoctrination in our schools and stand up for parents who are being kept in the dark. You may already know that the 1776 Project PAC was the first PAC of its kind; designed specifically to replace left wing school board members across the country. But what you may not know is that 2023 is the biggest election year for our schools on record. We're endorsing and supporting 250 conservative school board candidates! Patriot, this is the largest school board election effort from any conservative organization in American HISTORY! And if we're going to pull this off- we need to know whether or not we can count on your support this year... Can we count on your support in pulling off the largest conservative school board sweep in American History?

body:
| | | **I'm one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and right now, I need your help.**

**FIRST:** Experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ said that Nevada could once again decide Senate control.

**THEN:** Mitch McConnell and the GOP started coming after me as a top target for defeat.

**NOW: A recent poll shows me 2 points down, just as we’re falling short of our critical midnight fundraising goal. The only way I can get back on track is with your immediate grassroots support.**

Nevada's last Senate race came down to less than 1 point, and this race is shaping up to be just as close. With Senate control at stake here, the GOP is set to spend whatever it takes to flip our battleground red.

**That's why I'm reaching out today. I'm no stranger to tough fights, but I simply cannot win this one alone.[Please, will you give $5 or more now – split between my campaign and the DSCC – so we can stop the GOP from gaining more ground, reach our $50,000 goal, and keep the Senate blue?](https://go.dscc.org/go/12711?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20230625-JackyRosen-RosenTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20230625-JackyRosen-RosenTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=11155%2E9716520%2Eum45xI)**

Having served as Secretary of State and the CIA Director during the Trump Administration, I know a lot about the foreign threats facing the United States. name: Defend the Constitution
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1726fd03981348178355062b3c221b03&_e=4JEdgOdSNWYk6j2MMOeyZHx3XJFBfPHb0PbHl_wz5xGW0llWfhvWRg3ODpi-WUoLVQOAiUd_CtVkZSaLQ4ugYZ2gn55HDKdgQ51zijyAh6DGX0-uzMA_5FJSWA62oZs1eBKq9ScgCTngb9W05jeFX_csMum_FVK8ThdFssXRjXaRsLEt146RU5h7knphJhrbTb-yUgoRudv4Zu-vF8UBDHkqjYFC7YjWEjs6340b8fFYM1hP_Ui8VthKdf5tIFngPdVS3qTJJ8CXYXidgm41V0MiTJ0y1eBHGn-nqdF8rTtzCkFncTRsHu8fBUvaFqD2HSUgEkw_W-_zdO_QqFpQGm8woLZ2CJFeBTpMCZ2Vxmzs_uRhQW5K5l4uIoifKQF6x2PLNnYQofBRjz6N-K3OJA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1726fd03981348178355062b3c221b03&_e=4JEdgOdSNWYk6j2MMOeyZHx3XJFBfPHb0PbHl_wz5xGW0llWfhvWRg3ODpi-WUoLVQOAiUd_CtVkZSaLQ4ugYZ2gn55HDKdgQ51zijyAh6DGX0-uzMA_5FJSWA62oZs1eBKq9ScgCTngb9W05jeFX_csMum_FVK8ThdFssXRjXaRsLEt146RU5h7knphJhrbTb-yUgoRudv4Zu-vF8UBDHkqjYFC7YjWEjs6340b8fFYM1hP_Ui8VthKdf5tIFngZIiZFtFKMWGgTqD_bHbBCqNU8IYLMoqY_wwSyIFX_NFTzgxakSF5ZBlvrofKCbSHyHxsBqzr7D1eil7sOUiD57eGLNTPjomXUyLhCzbTGC_-aTGA_mP4Dujb_TPZNPbZ_yfVqgN6feGFZSm_aWnflQ%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1726fd03981348178355062b3c221b03&_e=4JEdgOdSNWYk6j2MMOeyZHx3XJFBfPHb0PbHl_wz5xGW0llWfhvWRg3ODpi-WUoLVQOAiUd_CtVkZSaLQ4ugYZ2gn55HDKdgQ51zijyAh6DGX0-uzMA_5FJSWA62oZs1eBKq9ScgCTngb9W05jeFX_csMum_FVK8ThdFssXRjXaRsLEt146RU5h7knphJhrbTb-yUgoRudv4Zu-vF8UBDHkqjYFC7YjWEjs6340b8fFYM1hP_Ui8VthKdf5tIFngRa6JyAekoI-v1pwvYdPSHEIY9SnN8vdm_mACRtdBcW9qLWGonSwbU600FJo6ubKya9BVBq2n1wcOUfQsYhqSz8i50Ruo8w8pCw5m9nChEiCZi4IeP7-bR1vJvNIpMgMvf2Q0k1wbf3f2mVoabcmetQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=1726fd03981348178355062b3c221b03&_t=uY947Qvifr7g1tGxM3V87X4prb57hrWhuTZDSqDCF9LTroCd04YSMn0dqcIz4tIxVun-q5DnF6PBCbBy6QEo6rYlUxxs9ok90nZdm3hbKdqpBdzMIBrd2hlIiXOO8yGvcsCj3ahjYW5YNdp9lsHKtwwfka3OxYe6VT92NTH68-4%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1726fd03981348178355062b3c221b03&_e=Jt-wtbaiNRXdOkLbtk9kZd9a1OTwi00Vi2leCrPQTQifg13U_NfA_kqbSQ3yKCHIPSwJLLfHLq20_hAectzLFccrMXYTjs_TJHVNIcG1Sx6XEWOY4sXmNE_c_-xVs-F9XX-H31qieHhCRMGO8rN1wRBXiEl8RspMad9SL8YfiN3nDqxLGPKK-JWHVgmJ5belTr4gyOSsQrz1MGu9HyaBI8DHG_5rc4EpPgcHBdW-TCb6l0RkZ2tfodW4hcyx3FV181sHKi0tlPndHw9-jj-28rmw-OTgyEeDZgiMoeHbZ-E%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1726fd03981348178355062b3c221b03&_e=4JEdgOdSNWYk6j2MMOeyZELYng_2LXnw1-ABRw7NOyHXD6jrSBUUXqcshiClhOeZCHvVv9xekiGNVS_GgpKBNQ0QSI4dP-kI0xSZPR8mCEoMibBA7XTCJ1XagKm-xK0HczyG4k_zKJCRkrAOFeM2amdWje_UGF3Z2OAlbZEZKgseelYTmu8F3NCSIKFhSipWOoSeUd1nbfD_z1a3iCrtZHp4Xje89Pc83I66lRg9DJo%3D)_

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: A story about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
And how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[make your first donation of any amount toward our end-of-quarter goal of raising 30,000 individual donations.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34552?refcode=em20230625-3312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3312%2E614464%2EzZieoW) But first, I want to tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34552?refcode=em20230625-3312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3312%2E614464%2EzZieoW)
It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi.
It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us.
Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty.
For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely.
**Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country.**
When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there.
Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer.
So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger?
I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits.
Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war.
These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. **It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it.**
I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate.
**We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have.[If you’re with me, please add a donation of $10 or anything at all to my grassroots campaign today so we can hit our end-of-quarter goal, get this message in front of Missouri voters, and defeat Josh Hawley in 2024.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34552?refcode=em20230625-3312&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3312%2E614464%2EzZieoW)**

clean_body: And how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce. In a moment, I’m going to ask you to But first, I want to tell you about the burn pit I lived next to in Iraq — and how politicians like Josh Hawley failed veterans like me. It was 2009. I was stationed at the Al Taqaddum Airbase where I was a Marine Captain leading a police training team. Twelve Marines and a Navy Corpsman. Running missions through Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Ramadi. It was my first of three tours of duty during the War on Terror. And from our camp, the base’s burn pit loomed over us. Smoke columns filled the sky and blew through our living space. We ran through it, joking about how we should be doing gas mask runs. For three months that pit bathed us in toxic fumes. We accepted it and focused on our duty. For me, that was planning our routes and pouring over intel to avoid the immediate danger: IEDs on all the convoys and missions we were running outside the wire. I was so proud to bring every member of that team home safely. Or so I thought — because, as it turns out, we couldn’t protect ourselves from our own country. When I got back from Iraq, I developed a persistent tickle in my throat. Constant irritation. I never had allergies before and annoyed myself with the constant throat clearing. Eventually, I was so embarrassed by it that I went to the base clinic. They said it was postnasal drip and that they could give me allergy medicine. There was no formal diagnosis. But over 10 years later, it’s still there. Bothersome. Uncomfortable, but certainly manageable. And that’s about the best story you’ll hear about a vet who’s been exposed to burn pits. Many struggle with chronic respiratory issues. Migraines. Cancer. So imagine how we all felt, watching all these Republicans like Josh Hawley, most of whom have never even worn the uniform, throw us a giant middle finger? I know that’s harsh language, but it has to be. Because what they did was about as anti-American as it gets. Patriots don’t attack veterans who suffered injuries or illness from being around those toxic pits. Many of these same Republicans spent years voting to keep us in these forever wars, lying to the American people about what was really going on over there, and getting rich off their defense contractor stocks that skyrocket when we’re at war. These people profited off of sending us over there only to screw us when we came back messed up. It’s criminal — and I’m ready to do something about it. I served my country for 13 years in the United States Marine Corps. I’d give anything for this country — and that’s exactly why I’m running to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate. We deserve leaders who are willing to make even an ounce of the sacrifice our veterans have. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m proud to have you on this team, Peter. Thanks for being part of it, — Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

name: Zak Malamed
subject: The path to taking back the House runs right through New York
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZAK FOR CONGRESS
body:
Here is how you can help.
#
**Last year, Republicans reclaimed the House majority — but next year, we are going to take it back.**
I am going to break down how we plan to do that and why this hinges on winning races across New York, but **especially here in NY-03.**
[**Before I do that, I am going to ask you to chip in $5. We expect Republicans to spend millions to defend MAGA Republicans like George Santos and hold onto the House, so we need the resources to go toe-to-toe with them, flip this seat blue, and take back the House. So, can I count on your $5 now?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230625?amount=5&refcode=em20230625&refcode2=122_8507_S1uEQd&akid=122%2E8507%2ES1uEQd)
In 2022, New York saw an unprecedented number of House seats flip red — tipping the scales for Republicans to reclaim the House majority.
Since then, they have used their power to push an extreme, MAGA agenda through Congress that ignores the needs of everyday Americans and attempts to roll back any progress we have made over the last few years.
**The good news is** many of these same seats are considered toss-ups in 2024, including our district, NY-03. The way we move this seat from a toss-up to a victory for Democrats is by hitting the ground running.
For us, that means building our team, sharing my priorities with community members across the district, and ensuring voters know the truth about George Santos and the stakes of this race. That is why I have been showing up from Bayside, Queens to Bayville, Nassau County. To do that, we need the cash on hand to cover the costs of all these tools.
**Here is how you can help.** George Santos and MAGA Republicans have deep-pocketed donors they can lean on —**but we have you**. Our campaign is people-powered, which means every dollar donated has a huge impact.
[**So I am personally asking: will you chip in $5 to power our campaign, flip NY-03 blue, and help Democrats take back the House?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zm-email-20230625?amount=5&refcode=em20230625&refcode2=122_8507_S1uEQd&akid=122%2E8507%2ES1uEQd)

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Peter, you’ve been chosen to sponsor a Courier newsroom
body:
We’re left with a huge information gap that our local newsrooms across eight battleground states are working tirelessly to fill.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1146%2E120351%2ELUSLkq)
Peter — since Trump’s indictment was announced, the information crisis has taken on a life of its own.
On one hand, you have Trump’s right-wing cronies pushing his lies to tons of people. On the other, you have the mainstream media covering Trump’s every move, drowning out or completely ignoring essential local news stories.
In the end, we’re left with a **huge information gap** that our local newsrooms across eight battleground states are working tirelessly to fill.
To do that, we make our news stories freely available to anyone who needs them. But, in order to keep it that way, we have to fundraise to support the work of our journalists.
**In that spirit, we’re excited to announce our Sponsor a Newsroom Project.**
You’ve been selected to sponsor the local Courier newsroom in your home state! We’ve set a goal to raise $12,500 and reach readers across Pennsylvania. **Can your local Courier newsroom count on you to chip in $5 now and help them spread their stories to every corner of the state?** [**⇢ Yes, I’ll sponsor my local Courier newsroom with a contribution of $5 now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230625?refcode=em20230625&refcode2=1146_120351_LUSLkq&akid=1146%2E120351%2ELUSLkq) ****
---
Our Sponsor a Newsroom Project will be game-changing for our newsrooms and the communities they serve — especially as the presidential election takes off. Our news teams in states like Wisconsin and Virginia have already shown what a powerful role trustworthy local journalism can have in their recent state elections.
**The stakes will be even higher in November 2024.**
This plan only works though if we can raise enough money to help outfit our newsrooms with the staff, technology, and resources they need.****
[**Will you chip in $5 so we can hit our $12,500 fundraising goal today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230625?refcode=em20230625&refcode2=1146_120351_LUSLkq&akid=1146%2E120351%2ELUSLkq)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230625?refcode=em20230625&refcode2=1146_120351_LUSLkq&akid=1146%2E120351%2ELUSLkq)**
Thank you,
The Courier Newsroom Team

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: a personal note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[_**Peter, I want to take a minute to share a little bit of my personal story and explain why your support means so much to me. It would mean a lot if you would read until the end -- but if you’re short on time, can you chip in $15 before logging off? Even a small contribution on your part makes all the difference in the fight to take back our House Majority. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65376281/413262077/-1810142053?refcode=20230625_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2YxM2FmMy02ODEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDaBHifyeHcRqZdh9TYR0U93wIGiUg9pWGFUjkOrYWo=) | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65376285/413262079/-1810142053?refcode=20230625_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlY2YxM2FmMy02ODEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kDaBHifyeHcRqZdh9TYR0U93wIGiUg9pWGFUjkOrYWo=) _Rep. Krishnamoorthi and his parents_
---
Peter, I’ll be frank with you:
My childhood wasn’t always easy.
When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship.
My family relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough.
Now, Trump’s Republicans are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible.
So when I talk about taking back our Majority from Republicans, it isn’t just about politics.
It’s deeply personal.

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65376389/413262440/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230625_PM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjljODI2MTctNjkxMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tJbIUGMzr4uUyLkCcHDTVIqXzWR8BRu0_cMUYfRafdA=)
---
Peter, I was nervous heading into yesterday’s anniversary of the day _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned. I thought folks might have given up hope after a year without federal protections. I was worried it might not be a big deal to some. **Boy, was I wrong. ** I saw actions taking place all over the country. I saw emails from candidates and organizations flood my inbox, all aligned in the mission to restore reproductive rights. I saw a bunch of pissed off women, motivated as much as they were a year ago to _tear down the entire damn system._ So I just wanted to say thank you. Thank you for caring, and standing with us in this work. [_**And if you haven’t yet made a contribution to support our work for abortion rights, there couldn’t be a better time than right now:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65376390/413262441/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230625_PM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjljODI2MTctNjkxMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tJbIUGMzr4uUyLkCcHDTVIqXzWR8BRu0_cMUYfRafdA=) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65376391/413262442/-1638326769?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230625_PM1_T2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjljODI2MTctNjkxMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tJbIUGMzr4uUyLkCcHDTVIqXzWR8BRu0_cMUYfRafdA=)

name: Anthony Bellotti, White Coat Waste Project
subject: We’re suing Fauci’s NIH
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/71c0YGAvKDK1auxrUjiUdw)
---
Fellow American, Our exposé on Dr. Anthony Fauci's National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) funding of the Wuhan Lab's gain-of-function experiments - that many experts believe caused the COVID pandemic! - was heard around the world. Right now, we're investigating EVEN MORE cruel, wasteful, and dangerous testing that Fauci hid from the public ... but Fauci's NIAID has _refused_ to hand over documents in response to our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests. [**The White Coat Waste Project has filed two federal lawsuits to obtain internal records about Anthony Fauci's taxpayer-funded animal experiments. But we need your emergency support of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or more to help us continue fighting this lawsuit and uncover what Anthony Fauci is hiding.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/FU4JhwxKoI9OT_d6Jpij0g)
---
[Help us uncover what Fauci is hiding!](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/wZAS_xIVD9DxOfxVVq5L1w)
---
The White Coat Waste Project - which first broke the news to the Trump Administration in 2020 that taxpayer funds were going to the Wuhan Lab - has already exposed:
* how Fauci's minions funneled money to China,

* how Fauci's NIAID conducts and funds - with your taxpayer dollars - some of the most painful animal experiments in the entire federal government, and

* #BeagleGate - Fauci's deplorable "experiments" that wasted millions of taxpayer dollars by feeding beagle puppies to sand flies in Tunisia and even cutting out their vocal cords so they couldn't cry in the lab

**_...so can you imagine how bad the evidence may be that they won't hand it over?!_** Our new lawsuits seek to EXPOSE the FULL EXTENT of Fauci and NIAID's taxpayer spending on cruel, wasteful, and unnecessary experiments on beagles and other animals. [**Your gift of $25, $50, $75, or more today will support White Coat Waste's lawsuit against Fauci's NIAID and allow us to continue uncovering his lies - and let the world know the depth of his potentially horrific work.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/7xQ4os65u9VEtooIXQp93Q)
---
[Help us uncover what Fauci is hiding!](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/AtWeKDw5Utp_U4Kwhg9S_w)
---
At the White Coat Waste Project, we believe that taxpayers shouldn't be FORCED to pay $20+ BILLION every year for CRUEL experiments that harm animals, waste tax dollars, and cause lab leaks and pandemics. Taxpayers are F.E.D. up! That's why your support is urgently needed to help us:
* **FIND government waste**... We use the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) to make Fauci's "white coats" turn over the receipts. We sue when they refuse.

* **EXPOSE government waste** ... We launch explosive investigations to educate taxpayers. It's how the world first learned about Fauci's funding scandals.

* **DE-FUND government waste** ... We work with Members of Congress like Sen. Rand Paul to investigate the lab leak and #BeagleGate, and then cut the purse strings for NIH's wasteful spending at home ... _and_ abroad.

[**But our recent FOIA requests continue to be ignored by Fauci's NIAID, and we need your urgent gift to help White Coat Waste investigators use the full extent of the law to uncover the truth and hold the government accountable.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/Z7C1Xg_RvXzZOnNawjGQnw)
---
[Help us uncover what Fauci is hiding!](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/aRLHbcm-1XvSEforsvGjvA)
---
Thanks to the generous support of Americans like you, the White Coat Waste Project has been able to investigate and expose: ... How **_Fauci's emails show he was worried the Wuhan animal experiments may have caused the pandemic_** ... ... How Fauci's underlings **_avoided extra scrutiny_** and **_continued to spend tax dollars_** at the **_Wuhan Lab_** ,__ despite there being clear concerns about Wuhan engineering coronaviruses ... ... How the NIAID - under Dr. Fauci - commissioned at least **_EIGHT tests on dogs, including puppies_**. The NIH's deplorable experiments include de-barking puppies, infecting dogs with heart worm, feeding beagles to sand flies, and even injecting dogs with cocaine. **What we DON'T KNOW ... is what Fauci's NIAID is HIDING now!** [**With your support of $25, $50, $100, or more, we can continue our lawsuit and fight Fauci all the way to court if we have to. The TRUTH about the potential NIAID cover-ups must be revealed ... and with your help, White Coat Waste investigators will get to the bottom of it.**](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/r2BfA3G8O43SYZCo7ZI8Lg)
---
[Help us uncover what Fauci is hiding!](http://trk.libertyledger._c291cmNlX2NvZGU9TExPNDAzOTIifQ/N_omwBsm6eADDsyybIawAw)
---
Thank you for your support!
---
Anthony Bellotti President & Founder White Coat Waste Project

clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | Fellow American, Our exposé on Dr. Anthony Fauci's National Institute of Allergy and Infectious Diseases (NIAID) funding of the Wuhan Lab's gain-of-function experiments - that many experts believe caused the COVID pandemic! - was heard around the world. Right now, we're investigating EVEN MORE cruel, wasteful, and dangerous testing that Fauci hid from the public ... but Fauci's NIAID has refused to hand over documents in response to our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests. The White Coat Waste Project - which first broke the news to the Trump Administration in 2020 that taxpayer funds were going to the Wuhan Lab - has already exposed: how Fauci's minions funneled money to China, how Fauci's NIAID conducts and funds - with your taxpayer dollars - some of the most painful animal experiments in the entire federal government, and #BeagleGate - Fauci's deplorable "experiments" that wasted millions of taxpayer dollars by feeding beagle puppies to sand flies in Tunisia and even cutting out their vocal cords so they couldn't cry in the lab ...so can you imagine how bad the evidence may be that they won't hand it over?! Our new lawsuits seek to EXPOSE the FULL EXTENT of Fauci and NIAID's taxpayer spending on cruel, wasteful, and unnecessary experiments on beagles and other animals. At the White Coat Waste Project, we believe that taxpayers shouldn't be FORCED to pay $20+ BILLION every year for CRUEL experiments that harm animals, waste tax dollars, and cause lab leaks and pandemics. Taxpayers are F.E.D. up! That's why your support is urgently needed to help us: FIND government waste... We use the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) to make Fauci's "white coats" turn over the receipts. We sue when they refuse. EXPOSE government waste ... We launch explosive investigations to educate taxpayers. It's how the world first learned about Fauci's funding scandals. DE-FUND government waste ... We work with Members of Congress like Sen. Rand Paul to investigate the lab leak and #BeagleGate, and then cut the purse strings for NIH's wasteful spending at home ... and abroad. Thanks to the generous support of Americans like you, the White Coat Waste Project has been able to investigate and expose: ... How Fauci's emails show he was worried the Wuhan animal experiments may have caused the pandemic ... ... How Fauci's underlings avoided extra scrutiny and continued to spend tax dollars at the Wuhan Lab , despite there being clear concerns about Wuhan engineering coronaviruses ... ... How the NIAID - under Dr. Fauci - commissioned at least EIGHT tests on dogs, including puppies. The NIH's deplorable experiments include de-barking puppies, infecting dogs with heart worm, feeding beagles to sand flies, and even injecting dogs with cocaine. What we DON'T KNOW ... is what Fauci's NIAID is HIDING now! Thank you for your support! Anthony Bellotti President & Founder White Coat Waste Project PO. Box 26029, Washington, DC 20001 Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

body:

This CAN’T be right, so we’re urgently reaching out to 10,000 top Democrats to confirm your opinion on Trump. name: SherrodBrown.com
subject: we're going to need your help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
| | |
---
Friend – you might find this hard to believe when you think about the _tens of millions_ of dollars _ _ that GOP super PACs are set to spend to defeat us, **but the average grassroots donation to our campaign is just $26.**
We're mighty proud of that fact – and of the grassroots movement that we're building together. It's made up of folks like you who believe in our fight and chip in what you can, when you can.

This grassroots movement is how we're going to win a race that _NBC News_ says will be "one of the nastiest and most expensive in the country" and defend our razor-thin Senate majority.
**But here's the problem:**_The Cook Political Report_ is calling our race a toss-up – and experts at _FiveThirtyEight_ say Ohio could decide Senate control. We simply cannot surge ahead and win without ALL hands on deck.
**Now, we're coming up on a critical fundraising deadline, but we're still falling short of our $25,000 goal. If everyone reading this chipped in $26, we could reach our goal in no time – but we know not everyone will, so we're asking you, friend.**

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Five abortion gaps we need to fill
body:
What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| [ ](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc2K3DAQhJ9GvtlYalmeOfiwYOa2IYSFHEVbanvE6g9Jk7x-cGYCOe61-qPoj_r5rt_ReRePbxhoaaXpUnVEXTfsd_eL-nZ38ahajAL6UfVi0tDZRc7Cgupo4eoyz_wKauruy2x3bnBDKZXkREJeJ3kBnKy6Xi_Sjp1bzp5RiYlPfIZ5QDDC7ruauFCA1jA5oqfS6tDuVCg_Nu8MxkYYBpNC55d7a7kyeGPixsQNTXMpDnXDXJJ3Ow2pHEzc_nu9py2lTwa3RwvaYMjojshgPRH9snsiQp1ITY9iiMGaS6qZTHPxeJ0CWfcIDFYK6PwrNCk2io3B-v2t__jx0f9TZEJhzoReO8tg5SO_MKEymk886JkJUGrqymLzb-e9q2pmcjzO8r-27YuD_AkAAP__IxCTcw)

#
Friend,

What Big Abortion won't tell Americans will kill precious children.

Knowledge gaps. Lies. Distortion. Shoddy reporting. These kill unborn babies. But until the deception is exposed the killing won't stop.

That's why I invite you to learn the truth in our eye-opening new ebook [_**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc2K3DAQhJ9GvtlYalmeOfiwYOa2IYSFHEVbanvE6g9Jk7x-cGYCOe61-qPoj_r5rt_ReRePbxhoaaXpUnVEXTfsd_eL-nZ38ahajAL6UfVi0tDZRc7Cgupo4eoyz_wKauruy2x3bnBDKZXkREJeJ3kBnKy6Xi_Sjp1bzp5RiYlPfIZ5QDDC7ruauFCA1jA5oqfS6tDuVCg_Nu8MxkYYBpNC55d7a7kyeGPixsQNTXMpDnXDXJJ3Ow2pHEzc_nu9py2lTwa3RwvaYMjojshgPRH9snsiQp1ITY9iiMGaS6qZTHPxeJ0CWfcIDFYK6PwrNCk2io3B-v2t__jx0f9TZEJhzoReO8tg5SO_MKEymk886JkJUGrqymLzb-e9q2pmcjzO8r-27YuD_AkAAP__IxCTcw)

This brief, hard-hitting, fact-filled ebook is free. I urge you--as a pro-life American--to download it now and get the truth.

Scholars from SBA Pro-Life America's research arm the Charlotte Lozier Institute to reveal FIVE FACTS about abortion. **[These realities are currently being concealed or ignored](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc2K3DAQhJ9GvtlYalmeOfiwYOa2IYSFHEVbanvE6g9Jk7x-cGYCOe61-qPoj_r5rt_ReRePbxhoaaXpUnVEXTfsd_eL-nZ38ahajAL6UfVi0tDZRc7Cgupo4eoyz_wKauruy2x3bnBDKZXkREJeJ3kBnKy6Xi_Sjp1bzp5RiYlPfIZ5QDDC7ruauFCA1jA5oqfS6tDuVCg_Nu8MxkYYBpNC55d7a7kyeGPixsQNTXMpDnXDXJJ3Ow2pHEzc_nu9py2lTwa3RwvaYMjojshgPRH9snsiQp1ITY9iiMGaS6qZTHPxeJ0CWfcIDFYK6PwrNCk2io3B-v2t__jx0f9TZEJhzoReO8tg5SO_MKEymk886JkJUGrqymLzb-e9q2pmcjzO8r-27YuD_AkAAP__IxCTcw)** by government agencies and the industry of Big Abortion.

That's why we're blowing the whistle--and letting you in on it. We're telling allies in federal and state governments, the media, and the American people because everyone deserves to know the truth. The truths revealed in this ebook can set women free and save unborn babies.

I'm thrilled to send you the new eBook _**Five Things the Public Doesn 't Know About Abortion.**_ You can start reading your eBook by clicking this link:

**[https://action.sbaprolife.org/five-things-ebook](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkc2K3DAQhJ9GvtlYalmeOfiwYOa2IYSFHEVbanvE6g9Jk7x-cGYCOe61-qPoj_r5rt_ReRePbxhoaaXpUnVEXTfsd_eL-nZ38ahajAL6UfVi0tDZRc7Cgupo4eoyz_wKauruy2x3bnBDKZXkREJeJ3kBnKy6Xi_Sjp1bzp5RiYlPfIZ5QDDC7ruauFCA1jA5oqfS6tDuVCg_Nu8MxkYYBpNC55d7a7kyeGPixsQNTXMpDnXDXJJ3Ow2pHEzc_nu9py2lTwa3RwvaYMjojshgPRH9snsiQp1ITY9iiMGaS6qZTHPxeJ0CWfcIDFYK6PwrNCk2io3B-v2t__jx0f9TZEJhzoReO8tg5SO_MKEymk886JkJUGrqymLzb-e9q2pmcjzO8r-27YuD_AkAAP__IxCTcw)**

Thank you for your support. You are helping save lives and redeem the future of America.

For _LIFE_ ,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America, 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr., PO Box 803, Arlington, VA, 22206

The Republican Team
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: GIFFORDS
subject: One year ago
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This legislation was an important step forward for our movement. Now we must do more.
#

Friends -
One year ago today, President Biden signed the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ into law. This was the most significant gun safety legislation enacted in nearly 30 years.
[**In honor of one year since the passage of this historic legislation, we’re asking if you can chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC to help fuel our ongoing fight towards a future free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230625-1-15&t=1&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY)
**[DONATE TO GIFFORDS](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230625-1-15&t=2&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY)**
The _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ strengthens background checks for young people, allocates significant funding for community violence intervention programs, narrows the “boyfriend loophole” to reduce intimate partner violence, makes gun trafficking and straw purchasing federal crimes, creates grants for states to implement extreme risk laws, and provides funding for better mental health services.
This was a moment that advocates and survivors worked towards tirelessly for years. We are so proud to have played a key part in getting this legislation passed. And of course, we could only have done our work to help get this legislation over the finish line with the support of people like you—our supporters who have donated, called, and volunteered with us over the past decade since our founding.
Thank you.
This legislation is an important first step towards a future free from gun violence in our nation, but the work is far from done. More than 40,000 Americans die from gun violence each year, and gun violence is the number one cause of death for children in our nation. This is unacceptable, and we must do better.
A key way we can save more lives is by passing universal background checks at the federal level--a measure that more than 90% of Americans support and one that we have been fighting for since our founding ten years ago. Background checks on the sale of all guns will save countless lives. It’s up to our elected officials to make this happen--and we can’t wait another ten years.
With the passage of the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ last year, we saw that when we use our collective voice, change **_can**_ happen. So now, we must keep moving forward together to ensure this landmark law is properly implemented nationwide, and to keep fighting for more commonsense gun safety measures like universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders, and more.
[**If you’re with us in this fight, please chip in to GIFFORDS PAC today as we commemorate one year since the passage of the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230625-1-15&t=3&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jun23.jpif6I&amount=3&t=22&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dkim3-&refcode=em230625-1-15&t=23&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jun23.PeWyti&refcode=em230625-1-15&t=24&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jun23.IMSWLY&refcode=em230625-1-15&t=25&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY)**

| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jun23.LOY28E&refcode=em230625-1-15&t=26&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY)**

****
Thank you. We’re so grateful that you’re with us in this movement.
Sincerely,
The team at GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=6031%2E3935704%2EA5d2dY) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Kirsten Gillibrand via Blue Amp Action
subject: Mitch McConnell has a “clear path” to retaking Senate control in 2024.
body:
Democrats are defending 23 seats next year
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T21609dce-7b88-421f-9ec7-c449431b4509/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | It’s Cliff, here. I wanted to make sure you heard that pro-choice champion, Kirsten Gillibrand, is running for reelection. Her message is below: Peter, it’s been a year since the conservative majority on the Supreme Court ruled to officially overturn Roe v. Wade. In the year since then, we’ve watched state after state pass increasingly extreme abortion bans. Now, the future of our reproductive rights will be on the ballot again in 2024 – and the odds are stacked against us. Democrats are defending 23 Senate seats. Republicans only have to defend 10. That means they’ll have more resources to go on the offensive and target incumbents like me. And election experts at FiveThirtyEight are already saying that Mitch McConnell has a “clear path” to retaking Senate control in 2024. Protecting our pro-choice majority has never been more important – and to do that we have to win every single seat up for election. The only way to do that is with early, strong investments in Democrats. [So please, Peter, will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us hit our $25,000 fundraising goal? We’re not backing down in this fight, but we need you by our side.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf2b9291-cfed-48ac-a14b-e876dc4130db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Kirsten
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb4b585ea-e5b1-4b37-b41b-0bac83f545da/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Kamala Harris
subject: The great aspiration of our nation has been to expand freedom:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We must now come together to show what kind of country we want to live in and reject the notion that our rights are up for debate. | | |
---
Peter, For nearly 50 years, Americans relied on the rights that _Roe v. Wade_ protected -- the fundamental constitutional right of all people to make decisions about their own bodies. **Today, however, we speak of the _Roe_ decision in the past tense -- because one year ago, the United States Supreme Court took away that fundamental right from the people of America. ** The great aspiration of our nation has been to expand freedom, but the expansion of freedom is not inevitable, Peter. It is not something that just happens -- not unless we defend our most fundamental principles. **The strength of our nation has always been that we move forward. We must now come together to show what kind of country we want to live in and reject the notion that our rights are up for debate. So I’m asking:** **[Can I count on you to make a $25 donation to Joe’s and my reelection campaign today? Together, we will build on the progress we’ve made and keep moving our country forward.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zqTn1nB5X1rOxL7-i3KQqZ_wCAa2XScN-OPPqXwNKoi-UWWn2ZmG3x-kXUtrnhbeFWtllBePUwyicLWB0IhVckIInNr-siaWn8ld7TNerSSqSBEqVqDJ2YX3KXMtRmz3Hamzyb-ZEIfzmx1OkXujomXAyXew5fYvTjMvYPG7akG_AmOVWLaNHZHAC0z9Xpi4QDVKheZc3pNCXlsp56_hwFOGGvBj4D1tmSnHPOmSRBBEWfohMyB1JTs7zmpQAbxlRLBtwj2U-fXWWRSW2_OKCtR6-cZ-HE8B_OAzQe3TkFZTuv8CYzB548NSs_4n-y8aOCUtv9BuWDBd1TDWdxYC9WTUSQuhbJiFYNzlhUGpyJcIA4NJge3gsJTxB2AI_Vj6s2IfyaMIvFGf8NtFZhVL8D0jeUNDTQuWQ4lEtM8T3JVh8bUUU0fvD_6Dic5ly5djmSTNoKDyyo5g9jcT25gdL8/3xc/UGN_F8K8Q8SHNvGlxMS9gA/h0/y_YpVda3rW6elR-AAbO9yFegl-4vzXwd-7IAkeg_fx0) **

Since our founding, we have been on a march forward to fully realize our promise to complete the unfinished work of securing freedom and liberty for all.
But these outcomes will not just happen. It takes steadfast determination and dedication. The kind of determination and dedication possessed by some of our greatest patriots: Those Americans who fought a Civil War to end the sin of slavery, who organized at Seneca Falls to secure a woman’s right to vote, who launched the Freedom Rides to advance civil rights; and who spoke out at the Stonewall Inn to defend human rights.
**America is a promise. A promise we must all make real in every state and every community, in every state house, in every doctor’s office, and in every election.**

clean_body: We must now come together to show what kind of country we want to live in and reject the notion that our rights are up for debate. | | | Peter, For nearly 50 years, Americans relied on the rights that Roe v. Wade protected -- the fundamental constitutional right of all people to make decisions about their own bodies. Today, however, we speak of the Roe decision in the past tense -- because one year ago, the United States Supreme Court took away that fundamental right from the people of America. The great aspiration of our nation has been to expand freedom, but the expansion of freedom is not inevitable, Peter. It is not something that just happens -- not unless we defend our most fundamental principles. The strength of our nation has always been that we move forward. We must now come together to show what kind of country we want to live in and reject the notion that our rights are up for debate. So I’m asking: | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Since our founding, we have been on a march forward to fully realize our promise to complete the unfinished work of securing freedom and liberty for all. But these outcomes will not just happen. It takes steadfast determination and dedication. The kind of determination and dedication possessed by some of our greatest patriots: Those Americans who fought a Civil War to end the sin of slavery, who organized at Seneca Falls to secure a woman’s right to vote, who launched the Freedom Rides to advance civil rights; and who spoke out at the Stonewall Inn to defend human rights. America is a promise. A promise we must all make real in every state and every community, in every state house, in every doctor’s office, and in every election. name: Mandela Barnes
subject: I need to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
#
$5.
That's the contribution I am asking you to make to The Long Run today. Let me quickly explain why:
At the end of this month, we face our first FEC deadline since our launch — our biggest challenge to date — when we will be _legally required_ to report our fundraising data from the past four months.
I can't emphasize enough how important this deadline is to our movement.
The press, political pundits, and ring-wing super PACs will be watching to see just how many supporters we have and how much we can raise. Why? Because those results will directly reflect how many critical races we can continue to impact in 2024 and how many Republicans we can unseat.
Being less than a week away from our deadline, it's so important that we stay on track to hit our goals so our fundraising data reflects the strength of this grassroots initiative on the 30th.
I am hoping I can count on you so I need to ask:
[**Can you please make a $5 contribution to support The Long Run and help us stay on track to hit our FEC deadline goal? Every donation will help us continue to shift the needle in critical races across the country.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jun23.F10pcU&refcode=em230625-1-t45&t=1&akid=4575%2E196590%2EZkeGj6)

clean_body: $5. That's the contribution I am asking you to make to The Long Run today. Let me quickly explain why: At the end of this month, we face our first FEC deadline since our launch — our biggest challenge to date — when we will be legally required to report our fundraising data from the past four months. I can't emphasize enough how important this deadline is to our movement. The press, political pundits, and ring-wing super PACs will be watching to see just how many supporters we have and how much we can raise. Why? Because those results will directly reflect how many critical races we can continue to impact in 2024 and how many Republicans we can unseat. Being less than a week away from our deadline, it's so important that we stay on track to hit our goals so our fundraising data reflects the strength of this grassroots initiative on the 30th. I am hoping I can count on you so I need to ask: If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: My team and I are very grateful to have you by our side. Thank you for chipping in today, if you can afford it. Mandela Barnes

Friend, Back when I ran for governor in 2018, I secured a narrow victory of 32,000 votes out of more than 8 million cast. Four years later, I won my re-election for governor of the state of Florida by over 1.5 million votes--the most votes a Republican governor candidate had ever gotten. This demonstrated that conservative policies enacted authentically are the key to victory. _**We won independent voters by 18 percentage points and more than 60 percent of Hispanic voters.**_ Friend, that is drawing converts. That is bringing people to your platform. That is attracting the voters that are necessary for achieving our Great American Comeback. Ultimately, this is a team effort, and we are coming together on our common positions. America knows that this is a tipping point, and we have to get ahead. It's time we mobilize. We must sustain the momentum we garnered in our earliest states, and that begins and ends with your support. _**[If you can afford it, will you chip in any amount to my campaign today? | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---

The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:
Putting forward a strong quarterly report is an important part of our strategy in the off-year.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65378710/413271002/-954707654?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.25_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTliM2M3YS02ZjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Im7HnzgKUevpNhibCa2C6tyuRGpYyApgrWRy5Kk8CE=) Hey Derek,

We usually don’t like to bother you on a Sunday, _but this is a make or break week for our campaign._

This Friday is a crucial deadline: **After June 30th, we publicly report our quarterly fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission, and everyone from the radical right to dark-money outside groups will look through our report for signs of weakness.**

This is our first quarterly deadline since the GOP has started spending money in PA-17, so it’s critical that we put forward the strongest showing possible. [**Right now, we’re $15,000 short of where we should be for June, and we need to close that gap if we want any chance of ending the quarter in a strong place. Derek, can you chip in to our campaign before time runs out to keep us running strong?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65378711/413271003/-954707654?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.25_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTliM2M3YS02ZjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Im7HnzgKUevpNhibCa2C6tyuRGpYyApgrWRy5Kk8CE=) | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Putting forward a strong quarterly report is an important part of our strategy in the off-year. Republicans will be watching us closely to see if we are building a campaign that’s ready to win, _and we can’t do that without your support, Derek._

[**It’s going to take all of us to close this $15,000 gap, but we know that when working folks come together, anything is possible. Is there anything you can chip in today to help us reach our goal by midnight on Friday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65378718/413271010/-954707654?refcode=em_fr_2023.06.25_b1_td_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTliM2M3YS02ZjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Im7HnzgKUevpNhibCa2C6tyuRGpYyApgrWRy5Kk8CE=)

Thank you,

Team Deluzio

| Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran representing Pennsylvania's 17th District in Congress. name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Ensuring dignity in retirement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
Earlier this month, I cosponsored the reintroduction of the Social Security 2100 Act | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65378868/413271651/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzlhNjI1Yi03MDEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmRT5JPG5szn-YZukWROP6FuNnJEdJ1Z5YF_EoD-7So=&emci=1a555922-ec11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=839a625b-7013-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Earlier this month, I cosponsored the reintroduction of the Social Security 2100 Act, which would increase social security benefits for the first time in over 50 years to ensure these benefits keep pace with rising inflation. Across the country, many seniors are struggling to keep up with inflation, rising rents, and other housing costs. This plan seeks to alleviate this struggle while also supporting children and expanding a disability program that more veterans rely on than even the VA. | [Support My Re-Election](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65378869/413271652/-1389685386?refcode=E3111-20230625-SocialSecurity-SB-SocialSecurity&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzlhNjI1Yi03MDEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmRT5JPG5szn-YZukWROP6FuNnJEdJ1Z5YF_EoD-7So=)
---
This is common-sense legislation; however, I am afraid that the hard-right fringe of the Republican Party will kill this legislation. After they shut down votes in protest of the bipartisan debt ceiling deal, I worry that the dysfunction in the Republican Party will stop us from showing up for our most vulnerable constituents.
If we want to pass more anti-poverty legislation and strengthen the social safety net, we need to take back the House in 2024. As a Frontline Democrat, I am one of just a few facing the biggest attacks from Republicans in Washington.
[**Help me keep this competitive seat blue and keep fighting for our seniors, disabled individuals, and our future by chipping in $20 or more to my critical re-election campaign fund!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65378871/413271653/-1389685386?refcode=E3111-20230625-SocialSecurity-SL-SocialSecurity&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzlhNjI1Yi03MDEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zmRT5JPG5szn-YZukWROP6FuNnJEdJ1Z5YF_EoD-7So=)

clean_body: Earlier this month, I cosponsored the reintroduction of the Social Security 2100 Act | | Earlier this month, I cosponsored the reintroduction of the Social Security 2100 Act, which would increase social security benefits for the first time in over 50 years to ensure these benefits keep pace with rising inflation. Across the country, many seniors are struggling to keep up with inflation, rising rents, and other housing costs. This plan seeks to alleviate this struggle while also supporting children and expanding a disability program that more veterans rely on than even the VA. | = This is common-sense legislation; however, I am afraid that the hard-right fringe of the Republican Party will kill this legislation. After they shut down votes in protest of the bipartisan debt ceiling deal, I worry that the dysfunction in the Republican Party will stop us from showing up for our most vulnerable constituents. If we want to pass more anti-poverty legislation and strengthen the social safety net, we need to take back the House in 2024. As a Frontline Democrat, I am one of just a few facing the biggest attacks from Republicans in Washington. = = – Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Friend, Rep. Cori Bush has spoken out for Palestinian rights even when it makes her a target. **In Congress, she’s led efforts to stop Israel’s forced displacement of Palestinians, and she’s unafraid to name what’s happening as apartheid.** I’m honored to work alongside Cori in Congress to expand human rights, to end mass incarceration and fight for true public safety, and to build a world that truly values people’s humanity and well-being. \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Jun 24, 2023
Subject: Let’s support Rep. Cori Bush as she advocates for Palestinian rights
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
My sister in service Rep. Cori Bush has been a fierce advocate for Palestinian rights in Congress, helping to grow the momentum to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses.
Cori first saw the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence in 2014, when she met with a Palestinian delegation who visited Ferguson Uprising activists to share tips on how to defend themselves from tear gas.
**Since then, she has been unafraid to speak the truth about Israel’s apartheid against Palestinians—even when it makes her a target.**
[**Please split a donation today between my campaign and Cori Bush’s campaign, to show her you have her back as she advocates for human rights in the U.S. and Palestine.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKcT6GzsVXTkTNNEfjTunO70sqemg3ruQN4WWxD_oUA4CtvIS43HUzQtnS2DUppKXqA1tr5cMxo-74If7euWVx4vZpFp7gkwW6vSaAwHGB8YMVp7wEsbv3M37pqpmUA4TIU9xikIRfQfAp-rR-Ccd27B03qmV5Rt4ZG0t7bqD_GxRpaE2Mk7l4LnuSjRTW1qaVRJ5WFCxVYJvCGilZNzg-IvEsAt6IiWr2OrsA4UA1wAdtqreL0v3P9gpLX5tM1b-2THzk1YOCv2jgPuLAsDWfsKRYqB__FAbfHGyxNkjw1dDpIWSGfH4PZAs9GafEd_u8B977O_EkS2DhTOi1IViYhhelNaIYnA7eaUbAR9qkwq0tfReVuizxHWepPw8IkuO-XSAy86sQC8QLqBt5QxlKZg/3xc/xdVjB7vkSzegXBpux4aVqg/h8/9UeY-H8muwSGbmEveA4YsLK32D5I51lx0hS-Cz-Ex0M)
[DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKcT6GzsVXTkTNNEfjTunO79JXOvUuB6yjsESSWBidcDqBJh7BelI_cOkhoeopVcfTK-62ReLHJBwYBy1DlBpfUrz79aa3dFWlxASMnhf2J9zl1PmzrqF2-7SKI8m3qqruiCzrl6i3x-FAFLxgqC3ckHwWu6aWSfUariKKodoOhfbyvBs5ZMh98S4xSzfU63cc9Vv5EToVX_2HU1xjANhoTR_Pf6L2-cpMLHlFD2We7btRbnBLPocy8mjL6eXaJiTe7An-63TsXzUxtfs6QOvaywiVWQ8fYWeQ2cA13C5Qn62QHLKvJkmLIjo5anlp5LG81vWSUKq-ILimRQuTLrnveltAdKR3beVrmTBN5hadmsDenM7nptbXks-PZOUeKbVALy8eL3vP75dNmNj4bxqtFg/3xc/xdVjB7vkSzegXBpux4aVqg/h9/-EYZNsie9Jcom36u5vTLv24RJD0RltwyEN_Rlsyep88)
---
Like me, Cori Bush got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office.
As an activist in the movement for Black lives, Cori personally experienced brutal police violence and ongoing harassment by police. I’ve also witnessed and spoken out against violent police attacks on Black Lives Matter protesters in my district.
Unless we change the unjust status quo, my Black neighbors and my Palestinian family members will continue to face systemic racism and dehumanization.
**In Congress, Cori and I have advocated against ever-growing spending on police and military budgets, all while our communities are struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.**
Instead of investing in institutions that harm and kill people, we’re calling for investments in communities, to ensure that everyone can thrive. I’m honored to work alongside Cori in Congress for Black and Palestinian liberation, and to build a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being.

clean_body: Like me, Cori got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office. | | | Friend, Rep. Cori Bush has spoken out for Palestinian rights even when it makes her a target. In Congress, she’s led efforts to stop Israel’s forced displacement of Palestinians, and she’s unafraid to name what’s happening as apartheid. I’m honored to work alongside Cori in Congress to expand human rights, to end mass incarceration and fight for true public safety, and to build a world that truly values people’s humanity and well-being. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush | | | | | | | | | | Thank you. If you’d like, you can read more from yesterday’s email about some of the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Jun 24, 2023 Subject: Let’s support Rep. Cori Bush as she advocates for Palestinian rights To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, My sister in service Rep. Cori Bush has been a fierce advocate for Palestinian rights in Congress, helping to grow the momentum to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses. Cori first saw the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence in 2014, when she met with a Palestinian delegation who visited Ferguson Uprising activists to share tips on how to defend themselves from tear gas. Since then, she has been unafraid to speak the truth about Israel’s apartheid against Palestinians—even when it makes her a target. Like me, Cori Bush got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office. As an activist in the movement for Black lives, Cori personally experienced brutal police violence and ongoing harassment by police. I’ve also witnessed and spoken out against violent police attacks on Black Lives Matter protesters in my district. Unless we change the unjust status quo, my Black neighbors and my Palestinian family members will continue to face systemic racism and dehumanization. In Congress, Cori and I have advocated against ever-growing spending on police and military budgets, all while our communities are struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. Instead of investing in institutions that harm and kill people, we’re calling for investments in communities, to ensure that everyone can thrive. I’m honored to work alongside Cori in Congress for Black and Palestinian liberation, and to build a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Cori Bush | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Dr. Brian Williams
subject: Celebrating one year of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for By Dr. Brian Williams for Congress
body:
We all deserve communities where we can thrive

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65379486/413274397/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230625SaferCommunities_DBW_7_Actives_logo&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkYmE2YzAtNzExMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2lawspDZltm3V6k-YVh8firt5-rw3oMfcTMyda7V1SU=)
Peter,

I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished over the course of my career as a trauma surgeon, but one year ago today was one of the proudest moments of my life. On June 25, 2022, President Joe Biden signed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, the most significant gun safety legislation passed in nearly three decades.

Peter, as a trauma surgeon, I’ve treated too many victims of gun violence with the knowledge that soon after I repaired their wounds, they would head back into a world of gun violence. Federal action to promote gun safety was a victory I had worked hard to achieve. Along with a coalition of legislators on both sides of the aisle, I contributed to the bill and witnessed firsthand how meaningful, comprehensive change is possible when our leaders put people over politics and take bold action.

My time on Capitol Hill was transformative. The experience of generating a policy idea, meeting with constituents, prepping for hearings, and drafting a bill changed how I view the legislative process. I knew then that creating policies to create life-saving change was my next call to service.

I know what it takes to craft and pass critical legislation that will help solve the issues our country is facing – because I’ve done so. I’m ready to continue this work in Congress for TX-32, but I can’t get there without your help.

[Will you help me fight for life-saving measures like the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act in Congress by supporting my campaign with $32, $50, or whatever you can give today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65379489/413274433/1633369994?refcode=EM_FR_230625SaferCommunities_DBW_7_Actives_l1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDU5MjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODFkYmE2YzAtNzExMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2lawspDZltm3V6k-YVh8firt5-rw3oMfcTMyda7V1SU=)

clean_body: We all deserve communities where we can thrive = Peter, I’m proud of what I’ve accomplished over the course of my career as a trauma surgeon, but one year ago today was one of the proudest moments of my life. On June 25, 2022, President Joe Biden signed the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, the most significant gun safety legislation passed in nearly three decades. Peter, as a trauma surgeon, I’ve treated too many victims of gun violence with the knowledge that soon after I repaired their wounds, they would head back into a world of gun violence. Federal action to promote gun safety was a victory I had worked hard to achieve. Along with a coalition of legislators on both sides of the aisle, I contributed to the bill and witnessed firsthand how meaningful, comprehensive change is possible when our leaders put people over politics and take bold action. My time on Capitol Hill was transformative. The experience of generating a policy idea, meeting with constituents, prepping for hearings, and drafting a bill changed how I view the legislative process. I knew then that creating policies to create life-saving change was my next call to service. I know what it takes to craft and pass critical legislation that will help solve the issues our country is facing – because I’ve done so. I’m ready to continue this work in Congress for TX-32, but I can’t get there without your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | = = = = = Onward, = Brian Dr. Brian Williams is an Air Force Academy graduate, a Harvard-trained surgeon, a former congressional health policy advisor, and a nationally recognized leader at the intersection of public policy and structural racism, gun violence, and health equity. Dr. Williams is ready to bring his years of experience to Congress to fix our broken systems and save lives.
