name: Jirair Ratevosian, Candidate for Congress
subject: Peter, I'm running for Congress, can I count on your support?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jirair Ratevosian For Congress 321 N
body:
| Hello Peter! Emails are our best tool to keep in touch with supporters, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [click here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/3mDMZSwfK0W09bp9_AYgkw2). If you no longer want to receive emails from us, please .
---
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ratevosian_hf?refcode=header-img)
[**Peter, thank you for signing up to get involved in my campaign — can I count on your support by chipping in just $50 today? I'll explain why it's so important in a second >>**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ratevosian_q22023_df?amount=50) | [CHIP IN $50 TO SEND JIRAIR TO CONGRESS »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ratevosian_q22023_df?amount=50)
---
Let me tell you a little bit about my campaign:

I'm a proud Armenian American, born and raised in Los Angeles. I'm the son of Armenian and Lebanese immigrants. My community is everything to me.

An experienced leader, public health expert and progressive voice for change, I have dedicated my life to helping others and spent my career bringing underrepresented communities together to solve big challenges.

I was appointed by President Biden as the most senior Armenian American official at the State Department; served as legislative director to Congresswoman Barbara Lee; was a grassroots community organizer and activist; and worked in the private sector. I already know what the job entails and the hard work it takes to bring communities together to fight for change.

I'm running for Congress because my grandfather's American dream is far from reach for many. This election, there is so much at stake to ensure everyone has a fair shot to chase their own dream.
[CHIP IN $50 TO SEND JIRAIR TO CONGRESS »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ratevosian_q22023_df?amount=50)
---
This campaign will be a long road — a crowded primary and some of my opponents think they can just buy this seat. I'm running to earn the vote of every voter in our district — but that's going to take time and money.

[**That's why I have to ask: will you give just $50 or $100 to help launch my campaign and meet my week one goal of $20,000? Every dollar helps in a race like this.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ratevosian_q22023_df?amount=50)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Last week, I went on CNN to discuss our former President’s disregard for our nation’s secrets and the grave risk his actions pose to our national security.

The former President’s actions further cement my resolve as a member of the House Intelligence Committee to defend confidential information and protect our servicemembers.

If you support my work, I hope you’ll consider contributing to my campaign today. Peter,

Before I launched my last campaign, I made a personal commitment to prioritize the needs of folks in Illinois’ 17th Congressional District and to hear them out directly. Today, almost six months into my first term in office, I’m doubling down on that commitment.

I know I can’t meet everyone personally, but I still want to make sure to hear from as many supporters as possible. That’s why today, I’m asking you to fill out our priorities survey to let me know your thoughts heading into the 2024 election.

**Supporters on the ground can provide us with vital insights to win again and govern effectively for the people of IL-17.**

**[So, if you have a minute or two to spare, please use this link to take our survey and tell us your priorities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65380755/413278924/-1388440502?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGM1ZTE3Ny03NTEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G2i-6XNdoi2m8V54ugSf-FwOg7Vsai8nVs5Fv5HRQYE=&emci=5ec5e177-7513-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=68c5e177-7513-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=18052858)**

Needless to say, we have an important and competitive election ahead of us, both in this district and nationally. Both chambers of Congress and the White House are on the line. We must defend this seat for Democrats to retake the House in 2024.

What you share with us will inform our decisions throughout our campaign. We're hoping to get lots of responses because the more people that weigh in, the better we can understand what's on people’s minds across IL-17 and America.

I’m looking forward to hearing from you,

Eric

Both chambers of Congress and the White House are on the line. We must defend this seat for Democrats to retake the House in 2024. What you share with us will inform our decisions throughout our campaign. We're hoping to get lots of responses because the more people that weigh in, the better we can understand what's on people’s minds across IL-17 and America. I’m looking forward to hearing from you, Eric | Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. To support Eric, = To volunteer on Eric's campaign, We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Eric Sorensen Eric Sorensen for Illinois P.O. Box 1172 Moline, IL 61265 United States

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: it’s imperative that we show strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
In just a few days, campaigns like mine and Fight For Progress will be hustling to close fundraising gaps for our end-of-quarter deadline.

| May I have just a second of your time, Peter?

In just a few days, campaigns like mine and Fight For Progress will be hustling to close fundraising gaps for our end-of-quarter deadline.

**This is a big deal for my Senate campaign – it’s the FIRST public number we’ll report since we launched a few short days ago.**

I’d be the first Black person elected to the Senate from Delaware. Pundits understand that our race is historic and they’ll use our fundraising number as a bellwether of our viability. With experts predicting a tough cycle for Democrats, it’s _imperative_ that we show strength at every single deadline. This is especially true for a historic campaign like ours.

**Here’s why I’m reaching out:[_we pulled the numbers and to be blunt, we are a bit behind. We can close the gap, but I do need to ask you to split $5 today between my campaign and Fight for Progress, before this hole gets worse. Can I count on your help?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65380866/413279512/-61633414?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230625-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxNTI1OTg1LTc1MTMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4NaN3vF6v6ECwrqL03Tjew0cPxGX4uXiIAEsBe_r3c=)**

name: Katie Porter
subject: Reclaiming your time—why I’m running
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
In the interest of reclaiming YOUR time, here’s just a few answers about why I’m in this race and why I hope to earn your support:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=25430%2E3422442%2EkkVl-n)
If you’ve ever watched a Congressional Hearing, you know I’m often saying "reclaiming my time" as witnesses try to avoid answering questions about how they’ve taken advantage of taxpayers, shortchanged employees, or lied to Americans.
I get a lot of fundraising emails from different candidates, and I know they don’t always answer a fundamental question: _Why are you running?_ So in the interest of reclaiming YOUR time, here are just a few answers about why I’m in this race and why I hope to earn your support:
**Q: Why are you running for the Senate?** A: I’m running because our country isn’t working for the majority of working people. For too long, politicians funded by big corporate interests have rigged the rules against families, making it difficult to get ahead. I’m not afraid to stand up to leaders of both parties to get things done.
---
**Q: Why are you the best candidate for the job?** A: As a consumer protection attorney and now a Member of Congress, I’ve spent my career delivering for Californians and protecting taxpayers. In the House, I was the only Democrat to oppose “earmarks,” which are a way to fund Members' pet projects. I’m leading the fight to ban congressional stock trading, and **the whiteboard you may have seen me bring to hearings is more than a fun prop** —my questioning of witnesses in Congressional Hearings secured free COVID testing for every American, helped us pass bills that lowered drug costs, and showed how corporate profits are driving inflation.
---
**Q: What differentiates you from the other Democrats in the race?** A: I’ve never accepted a dime from corporate PACs, and I’m the only candidate in this race who is rejecting contributions from federal lobbyists, and Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Bank CEOs. I’m proud our campaign is truly people-powered.
---
Derek, nobody gets elected alone, and I need your help if we’re going to win this important (and expensive!) race. [**Our end of quarter fundraising deadline is June 30th. Last quarter, we were outraised by another candidate in the race. This quarter, we need to catch up. If you’re with me, can you please make a donation of $5 today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230625-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI25_1_EOQ_20230625_V1_F&refcode2=25430_3422442_kkVl-n&akid=25430%2E3422442%2EkkVl-n)
**[Donate $5 ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230625-1?amount=5&refcode=EMAI25_1_EOQ_20230625_V1_F&refcode2=25430_3422442_kkVl-n&akid=25430%2E3422442%2EkkVl-n)**
Thanks a ton,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAI25_1_EOQ_20230625_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=25430_3422442_kkVl-n&akid=25430%2E3422442%2EkkVl-n)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=25430%2E3422442%2EkkVl-n)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=25430%2E3422442%2EkkVl-n)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We can’t afford to fall short.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=455%2E35263%2EaOozSe)
Hi Peter, In just a moment, **[I’m going to ask you to chip in before our end-of-quarter deadline.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=455%2E35263%2EaOozSe)** But first, I hope you’ll give me the chance to explain why this deadline is so important. Less than one week from now, our team will close the books on this quarter’s fundraising and start filing a report on our campaign finances for the Federal Election Commission. Shortly after that, those numbers will be made public for everyone to see. With a recent poll showing this race statistically tied, there’s no doubt that Mitch McConnell, potential Republican opponents, and their wealthy allies will be watching our numbers closely. They'll be looking for any signs of weakness or opportunities to flip this tossup seat — and the Senate — red. **[We can’t afford to fall short before Friday’s end-of-quarter deadline and send a weak fundraising report to the FEC, Peter. Can I count on you to chip in $10 and help me defend this battleground seat and our Senate majority?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun23.CtqEq3&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=455%2E35263%2EaOozSe)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-jun23.0mNvpg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=455%2E35263%2EaOozSe)

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: One thing this year has taught us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=ppRr4LPbmWUO1zze2106culfrJ60%2F%2BV%2FzUL4HvuD2X5pJ692DZ6%2B8Nc8gorKcswEEo7mEG3bC%2FowgM7%2F0zF%2FUnFaxtV1pYgj%2BX6NbUW4Uu1tIisPLinhTWxEm8KqZe129oi42vMkpUIZsuI39uD5qoYG%2BQjNAN2GFQRuzYgCtpdbTPuqarpW1gXtrYCrMsKGLb0GT6OZ1MzidPVEmG8YMAoTBS%2Fu%2Fe5a0GcHwoI7cWLBvQYWPW078zLx%2B40082DyRXe86PbSsfU5JfOtFc23EgRpL8sYcEit%2FYlvLEETiBRuzpZnjeA6UoEcvyiRtiRHyQOm48RF506pjWLAlL3oJrvnJtPdthEHD4h%2B9U7V4oEANEIuhh%2BmxXveueJ5eHKx6iPrIz83V6fRFqKG8hhV1xEoGjE9NaZAkHwyJouxaSNw7cgLxz29RmFtpZt5p1H5)

Peter, yesterday marked one year since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade.

This devastating decision stripped away the Constitutional right to an abortion after nearly 50 years, allowing states to take away women’s power over their bodies and lives. But if there is one thing the last year has shown — it’s that we can fight back.

MAGA Republicans will stop at nothing to ban abortion nationwide, but they are no match for the will of the American people.

A year ago, millions of women lost their right to a safe and legal abortion. Since then, we have seen countless victories in state legislatures protecting this right. We can build a nation that includes safe access to abortion, but to get it done, we’ll need to keep fighting together.

[We can’t let up. Will you add your name to stand with us in the fight to protect reproductive freedom for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65381669/413282106/1967037090?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230625_PT_abortion_0_6MO_SethMagazinerHQ_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDhmNDZiNS03ODEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zncQQSFupbPYB6UXySDrfqfuuUvkeIqGAq5enWtsBxo=&emci=071c9fb1-7713-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=048f46b5-7813-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

Looking ahead, we must elect a pro-choice majority to Congress in 2024 to halt any and all extremist efforts to pass anti-abortion legislation nationwide. The road to this majority starts right in Rhode Island — and I am determined to work to codify the protections of Roe v. Wade into federal law.

**We must stand together in this fight to ensure that women can make their own healthcare decisions,_not extremist politicians._**

[If you’re with us, add your name today to join us in the fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65381682/413282115/1967037090?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230625_PT_abortion_0_6MO_SethMagazinerHQ_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDhmNDZiNS03ODEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zncQQSFupbPYB6UXySDrfqfuuUvkeIqGAq5enWtsBxo=&emci=071c9fb1-7713-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=048f46b5-7813-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=15384964)

Thank you,
Seth

name: Bob Casey
subject: Ever since I announced that I was running for reelection
body:
I’m counting on you today.
| | |
---
Derek,

After I announced that I was running for reelection, national Republicans targeted me with negative ads to make it clear that flipping this seat is a top priority in their plan to retake Senate control in 2024.

Well, I’m not done fighting for Pennsylvania’s hardworking families and I won’t back down to anyone – including Republicans in the Senate working to chip away at critical programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.

The stakes of this race are high, so we can’t afford to fall short. That’s why I’m reaching out now before our end-of-quarter deadline.
[**Will you be one of the supporters to pitch in now and help us reach our critical end-of-quarter goal? Split a donation between Chrissy Houlahan and my campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65381932/413283876/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk843-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjE4MWRiNy03OTEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehi0iDu1iEJlWCKxtSSTmztP2hJaVCN6fiyANn8pw-Y=)
No one knows better than I do that winning here in Pennsylvania will be tough. That’s why we need to put this reelection campaign on the strongest footing possible.

Our deadline is nearly here. So, can you help us out, Derek?
**[_Will you split a donation of $5 or any amount you can before our big end-of-quarter deadline? I’m counting on your support right now._ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65381933/413283877/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk843-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjE4MWRiNy03OTEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehi0iDu1iEJlWCKxtSSTmztP2hJaVCN6fiyANn8pw-Y=) **
| | [Donate >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65381934/413283878/-1222011784?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk843-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYjE4MWRiNy03OTEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ehi0iDu1iEJlWCKxtSSTmztP2hJaVCN6fiyANn8pw-Y=)
---
Our team is capable of great things if we work together. It’s going to take all of us to defend this seat and our Senate majority.

With gratitude,

Bob Casey
| Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
P.O. Box 222
Devon, PA 19333

Team, Last year, after the _Dobbs_ decision was released, tens of millions of Americans across the nation had their fundamental right to make their own decisions about their own bodies and lives stripped away. In Michigan, Governor Gretchen Whitmer vowed to fight like hell to protect abortion access. And together, we repealed the extreme 1931 law banning abortion and criminalizing nurses and doctors. **Now, as conservative-led state legislatures across the country race to pass restrictive laws banning abortion, Governor Whitmer is committed to electing leaders across the country who will defeat MAGA extremists and protect our fundamental rights. ** But she can't do it alone. We need your support now more than ever. **[Fight Like Hell PAC is building a coalition of grassroots support to take a stand for abortion care and the right for every person to make decisions about their own bodies. clean_body: | Team, Last year, after the Dobbs decision was released, tens of millions of Americans across the nation had their fundamental right to make their own decisions about their own bodies and lives stripped away. In Michigan, Governor Gretchen Whitmer vowed to fight like hell to protect abortion access. And together, we repealed the extreme 1931 law banning abortion and criminalizing nurses and doctors. Now, as conservative-led state legislatures across the country race to pass restrictive laws banning abortion, Governor Whitmer is committed to electing leaders across the country who will defeat MAGA extremists and protect our fundamental rights. But she can't do it alone. We need your support now more than ever. | Thank you for standing with us in this critical fight. — Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC

name: Jon Tester
subject: We’re running this campaign differently
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hi there.

Here’s a photo of my grandparents, Arnfred and Christine, on their wedding
day in 1905. That was seven years before they picked out a flat piece of
grassland just outside Big Sandy to build their homestead.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18980?t=1001&akid=3337%2E346206%2EDoGPHw ][IMG]

That patch of loamy, alkaline clay-soil is the same one where I grew up;
and where Sharla and I raised our kids and still farm the land.

Things weren’t easy for Fred and Christine. They suffered devastating
windstorms, bitter cold, shooting fire, poisonous snakes—pretty much
everything but locusts. And in the late teens, the drought hit, wiping out
the farm entirely. My grandparents were forced to leave.

But they were determined to return to their homestead. They saved up
enough to start all over again on the same little piece of land. They had
a couple hundred acres to their name, a newly-built barn, a windmill,
their healthy son and daughters (including newborn Helen, my mom), strong
muscles, and the powerful work ethic that built rural America.

I first ran for office to make sure our government was serving hardworking
Americans like my grandparents a hundred years ago. Folks like our
teachers, farmers, and construction workers deserve a government that
works for them.

But too many Washington politicians are deep in the pockets of right-wing
special interests. They promise one thing when the camera is rolling, then
make secret backroom deals with their wealthy megadonors.

That’s not how I operate, and it’s why we’re running this campaign
differently. I’m counting on grassroots folks like you chipping in what
you can, when you can, to build a team strong enough to take on the
outside groups and Republican attacks.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18980?t=1002&akid=3337%2E346206%2EDoGPHw ]Can I count on you to split a contribution today between my campaign
and Charles Booker? Your donation (no matter the size) *sows the seeds* of
our movement, ensuring we grow and build the resources we need to win.

CHIP IN →

Thanks for your support. Together, we can keep me in Washington fighting
for the little guy.

Jon

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18980?t=1003&akid=3337%2E346206%2EDoGPHw ][IMG]

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230625-3337-footer&t=1004&refcode2=3337_346206_DoGPHw&akid=3337%2E346206%2EDoGPHw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3337%2E346206%2EDoGPHw

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: I'm going back for more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, We've accomplished a _lot_ in the Senate thanks to Democratic supporters like you. Here are just a few highlights: ✔️We took on Big Pharma and finally made it possible for Medicare to negotiate lower prices for prescription drugs. ✔️We made the largest investment in fighting climate change in our nation’s history. ✔️We took critical measures to safeguard our democracy by passing the Electoral Count Reform Act. Still, our work is far from complete. From protecting the right to vote to increasing access to affordable child care, there is still so much more to be done -- and that’s why I’m asking for your support. **The end-of-quarter deadline is coming up at midnight on June 30th. Since I’ll be on the ballot next year it’s critical to hit our fundraising goal so we can ensure we have the resources we need to keep the Senate blue. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand now?**

body:

_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _

Friend, I mean what I said yesterday: **2024 is our year to end the far-right’s attacks on our rights.** The state-level abortion bans, the threats for restrictions on abortion pills in the courts, and the never-ending tirade from the MAGA right have all gone too far. And voters are sick of it. Without _Roe v. Wade_ , these partisan attacks on abortion care will only continue. We must pass federal abortion protections to ensure equal access for all Americans, and we can only do that if we take back the House next year. **We can’t wait until 2024 to start to get organized, team. **That’s why we wanted to brighten your day with some good news:** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65383379/413287937/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230625_FR_6UU_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjgxMDU2ZmQwLTdiMTMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MPaaPvSRIsTAscV-rFW1g7UiQ1yHyEGQh4IcX8T1bR8=)

Last November, Democrats won full control of government in states like Maryland, Michigan, and Minnesota for the first time in _years_. Now, those lawmakers are pushing forward progress on issues like:
✅ Defending reproductive freedom
✅ Protecting worker’s rights
✅ Ensuring gun safety
✅ Expanding paid family leave
✅ And more!
**Team, the NDRC’s movement to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, and elect Democracy Defenders helped make these victories possible – and we’re just getting started. Will you pitch in now to help us continue fighting for fairness?**

clean_body: | Team, whether it’s book bans, attacks on voting rights, expulsions of democratically-elected lawmakers, or efforts to eliminate abortion access, there’s a lot of bad news coming out of Republican-led legislatures lately. That’s why we wanted to brighten your day with some good news: | = Last November, Democrats won full control of government in states like Maryland, Michigan, and Minnesota for the first time in years. Now, those lawmakers are pushing forward progress on issues like: ✅ Defending reproductive freedom ✅ Protecting worker’s rights ✅ Ensuring gun safety ✅ Expanding paid family leave ✅ And more! Team, the NDRC’s movement to secure fair maps, protect voting rights, and elect Democracy Defenders helped make these victories possible – and we’re just getting started. Will you pitch in now to help us continue fighting for fairness? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression enable Republicans to impose their extreme agenda – even when a majority of voters oppose it. But by fighting to secure fair maps and protect access to the ballot box, we can help ensure the people have the power to hold their leaders accountable. That’s democracy at work. = “When the people are able to participate in the democratic process, they have the power to protect democracy and deliver real change. ” – A.G. Holder – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: Stopping abortion on demand
body:
The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25b9646eca77420fa85dbcd37f975244&_e=-IeRUVK1k1RjURgds33nXG1xv0EdLxtawlClATNtJCJnkX1sBUwMqRBP8baY5dDBWxFyVIOsRib5YitWwl82Az8cNepQKps_iSk0Ry09YLatRijmIS_wxWYjhqyIq4JP5KX4mpb2_6jS42ZDVsRr0spc2T5HHNuBZxzk4ItvBqQPoAyLxYCE7PvFF337mtCKQuBFSzBDDlbbtRMBAEw5yRW0ACrjUnLdae57sKBwUkiwqs00qiBoEZ99LpfgQcqgamS099w_cMkzZFa6C1Lo8DD5_j3TpG-XflVlEIx32_uK9GlWdmAPnvkj20PpWqCF8MkGo9MNNQq3KVzbrP9nff8ZB7x_LYlvx6tRy5PC5H9alvXVlTvQPArBOwhKJzlbD049iE7gtNZ0F33TbcQjU2xQ1_q3aUWRV84MsvmerQc%3D)
---
#
Friend,

The radical left is launching an all-out attack on the unborn and we must act fast to stop them. [**We need your support to fight back**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25b9646eca77420fa85dbcd37f975244&_e=-IeRUVK1k1RjURgds33nXG1xv0EdLxtawlClATNtJCJnkX1sBUwMqRBP8baY5dDBWxFyVIOsRib5YitWwl82Az8cNepQKps_iSk0Ry09YLatRijmIS_wxWYjhqyIq4JP5KX4mpb2_6jS42ZDVsRr0spc2T5HHNuBZxzk4ItvBqQPoAyLxYCE7PvFF337mtCKQuBFSzBDDlbbtRMBAEw5yRW0ACrjUnLdae57sKBwUkiwqs00qiBoEZ99LpfgQcqgamS099w_cMkzZFa6C1Lo8C7iTi4YOzktU9MoOSrxw-4fYCzUWVzzUo0gH5IUA0h7XQTi7qXb7AuoqwELixAsJLJqB9bGESVnMYRXS0Uf9_SZiUnAhdP9r3q2Jg-7BQZ19gY4MPxe7rkQBLXHYiQxSsT42JIEe5LMATisfpn-Vhw%3D) against the radicals' latest attempt to revive the long-expired Equal Rights Amendment (ERA) - an assault on mothers, babies, and the rule of law.

This dangerous and sweeping legal mandate for abortion on demand, funded with taxpayer dollars, would be enshrined in the U.S. Constitution indefinitely blocking state and federal legislation to protect the unborn and the consciences of Americans who do not wish to participate in abortion.

The Big Abortion Lobby and their radical allies are sparing no expense to make abortion on demand the law of the land, and even the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg agreed that the deadline to ratify the ERA has long since passed. But that hasn't stopped them from working with the Biden administration to legalize abortions at ANY point in pregnancy - up until the moment of birth and even after birth!

**[This is barbaric and we must fight back with everything we have.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25b9646eca77420fa85dbcd37f975244&_e=-IeRUVK1k1RjURgds33nXG1xv0EdLxtawlClATNtJCJnkX1sBUwMqRBP8baY5dDBWxFyVIOsRib5YitWwl82Az8cNepQKps_iSk0Ry09YLatRijmIS_wxWYjhqyIq4JP5KX4mpb2_6jS42ZDVsRr0spc2T5HHNuBZxzk4ItvBqQPoAyLxYCE7PvFF337mtCKQuBFSzBDDlbbtRMBAEw5yRW0ACrjUnLdae57sKBwUkiwqs00qiBoEZ99LpfgQcqgamS099w_cMkzZFa6C1Lo8EtPt9eObiPQPGPvyQmh90eKoLgAA0HDaOv9akx-DK7StWLh2vu4HfCcay9C7-j-F3S-JqLvatnxb4vg4xPFH9ba6gO38HcOTRVZODo0vQkgs78v2LUVXgU_vXqmmk9okU-7jiGa5bVXhxpsrq3W1EI%3D)** The team at SBA Pro-Life America is committed to defending life and advocating for laws that protect innocent and vulnerable human life.

But we can't do this alone. We need your help to expand our policy research efforts, advance pro-life laws through direct lobbying and grassroots campaigns, and grow our voter education initiative to ensure pro-life Americans know where their lawmakers stand on protecting the unborn.

The abortion lobby is spending a record amount of dollars to bring about their radical agenda, but with your generous contribution today, we can fight back against their assault on the unborn and protect innocent lives from abortion on demand.

Please act now and make your gift using this secure link: **[https://secure.sbaprolife.org/stop-big-abortion-extremists](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=25b9646eca77420fa85dbcd37f975244&_e=-IeRUVK1k1RjURgds33nXG1xv0EdLxtawlClATNtJCJnkX1sBUwMqRBP8baY5dDBWxFyVIOsRib5YitWwl82Az8cNepQKps_iSk0Ry09YLatRijmIS_wxWYjhqyIq4JP5KX4mpb2_6jS42ZDVsRr0spc2T5HHNuBZxzk4ItvBqQPoAyLxYCE7PvFF337mtCKQuBFSzBDDlbbtRMBAEw5yRW0ACrjUnLdae57sKBwUkiwqs00qiBoEZ99LpfgQcqgamS099w_cMkzZFa6C1Lo8CG-JzR7Vk58qNzfndI-5ysorzhEWCVNig4_EBd9pDUtZhftiSByHJ1XGjcML_WS1ITSg9cqxvyZ0gg4INRjh8EFxGWPHs70Fz0hc162cbk0ysAPAvsK1UgckPRLTiCToTThiSBbQM3w92JwXQuybu4%3D)**

subject: their bigotry could cost lives
body:
Friends - First: It began with targeted attacks towards the LGBTQ+ community. For decades, the focus was on
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5220?id=53286.607.1.01747dc386ca0bc542dc84b52920c8c0)

|
---
**Friends -** **First** : It began with targeted attacks towards the LGBTQ+ community. For decades, the focus was on the right to marry someone you love. Radical right-wing activists and lawmakers, and even Presidents stood firm in their ideas of what marriage should be. **Then** : The radical right shifted their ire towards those in the transgender community specifically, doubling-down on cruel narratives and dehumanizing tactics. With their bigotry on full display, they have accused teachers of being “groomers” and inclusive lessons on the spectrum of identity as a form of abuse. **Now** : Republican strongholds across the country are targeting healthcare for those in the LGBTQ+ community. Despite doctors' and professionals' advice worldwide, they deny them critical, life-saving care. No matter the unfounded claims, lies, and hatred they push toward our community, we must always be ready to push back. And our fight is a part of compassion and love for those that are already at significant risk in our nation. **[Friends: Help our campaign become a voice in Washington against the extremists and let our voices be heard! Reaching our fundraising goal means we can fully fund our work to elect Democratic leaders. Missing our fundraising goal means we may have to scale back our work to defeat extreme Republicans. | | |

| | By now, you’ve heard that our end-of-quarter deadline is **this Friday** , and we still need 11 donors from your area to chip in to hit our $250,000 goal. Reaching our June fundraising goal – through grassroots donations of $7 or more – means we can fully fund our work to elect Democratic leaders. Here’s why that matters: **✓** Thanks to our investments last year, we flipped statehouses in Michigan and Minnesota, and our new Democratic majorities enshrined abortion rights into law. **✓** With President Biden running for re-election, we need Democratic statehouses that will protect his electoral path to victory from Republican interference. **✓** **We could take back statehouses in New Hampshire and Virginia _this year_ , but it starts with 11 donors from your area stepping up before Friday’s deadline.** [Show your support for Democrats by making your first $7 donation of the year. clean_body: Reaching our fundraising goal means we can fully fund our work to elect Democratic leaders. Missing our fundraising goal means we may have to scale back our work to defeat extreme Republicans. | | | | | By now, you’ve heard that our end-of-quarter deadline is this Friday , and we still need 11 donors from your area to chip in to hit our $250,000 goal. Reaching our June fundraising goal – through grassroots donations of $7 or more – means we can fully fund our work to elect Democratic leaders. Here’s why that matters: ✓ Thanks to our investments last year, we flipped statehouses in Michigan and Minnesota, and our new Democratic majorities enshrined abortion rights into law. ✓ With President Biden running for re-election, we need Democratic statehouses that will protect his electoral path to victory from Republican interference. ✓ We could take back statehouses in New Hampshire and Virginia this year , but it starts with 11 donors from your area stepping up before Friday’s deadline. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We’re proud to have a growing team of over 42,000 grassroots donors this year. Will you be one of the 11 supporters from your area to add a donation and help hit our June goal? Thanks, Team DLCC | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the DLCC are not tax deductible. | The Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee and Grassroots Victory PAC are dedicated to winning and defending Democratic majorities in state legislatures across the country. body:
Take the survey now to ensure your voice is heard! The race for the GOP Presidential nomination is heating up...| | | Peter, The race for the GOP Presidential nomination is heating up. name: Anna Kaplan via Blue Amp Action
subject: George Santos lied to get elected. Now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. He doesn’t represent voters’ values. I’m committed to defeating him next November
body:
Defeat George Santos
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3552963d-42ac-4e6d-bb1d-4fa5262b6cb4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, Congressman George Santos claimed he was Jewish. He claimed his grandparents survived the Holocaust and that his mother survived the September 11th terrorist attacks in New York City. He claimed he graduated from college as a star volleyball player, worked for Goldman Sachs, and ran a foundation that rescued 2500 dogs and cats. These claims were lies — all of them. And that doesn’t even scratch the surface of the web of brazen lies Santos told to get elected. George Santos is a disgrace. He’s an embarrassment to our district, state, and country. And now, he’s facing 13 federal charges for crimes including money laundering and fraud. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9baa9dee-0165-41fb-a331-817f280a490d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) That’s why I’ve announced my run for Congress to replace him. [My name is Anna Kaplan, and I’m asking for your support. Will you pitch in $25 or more -- split with Blue Amp Action \-- to help me send George Santos into political retirement? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T82c8b17b-9f5c-40c2-8c33-7607bac0637b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3448e08e-71f4-463c-a68b-e8e94e625684/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4f0fd165-ae31-46d7-836e-5056f2ea9db1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I was born in Iran to a Jewish family. My family faced religious persecution, so at age 13, my parents put me on a plane, not knowing when -- or if -- they’d see me again. I landed in New York and found a place where women had real rights and could determine their futures. I graduated from college and law school and met my husband, Darren. I ran for Town Council and won. And when our state legalized gay marriage, and the town clerk refused to perform the ceremonies, I proudly stepped in to perform them. Next, I ran for New York State Senate, unseated a well-funded Republican, flipped the seat, and flipped the chamber to give Democrats control for the first time in decades. In the Senate, I sponsored and passed bills codifying Roe v. Wade and banning untraceable ghost guns. Now, I’m running for Congress to provide real representation to the people of New York because the truth is, Santos’ lies aren’t even the worst thing about him. Santos is a Trump-supporting, election-denying, anti-choice, and pro-assault rifle disgrace to our district. He doesn’t represent our values, and I’m committed to defeating him next November. [But that’s only going to happen with your support. So today, I’m asking: Will you split $25 between Blue Amp Action](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37467e11-4f90-420e-bf8d-ccd350bf1eb5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ and my campaign to help me defeat George Santos?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1148f322-1967-4633-8e8a-ab8b08355d31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [DONATE NOW >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0b152c9-914a-4000-9a4c-b4b19bd293a6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) My husband and I have spent 30 years here. We’ve raised our daughters here. It’s our home. This district voted for Joe Biden in 2020, and it’s time this district’s representative in Congress reflected our values Let’s win this thing, Anna Kaplan
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8da751fa-bf8c-4bf8-9ca5-435c1f0d8f66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/annakaplan2ndpartner4-n_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf1825ce9-2d7a-48af-b1aa-571a7a52824c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: The EMILYs List Team
subject: Peter, what does one year without Roe mean to you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | Your story matters. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65385862/413295331/160437272?sourceid=1050329&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmI1Yzc4Yi04MjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AC1gVpl0RmzCoACijyrrhfnvwRN4ED32BNSRb8nj1s8=&emci=86cf2484-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=56b5c78b-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Yesterday marked one year since the extremist, Trump-appointed majority on the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , eliminating the federal right to abortion.

They took away a constitutional right that had been in place for _half a century_.

In the wake of this decision, Republican-led states have wasted no time restricting abortion access and signing near-total abortion bans into law — placing politicians between women and their doctors and putting millions at risk.

**We're marking one year without _Roe_ by lifting up the voices of women across our country, so please, will you tell us:**

_What does one year without_ Roe _mean to you?_

_How has this decision affected you or those you know?

How has it inspired you to fight for reproductive rights or help elect Democratic pro-choice women?_ ****Your voice and your experience matter. Tell us your story here:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/One-Year-Without-Roe](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65385867/413295332/160437272?sourceid=1050329&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmI1Yzc4Yi04MjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AC1gVpl0RmzCoACijyrrhfnvwRN4ED32BNSRb8nj1s8=&emci=86cf2484-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=56b5c78b-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

the EMILYs List team

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Cori Bush is unafraid to speak out againstIsrael’s apartheid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Like me, Cori got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office. | |
---
Peter, My sister in service Rep. Cori Bush has been a fierce advocate for Palestinian rights in Congress, helping to grow the momentum to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses. Cori first saw the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence in 2014, when she met with a Palestinian delegation who visited Ferguson Uprising activists to share tips on how to defend themselves from militarized violence and tear gas. **Since then, she has been unafraid to speak the truth about Israel’s apartheid against Palestinians --****even when it makes her a target.** [**Please split a donation today between my campaign and Cori Bush’s campaign, to show her you have her back as she advocates for human rights in the U.S. and Palestine.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xI_wiES580kxKKVfakIRHkDKmNduaIZOScS289x08jzf6GVV3wWYPoQkM_qfhvUmpwJwOao4fdIIhZNZE5YVG2kfXaNuybP358dl-_7mZsdshAnWGJXijW8VBQekrTGm1PiVk1d5BpcJK4lkPzKOjY1pSovrDPITh6y5YQjFB6gG05NYekPs9EhwdETZ6TRHFQjwTXlokx8gPb74GRRw4t4MtxaBd5gNzswZmfNXdT-LA_DKgVtfvJv-WjNCy1W30KhWZxw3HRXiCruU1DThFjKuKrscQjZzPkdi-E3cksxIfBZ3R1ZHRhkAo2iXd-cPyf_S9ASk7CmlhK5U87Eg-6JOznNa81cIF56GgVIUEBszNtNsnBTFQWeFpp-6D1q0CfLuvlX7nJOEGNhFHPAIGH/3xc/Tmw6vU7WTje22pxfPUkOCA/h0/X1SLQHL5eGTcR99jBmfPBhTymW-bFrIU9zRS0ZMR2k4) **[DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xI_wiES580kxKKVfakIRHkDKmNduaIZOScS289x08jzT6NQtp8mOQ8zSy1tcl7bEzbjpaqs93wynxiAh5hng14db6ccCe2y7jICpI92Bq92wUC6VwzkmYFTZVNK5s6-TZjScwWQFTr8_pEY5OJM8aYIkfeDuwnBlWaQWeNVxVSdQFHG1IgdtxE7i2RAKsWNp7aF-1g-Ct9RpstdtR22T0UnFkQl7um7-szbQj7UqnjetuBL-ZjAafFN-ficyXd3zOMzP-Vi0qIhszOGDRczTtc3F3pNd31lWCEp3rOf_WSsY7RkV9mCIKVQWVmHpVvx5-_wlCblPU7gLvwCsRHulOEJPq6TjnLA34S0d5jQ2x58ah0NTpEaXdSOa8oqPD3iNKYEKW-Uv3Ey4LgYqtUO9UZ/3xc/Tmw6vU7WTje22pxfPUkOCA/h1/lMymtZgW3UX6FzGjp-X9mjEYJvkXftK9MrqPXitxxt0)** Like me, Cori Bush got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office. As an activist in the movement for Black lives, Cori personally experienced brutal police violence and ongoing harassment by police. I’ve also witnessed and spoken out against violent police attacks on Black Lives Matter protesters in my district. Unless we change the unjust status quo, my Black neighbors and my Palestinian family members will continue to face systemic racism and dehumanization. **In Congress, Cori and I have advocated against ever-growing spending on police and military budgets, all while our communities are struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads.** Instead of investing in institutions that harm and kill people, we’re calling for investments in communities, to ensure that everyone can thrive. I’m honored to work alongside Cori in Congress for Black and Palestinian liberation, and to build a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being. clean_body: Like me, Cori got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office. | | Peter, My sister in service Rep. Cori Bush has been a fierce advocate for Palestinian rights in Congress, helping to grow the momentum to end U.S. complicity in Israel’s human rights abuses. Cori first saw the connections between Black and Palestinian struggles against state violence in 2014, when she met with a Palestinian delegation who visited Ferguson Uprising activists to share tips on how to defend themselves from militarized violence and tear gas. Since then, she has been unafraid to speak the truth about Israel’s apartheid against Palestinians --even when it makes her a target. Like me, Cori Bush got her start in grassroots activism before running for public office. As an activist in the movement for Black lives, Cori personally experienced brutal police violence and ongoing harassment by police. I’ve also witnessed and spoken out against violent police attacks on Black Lives Matter protesters in my district. Unless we change the unjust status quo, my Black neighbors and my Palestinian family members will continue to face systemic racism and dehumanization. In Congress, Cori and I have advocated against ever-growing spending on police and military budgets, all while our communities are struggling to put food on the table and keep a roof over their heads. Instead of investing in institutions that harm and kill people, we’re calling for investments in communities, to ensure that everyone can thrive. I’m honored to work alongside Cori in Congress for Black and Palestinian liberation, and to build a world that truly values people’s safety and well-being. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib: | | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. In solidarity, Rashida Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Cori Bush for Congress, please .

body:
Did you see the news, Peter?
---
**Right now, states with abortion bans face a rising crisis in OB/GYN health care. **Millions of people are losing access to crucial services, including care for miscarriages and support during high-risk pregnancies.
To make matters worse, the laws BLOCK new doctors from completing their lifesaving training – meaning a growing number of states could lose a _full generation_ of vital health care workers. The devastating impact on people’s health cannot be ignored.
That’s why Emerge is working tirelessly to empower more Democratic women to run for office and join the fight to protect essential healthcare in every state. **But to make our biggest impact in the fight ahead, we need to know where you stand – and we’re still missing 132 responses to our urgent poll, including yours! Our response deadline is at 11:59 p.m. tonight so please, tell us now: **

This is a rough one, Peter, so please stick with us.
After SCOTUS rolled back _Roe v Wade_ one year ago this week _,_ we were devastated. We saw the right to essential health care stripped away from millions of Americans, and we soon witnessed the GOP’s first attempt at a national abortion ban. But our Emerge community, including supporters like you, rallied together immediately to plan our way forward. **Now, at the one year mark, we’re going to ask you to raise your voice again. **** **
**[Should abortion rights be defended?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65386059/413295928/-1211366920?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Femerge-2023-reproductive-rights&code=jtk1246-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjMzQwZGNjLTgyMTMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OyO9lMSRU2LSE9_RHaosuMEv8n82xUsfK3mrclwv6A0=&emci=7e2d026b-fe11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=dc340dcc-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818)**

Right now, we’re fighting for our reproductive freedom state by state – **and the battle is in the courts.** We _must_ ensure that the benches are stacked with fierce Democratic women who will defend access to abortion and uphold the bodily autonomy of every person. **But we can’t win this battle overnight.**
**With near-total abortion bans in 14 states, we need urgent action at the national level.** **That’s why we’re asking 10,000 Emerge supporters to answer our poll[now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65386062/413295931/-1211366920?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=http%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Femerge-2023-reproductive-rights&code=jtk1246-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImRjMzQwZGNjLTgyMTMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OyO9lMSRU2LSE9_RHaosuMEv8n82xUsfK3mrclwv6A0=&emci=7e2d026b-fe11-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=dc340dcc-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=920818), before our midnight deadline.**

clean_body: Did you see the news, Peter? Right now, states with abortion bans face a rising crisis in OB/GYN health care. Millions of people are losing access to crucial services, including care for miscarriages and support during high-risk pregnancies. To make matters worse, the laws BLOCK new doctors from completing their lifesaving training – meaning a growing number of states could lose a full generation of vital health care workers. The devastating impact on people’s health cannot be ignored. That’s why Emerge is working tirelessly to empower more Democratic women to run for office and join the fight to protect essential healthcare in every state. But to make our biggest impact in the fight ahead, we need to know where you stand – and we’re still missing 132 responses to our urgent poll, including yours! Our response deadline is at 11:59 p.m. tonight so please, tell us now: | | | | Thank you for speaking out, Sandra Bishop Chief Development Officer, Emerge \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Team Emerge Date: Sat, June 24, 2023 Subject: [Reproductive Rights Petition] Awaiting Signature | | | This is a rough one, Peter, so please stick with us. After SCOTUS rolled back Roe v Wade one year ago this week , we were devastated. We saw the right to essential health care stripped away from millions of Americans, and we soon witnessed the GOP’s first attempt at a national abortion ban. But our Emerge community, including supporters like you, rallied together immediately to plan our way forward. Now, at the one year mark, we’re going to ask you to raise your voice again. | | | | Right now, we’re fighting for our reproductive freedom state by state – and the battle is in the courts. We must ensure that the benches are stacked with fierce Democratic women who will defend access to abortion and uphold the bodily autonomy of every person. But we can’t win this battle overnight. With near-total abortion bans in 14 states, we need urgent action at the national level. That’s why we’re asking 10,000 Emerge supporters to answer our poll, before our midnight deadline. But with only a few hours left, we need another 132 people from PA to respond so we can make the biggest impact yet. | | | | Thank you for adding your voice today, Team Emerge | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to off all our lists instantly. body:
I found this note and thought you’d like to see it | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386098/413296083/17860314?refcode=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODg4MDQxZjctODIxMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gL3BO4biNl4a1M9wQnlH1yWje1_tk29bUeFSKYEo7e4=)

Hey there, Peter! I’m Greta Presley, Brandon’s big sister – I have been helping out with his campaigns since he was running for Mayor of Nettleton, which was 22 years ago! Today, I wanted to share something special with you. The other night, as I was going through boxes in our house, I found a prayer our mother had written out years ago that I think speaks to Brandon’s character and the way we were raised. [But first, can I ask you to chip in $5 to help us meet our goal of raising $50,000 online by the end-of-quarter on June 30? Every little bit makes a difference:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386099/413296084/1420088401?amount=5&refcode=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODg4MDQxZjctODIxMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gL3BO4biNl4a1M9wQnlH1yWje1_tk29bUeFSKYEo7e4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386100/413296085/1420088401?amount=5&refcode=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODg4MDQxZjctODIxMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gL3BO4biNl4a1M9wQnlH1yWje1_tk29bUeFSKYEo7e4=) Our mother particularly enjoyed writing out her prayers on whatever pieces of paper she happened to have at the moment. We have discovered many of them since she passed away, but this one is truly special. You'll note from the picture that it's stained and aged over the years, but boy, what a message of love. Like so many in Mississippi, our mother struggled to keep the lights on and keep her children fed. There was always a bill to pay with little to no money to pay it. But my mother just never gave up. She had an amazing spirit that always pushed through, no matter the circumstances, for the sake of her kids. She was a single mother making less than minimum wage, with no one else to rely on, so she had to push through. She never let us feel as poor as we really were. And she prayed for us with these simple words: **“Just send them some dignity, a feeling of being loved”.** That was truly her desire for us growing up as we did, and it's what all children deserve everywhere. So many families in Mississippi need someone on their side, someone who will fight for their dignity and to feel loved and cared for. That’s why Brandon is running for governor. He cares about our people, and I truly believe that he can make a difference for our state. [I hope I can count on you to donate to Brandon’s campaign to be the next governor of Mississippi before the end of the month. Any amount helps us get the word out about Brandon’s positive vision for the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386101/413296086/1420088401?amount=5&refcode=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODg4MDQxZjctODIxMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gL3BO4biNl4a1M9wQnlH1yWje1_tk29bUeFSKYEo7e4=) | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386102/413296087/1420088401?amount=5&refcode=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ms=ea.888041f7-8213-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODg4MDQxZjctODIxMy1lZTExLWE5YmItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=gL3BO4biNl4a1M9wQnlH1yWje1_tk29bUeFSKYEo7e4=)**

Thank you so much,
Greta Presley

**THEN:** They used that massive campaign war chest to attack **35** swing-seat Democrats.

**NOW:** The latest polls show Team Extreme has taken the lead by a staggering **FIVE points**.

I know Republicans and their special interest donors think they can attack Democrats with vicious lies and turn voters against us.

_**I also know that we have what it takes to rise up and prove them absolutely wrong.**_

[**That’s why I just launched a rapid-response fund to raise 1,000 gifts before my critical End of Quarter Deadline in 5 days to outraise the GOP’s mega-donors and help Democrats win back our majority. I’m relying on your donation to rush funds to critical races nationwide, counter Republican attacks and connect with the voters we need to win in every battleground district. name: Colin Allred
subject: Inside Elections just downgraded Ted Cruz's chances
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friend, a lot of folks told me not to run against Ted Cruz.
They said a Democrat can't win a statewide election in Texas and that I should stick with my "safe" seat in the House after winning with 66% of the vote last year. But I'm not one to play it safe when our rights and values are in danger.
And listen, this team raised more in the first 24 hours of our campaign than Cruz did in the entire first quarter of 2023 – and the experts are taking notice.
Already, the Cook Political Report upgraded our chances of winning, and both Roll Call AND Inside Elections officially moved Texas from "Solid Republican" to "Battleground"!
Friend, all of these experts are putting Ted Cruz on notice because of the early strength of our grassroots campaign – but you know that GOP donors are taking notice, too. So please, will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and Serve America to help fight back against the GOP, beat Ted Cruz and flip Texas blue? I need to raise $100,000 today → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
I've never felt better about our chances. Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight says Texas may be Democrats' best pickup opportunity next year, CNN is calling Cruz one of the most vulnerable incumbents on the ballot and, if we win in Texas, Democrats will hold the Senate Majority.
But CBS News says this could be one of the most expensive races in the country, and with Senate control hanging in the balance, national Republicans are pouring money into Cruz's war chest. They've already launched their first attacks, and if we miss our fundraising goals, I won't have the resources to fight back.
That's why I'm personally asking: Will you split a donation of $15 or more between my campaign and Serve America? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority → [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-allred]
Let's do this.
Colin Allred

Peter, the GOP is (once again) threatening to cut Social Security and Medicare. But it’s not just that:

**There’s also a move by conservatives to cancel provisions of the Inflation Reduction Act which allow Medicare to negotiate with Big Pharma for lower prescription drug costs.**

Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act millions of Americans on Medicare only have to spend $35/month on insulin. But pharmaceutical companies are spending big to lobby McCarthy and his allies, and one company even sued the Biden Administration to stop lower prescription costs.

We have to take action now to stand up for our seniors and affordable healthcare. It’s time to stop the GOP and their dangerous proposals. name: Bob Casey (via durbinforsenate.com)
subject: Our big deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
I'm counting on you today.
#
Peter,
After I announced that I was running for re-election, national Republicans targeted me with negative ads to make it clear that flipping this seat is a top priority in their plan to retake Senate control in 2024.
Well, I’m not done fighting for Pennsylvania’s hard-working families and I won’t back down to anyone — including Republicans in the Senate working to chip away at critical programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid.
The stakes of this race are high, so we can’t afford to fall short. That’s why I’m reaching out now before our end-of-quarter deadline.
**[Will you be one of the supporters to pitch in now and help us reach our critical end-of-quarter goal? clean_body: I'm counting on you today. Peter, After I announced that I was running for re-election, national Republicans targeted me with negative ads to make it clear that flipping this seat is a top priority in their plan to retake Senate control in 2024. Well, I’m not done fighting for Pennsylvania’s hard-working families and I won’t back down to anyone — including Republicans in the Senate working to chip away at critical programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. The stakes of this race are high, so we can’t afford to fall short. body:
| | Since he was first elected to the State Senate in 2013, Mark has proudly voted again and again and again in support of abortion access and women’s reproductive health care. It’s one of the main reasons I decided to work for him in the governor’s campaign.

Like many women in Washington, I need to know that my next governor will do whatever it takes to protect my health and rights. And with Mark, there’s zero doubt he’ll be there for us.

**In fact, Mark is the only candidate for governor with a proven voting record of supporting women’s reproductive health and rights.[You can find his voting record on our website.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386718/413298448/769231469?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230625_1_2&refcode2=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&contactdata=xCnRTVM+cFTzdzH19EtMwX8KnNWt9VXrlCRRIqfg52q2DDHwuPcJEQFLRWSS5Dna&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTc2NDBhOS04NjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkdWEQiu3UBn3h7h1xMgE11t-M5I0AHGAX8ZSdIDc0Q=&emci=38960ca3-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**

[Mark is committed to ensuring Washington has the strongest reproductive protections in the nation. Are you with him?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386719/413298449/-1749386671?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230625_1_2&refcode2=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&contactdata=xCnRTVM+cFTzdzH19EtMwX8KnNWt9VXrlCRRIqfg52q2DDHwuPcJEQFLRWSS5Dna&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTc2NDBhOS04NjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkdWEQiu3UBn3h7h1xMgE11t-M5I0AHGAX8ZSdIDc0Q=&emci=38960ca3-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)

Let’s do this,

Liz Hall
Mark’s Campaign Manager

* * *

Today marks the one-year anniversary of the Supreme Court’s devastating decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and rip reproductive rights away from millions of Americans.

Since first joining the State Senate in 2013, I’ve voted to protect women’s health and rights 100% of the time. In fact, I’m the only candidate in this race with a voting record on choice. For my wife, and daughters, and every Washingtonian, I vow to keep abortion safe and legal in our state as governor.

**_If elected, on day one as Governor, I will request legislation to codify the right to abortion in the Washington State Constitution. Washington must continue to have the strongest reproductive protections in the nation._**

For decades, Washington has led the nation in the fight for abortion access and reproductive freedom, and I’m committed to keeping us on the frontline of that fight, especially in the wake of the _Dobbs_ decision that has threatened the health and safety of so many.

[If you agree that Washington needs to codify reproductive freedom in our state’s constitution, please add your name today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386720/413298450/-1749386671?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230625_1_2&refcode2=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&contactdata=xCnRTVM+cFTzdzH19EtMwX8KnNWt9VXrlCRRIqfg52q2DDHwuPcJEQFLRWSS5Dna&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTc2NDBhOS04NjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkdWEQiu3UBn3h7h1xMgE11t-M5I0AHGAX8ZSdIDc0Q=&emci=38960ca3-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167) | | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386721/413298451/-1749386671?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230625_1_2&refcode2=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&contactdata=xCnRTVM+cFTzdzH19EtMwX8KnNWt9VXrlCRRIqfg52q2DDHwuPcJEQFLRWSS5Dna&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTc2NDBhOS04NjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkdWEQiu3UBn3h7h1xMgE11t-M5I0AHGAX8ZSdIDc0Q=&emci=38960ca3-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)**
---
Over the last decade, I’ve voted to protect reproductive healthcare workers from out-of-state prosecution, eliminate out-of-pocket costs for patients seeking an abortion, protect access to medication abortion, and more.

Whether it’s protecting pregnant workers, expanding access to birth control, or making sure abortion care is legal and safe – my voting record speaks louder than any other candidate in this race.

In the year since the _Dobbs_ decision, we’ve seen the havoc that some states have tried to push on our country, from 6-week abortion bans to limiting access to contraception. **That’s not the future I want for my daughters, and it’s not what I want for Washington.**

[Sign on to join me in the fight to keep Washington at the forefront of abortion rights – add your name today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65386722/413298452/-1749386671?source=MM_EM_PT_90DO_230625_1_2&refcode2=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&contactdata=xCnRTVM+cFTzdzH19EtMwX8KnNWt9VXrlCRRIqfg52q2DDHwuPcJEQFLRWSS5Dna&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OTc2NDBhOS04NjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HkdWEQiu3UBn3h7h1xMgE11t-M5I0AHGAX8ZSdIDc0Q=&emci=38960ca3-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=697640a9-8613-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=45626167)

Thank you,

Mark

| | Derek, **“House Republicans in competitive districts dominated their Democratic counterparts in fundraising” – _Axios_** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65388001/413302005/-2079997641?refcode=mw_em_230625_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTQ2NzY3NC04YjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3gzewA2tBISwFh3z4vfsBEqK-NSGyIJiXc1gOu5nHaE=)**** I think that line _pretty much says it all._ Republicans in competitive districts – **like the battleground districts Virginia is full of** – are clearly gaining an early financial edge in an attempt to expand their narrow majority in the House in 2024. The GOP took the lead last quarter, and we only have a few days until the next FEC quarterly fundraising deadline to close the gap. If you’re thinking it seems a little early to be talking about the election next year, you’re not alone. I’m sure a lot of Americans feel the same way. But this is proof that **now is the time for us to help Democrats in Virginia build a war chest of cash to take down the GOP and win back control of the House.** If we wait until things ramp up next year, it might be too late. And frankly, I’m just not willing to take that risk. That’s why it’s so important for Democrats to make sure our state party has the money it needs to run a ground game that will propel our House candidates to victory in 2024. **_[**So I’m asking, Derek, can you split a donation, of anything you’re willing to give, between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Virginia so we can fight back against the GOP’s early fundraising haul and make sure Democrats control the House next clean_body: I really don’t like the sound of that. | | | Derek, “House Republicans in competitive districts dominated their Democratic counterparts in fundraising” – Axios **= I think that line pretty much says it all. Republicans in competitive districts – like the battleground districts Virginia is full of – are clearly gaining an early financial edge in an attempt to expand their narrow majority in the House in 2024. The GOP took the lead last quarter, and we only have a few days until the next FEC quarterly fundraising deadline to close the gap. If you’re thinking it seems a little early to be talking about the election next year, you’re not alone. I’m sure a lot of Americans feel the same way. But this is proof that now is the time for us to help Democrats in Virginia build a war chest of cash to take down the GOP and win back control of the House. If we wait until things ramp up next year, it might be too late. And frankly, I’m just not willing to take that risk. That’s why it’s so important for Democrats to make sure our state party has the money it needs to run a ground game that will propel our House candidates to victory in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Mark = | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

Just last week, MAGA Republicans voted to overturn a crucial gun safety measure put forth by the Biden Administration.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65388354/413303177/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230625-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YwYzVlZi04YzEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=emkG1jecBUHGXktdTq_AzqqIEi3etASLulvZ3CG8CuE=)

| Peter,

Last year marked a significant milestone in our nation's commitment to gun safety. President Biden signed into law the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, a momentous and historic reform bill.

This legislation serves as a crucial step toward ensuring that firearms remain out of the hands of dangerous individuals.

**But just last week, MAGA Republicans voted to overturn a crucial gun safety measure put forth by the Biden Administration.** This measure aimed to close a dangerous loophole in stabilizing braces for firearms, allowing ordinary guns to be turned into more dangerous assault-style weapons.

I voted **NO** on this bill and will continue to vote down any other reckless legislation extremists threaten to bring to the floor.

**We’re facing a gun violence epidemic in this country, and if we want to take more significant action, we must win back the House in 2024.**

clean_body: Just last week, MAGA Republicans voted to overturn a crucial gun safety measure put forth by the Biden Administration. | = | Peter, Last year marked a significant milestone in our nation's commitment to gun safety. President Biden signed into law the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, a momentous and historic reform bill. This legislation serves as a crucial step toward ensuring that firearms remain out of the hands of dangerous individuals. But just last week, MAGA Republicans voted to overturn a crucial gun safety measure put forth by the Biden Administration. This measure aimed to close a dangerous loophole in stabilizing braces for firearms, allowing ordinary guns to be turned into more dangerous assault-style weapons. I voted NO on this bill and will continue to vote down any other reckless legislation extremists threaten to bring to the floor. We’re facing a gun violence epidemic in this country, and if we want to take more significant action, we must win back the House in 2024. This starts with protecting vulnerable seats like mine, but we’re coming up on our public FEC deadline in just 5 DAYS. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thanks, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.
