name: Adam Schiff
subject: Toxic waste dumping across the U.S.-Mexico border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, you’re probably being bombarded with end-of-month
fundraising appeals lately. Well, this isn’t one of those emails. I hope
you’ll take a moment to read it through to the end — it’s a longer read,
but I promise, it’s a story that’s worth your while.

When I was a young Assistant U.S. Attorney, I set up the first federal
environmental crime unit in Southern California. One of my first big cases
involved a corporation which hired toxic waste haulers to smuggle
hazardous materials across the border into Mexico.

The U.S. government had just put in place additional environmental
regulations to protect our drinking water and our communities. This made
it harder to dump chemicals and toxic waste in the U.S., and was
absolutely critical for water safety.

The corporation in the case — a laminating company — paid the haulers to
smuggle the waste across the border, and dump it in Mexico. We found
dozens of drums of hazardous waste there, from paints to flammable
solvents and other toxic materials. We had also intercepted a fair amount
of other cargo intended to be dumped. Tragically, people living there
emptied the drums, filled them with water, and washed clothes in them,
among other unknowingly dangerous uses.

As an Assistant U.S. Attorney, I took on this waste dumping corporation —
and won.

It was the first federal prosecution for across-the-border toxic waste
dumping ever. It set an important precedent: that no company, big or
small, could avoid accountability when harming our planet and putting the
health of communities at risk, at home or abroad.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]Headline in Orange County Register: El Toro Man Is Sentenced in Hazardous
Waste Case

The case generated a lot of press coverage at the time, and represented a
significant step forward in prosecuting environmental crimes:

“Companies realize it’s cheaper to pollute than to dispose of hazardous material
properly,” said Assistant U.S. Atty. Adam B. Schiff, who is helping to prosecute
the cases. “We hope the announcement of the indictments and the task force will
impress individuals that the calculus is changing dramatically, that the costs
are going up dramatically.” — Los Angeles Times, May 11, 1990

“This is a very significant case because it is the first time that the export of
hazardous waste has been charged in federal court,” Assistant US Attorney Adam
Schiff said. “We hope that this will be the first of many cases.” — Orange
County Register, May 11, 1990

The task force that I helped to assemble included the FBI, EPA, the U.S.
Department of Transportation, the California Highway Patrol, and the
California Department of Health Services.

It was one of the first occasions that I worked with state and federal law
enforcement and government agencies to hold criminal actors accountable
under the law. But it also wasn’t the last. I also prosecuted Chevron for
dumping excess oil and gas into the ocean.

Of course, my caseload went well beyond environmental crimes. I also
successfully prosecuted Richard Miller, the first FBI agent indicted for
and convicted of espionage on behalf of the Soviet Union. Miller had
gotten off in his first two trials — one declared a mistrial and another
overturned on appeal. But after I picked up the case and tried him — he
was convicted and sentenced.

My experience investigating criminal conduct came in all too handy during
the Trump Administration, when I served as the lead manager of Donald
Trump’s first impeachment trial, and when I served on the January 6th
Committee.

I still carry my early environmental crimes prosecution experience with me
today — as the same EPA I worked with all those years ago faces attacks
from corporations and their allies on the Supreme Court, who are trying to
make it easy for companies to pollute once again. It’s also why I’m a
strong supporter of a Green New Deal, and why my campaign is so focused on
the need to save the planet.

I hope this story gives you a bit more background as to how I’ve used my
experience to best protect Californians, and ensure that the United States
upholds its commitment to the environment.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]This is the voice I will bring to the Senate. And if you feel inspired
to help my campaign after reading this, I would appreciate any support you
can give — even $3, $10, or $25 goes a long way.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1072?c0=jun2023_abs_em.0Agatv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]EXPRESS DONATE $3

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9HINAX&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jun2023_abs_em.5j4Bsc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jun2023_abs_em.RWa6IA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jun2023_abs_em.9Bj7kB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thanks for reading, and take care.

— Adam

P.S. I can't leave without sharing this absolutely righteous photo of me
from those days, standing right outside the courthouse. Take a look:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]Black and white photo of Adam Schiff standing on court house steps

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jun2023_abs_em.JzRsbz&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=jun2023_abs_em.hzT4iC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=2712%2E5257348%2EwUnV3c ]Privacy Policy

It’s also why I’m a strong supporter of a Green New Deal, and why my campaign is so focused on the need to save the planet. I hope this story gives you a bit more background as to how I’ve used my experience to best protect Californians, and ensure that the United States upholds its commitment to the environment. [ ]This is the voice I will bring to the Senate. And if you feel inspired to help my campaign after reading this, I would appreciate any support you can give — even $3, $10, or $25 goes a long way. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $3 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thanks for reading, and take care. — Adam P.S. I can't leave without sharing this absolutely righteous photo of me from those days, standing right outside the courthouse. Take a look: [ ]Black and white photo of Adam Schiff standing on court house steps [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

The attacks on Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and his presidential campaign are starting to follow a similar pattern.

| [ ](http://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_stop_attacks_on_rfk_jr_st&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, The attacks on Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. and his presidential campaign are starting to follow a similar pattern. **First** : MSNBC, CNN, the New York Times, and legacy corporate media partisans regularly call RFK, Jr. all kinds of names, trying to dismiss him with baseless smears like “conspiracy theorist,” “crackpot,” and “anti-vax.” In reality, these attacks show how afraid they are of his appeal to the American public. **Then** : When RFK, Jr. offers to publicly debate any scientist or politician on these important topics, they go on air and attack him again. Rather than join a public debate, they hide behind empty name-calling while sitting safely on **TV “news shows” which rely heavily on billions of dollars of ad revenue from pharmaceutical giants like Pfizer**. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_stop_attacks_on_rfk_jr_st&n=2 "DONATE TODAY") [DONATE TODAY](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_stop_attacks_on_rfk_jr_st&n=2)

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65388778/413304119/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmRhMGVhMS04ZjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3LVX-gbitvEhe8bSwaRn0KM_9-VvT9Er1eEUo9-LHw=&emci=8a0005cc-8c13-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&emdi=12da0ea1-8f13-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
On Friday, Adam and I had to call his 81-year-old father.
Lauren Boebert had just attacked him because he is a retired OB-GYN who provided women with access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions... And because his son (and my husband), Adam Frisch, is currently running for Congress against her.
After Boebert’s attacks, Fox News decided to publish my father-in-law’s full name and his personal information for anyone wanting to see it, referring to him as an “abortionist.” And my first question was: _Do we need to worry about his safety?_
**It’s hard to explain what it’s like to tell your father-in-law that a member of Congress is attacking him – and that he might need to take precautions because of Lauren Boebert and Fox News’ recklessness.**
My father-in-law’s response was, unfortunately, not surprising: “What else is new? We’ve been dealing with this for decades.”
_This_ is what people hate about politics. And _this_ is why Adam decided to run against Lauren Boebert in the first place.
**These attacks aren’t going to make Adam or our family back down from standing up for what we believe in. They’re just a failed attempt by Boebert to distract people from her extreme views on women’s freedom to salvage her flailing campaign. Because last year, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert in what was the closest race in the country. And in 2024, Adam is going to finish the job.**
But if these are the ugly attacks that we’re up against 18 months before Election Day, Adam is going to need to raise __a lot__ of money to hold Boebert accountable and win.
**We got out-spent by millions and millions of dollars last year by Lauren Boebert and her Super PAC allies, and we just barely lost. But with your help now, I know that Adam _will_ defeat Boebert in 2024.**
[**Please, can my husband Adam Frisch count on you to chip in right now to his campaign – whatever you can afford – and help him overcome these nasty attacks and defeat Lauren Boebert? Adam’s not taking money from corporate PACs, so we have nowhere else to turn. No amount of money is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65388779/413304120/1610638071?refcode=em20230625pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=12da0ea1-8f13-ee11-a9bb-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmRhMGVhMS04ZjEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3LVX-gbitvEhe8bSwaRn0KM_9-VvT9Er1eEUo9-LHw=)

clean_body: On Friday, Adam and I had to call his 81-year-old father. Hello, On Friday, Adam and I had to call his 81-year-old father. Lauren Boebert had just attacked him because he is a retired OB-GYN who provided women with access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions... And because his son (and my husband), Adam Frisch, is currently running for Congress against her. After Boebert’s attacks, Fox News decided to publish my father-in-law’s full name and his personal information for anyone wanting to see it, referring to him as an “abortionist.” And my first question was: Do we need to worry about his safety? It’s hard to explain what it’s like to tell your father-in-law that a member of Congress is attacking him – and that he might need to take precautions because of Lauren Boebert and Fox News’ recklessness. My father-in-law’s response was, unfortunately, not surprising: “What else is new? We’ve been dealing with this for decades.” This is what people hate about politics. And this is why Adam decided to run against Lauren Boebert in the first place. These attacks aren’t going to make Adam or our family back down from standing up for what we believe in. They’re just a failed attempt by Boebert to distract people from her extreme views on women’s freedom to salvage her flailing campaign. Because last year, we came just 546 votes short of defeating Boebert in what was the closest race in the country. And in 2024, Adam is going to finish the job. But if these are the ugly attacks that we’re up against 18 months before Election Day, Adam is going to need to raise a lot of money to hold Boebert accountable and win. We got out-spent by millions and millions of dollars last year by Lauren Boebert and her Super PAC allies, and we just barely lost. But with your help now, I know that Adam will defeat Boebert in 2024. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = From our entire family: Thank you. I know it means the world to Adam that people like you have his back. Katy ** Paid for by Adam for Colorado. Adam for Colorado PO Box 1240 Glenwood Springs, CO 81602 United States Contributions or gifts to Adam for Colorado are not tax deductible.

| Wow, thank you. To everyone who gave during my fundraising push last week, I’m so appreciative.

But we’re not out of the woods yet, which is why I’m reaching out to you before the start of the week ahead.

Not only did we just face the one year anniversary of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, but on Friday at 11:59pm, we’re facing our public Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline.

**It’s the first public fundraising deadline since our two brand new opponents jumped into the race. Reproductive freedom and more are at risk if we don’t take back the House in 2024— _and districts like mine are essential to etching out a victory._

[Falling short is not an option when the stakes are as high as they are right now. clean_body: | Wow, thank you. To everyone who gave during my fundraising push last week, I’m so appreciative. But we’re not out of the woods yet, which is why I’m reaching out to you before the start of the week ahead. Not only did we just face the one year anniversary of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade, but on Friday at 11:59pm, we’re facing our public Federal Election Commission (FEC) filing deadline. It’s the first public fundraising deadline since our two brand new opponents jumped into the race. Reproductive freedom and more are at risk if we don’t take back the House in 2024— and districts like mine are essential to etching out a victory. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = We need to take action now to ensure anti-choice, extreme politicians are voted out of power. Many of my Republican colleagues are continuing their all-out, nationwide assault on reproductive rights, threatening benefits like Social Security, and holding partisan political hearings that waste taxpayer money. To combat this, I’m working hard to continue lowering costs for working families, pass a new Farm Bill, strengthen our economy, and safeguard our rights. We need to continue the fight against every extremist politician who wants to attack our individual freedoms. This starts with grassroots supporters like you. Will you chip in now to make sure I can keep my work up? = Thank you, Sharice * | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Celebrating one year of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Ten years ago, I could never have known this type of progress was possible
#

Friends -
I know my team already reached out to you this morning about the one year anniversary of the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , but I hope you’ll allow me to share my thoughts on what this special day means to me.
When I first founded GIFFORDS ten years ago, I didn’t know what to expect. At that time, it was considered taboo to even talk about gun violence. Many of our politicians were too afraid to speak on the issue, fearing it would be too divisive for their constituents.
Yet here we are a decade later, celebrating one year since the most significant federal gun safety legislation passed in nearly 30 years.
That change only happened because of people like you.
People who dared to dream of a future where gun violence no longer plagues our communities.
People who dared to demand action, calling on their elected officials to take a stand and **_do something_** about our country’s gun violence epidemic.
People who dared to stand up to the gun lobby with us, challenging their message of fear with a message of hope.
Today is a monumental day, and I hope you have taken a moment to be proud of the part you have played in the movement to end gun violence.
But the fight isn’t over yet. There’s so much more work we must do. So that’s why I’m asking you today:
[**In honor of one year since the passage of the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, will you make your first online contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today? Do it to help us keep moving towards a future where our communities are truly safe, once and for all.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230625-2-15&t=1&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jun23.jpif6I&amount=3&t=20&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dkim3-&refcode=em230625-2-15&t=21&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-jun23.PeWyti&refcode=em230625-2-15&t=22&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-jun23.IMSWLY&refcode=em230625-2-15&t=23&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-jun23.LOY28E&refcode=em230625-2-15&t=24&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-jun23.jpif6I&refcode=em230625-2-15&t=25&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy)**
---
****
From the bottom of my heart, thank you for supporting GIFFORDS. The _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ wouldn’t have been possible without committed supporters like you engaging in the movement to end gun violence.
With courage,
Gabby Giffords
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jun23.dfqeaL&refcode=em230625-2-15&refcode2=6028.3935704.mMvUcy&t=26&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy)
---

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=6028%2E3935704%2EmMvUcy) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Friend,
Joe Biden's presidency has been nothing short of disastrous. He has proven time and time again that he is ill-equipped to handle the challenges facing our nation.
Our economy is suffering, our borders are in chaos, and our values are being undermined. We cannot afford four more years of this ineptitude.
We need somebody who's gonna say:
"_Joe, you have done a lousy job for four years, and all you are today is four years older."_ _-Chris Christie_
But, we must acknowledge the reality that Joe Biden currently sits in the White House because he defeated Donald Trump in 2020. We cannot ignore the fact that Trump's leadership and divisive rhetoric led us to defeat.

“Joe Biden is an awful president. We all agree on that. He’s terrible, and he has made things worse. But why is Joe Biden sitting in the White House? He’s sitting in the White House because he beat Donald Trump in 2020, another in the string of losing that Donald Trump has led us to. He’s a three-time loser, and we don’t want to have a four-time loser.”
-Chris Christie
Remember, Chris Christie will not only hold Joe Biden accountable for his failures, but also offer a clear and compelling vision for a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | \- - - - - - | Friend, Joe Biden's presidency has been nothing short of disastrous. He has proven time and time again that he is ill-equipped to handle the challenges facing our nation. Our economy is suffering, our borders are in chaos, and our values are being undermined. We cannot afford four more years of this ineptitude. We need somebody who's gonna say: "Joe, you have done a lousy job for four years, and all you are today is four years older." -Chris Christie But, we must acknowledge the reality that Joe Biden currently sits in the White House because he defeated Donald Trump in 2020. We cannot ignore the fact that Trump's leadership and divisive rhetoric led us to defeat. “Joe Biden is an awful president. We all agree on that. He’s terrible, and he has made things worse. But why is Joe Biden sitting in the White House? He’s sitting in the White House because he beat Donald Trump in 2020, another in the string of losing that Donald Trump has led us to. He’s a three-time loser, and we don’t want to have a four-time loser.” -Chris Christie Remember, Chris Christie will not only hold Joe Biden accountable for his failures, but also offer a clear and compelling vision for a brighter future. Here's the catch: we cannot achieve this without your support, Friend. But I still need your help to meet this threshold and make our voices heard. That is why we are re-offering our exclusive 2023 Founding Membership to the first 500 donors in the next hour. | Together, we can set the stage for a brighter future. Thank you, Shannon P.S. name: House Democratic Caucus
subject: Happy Pride, Tennessee!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
Hi Peter,
The Tennessee House Democratic Caucus wishes every Tennessean a happy Pride! This Pride Month we honor the work of every individual who has fought for the advancement of justice and equality across our state and country.
This Pride Month we must also be mindful of the ongoing fight for our fellow Tennesseans who are being discriminated against and targeted by the GOP supermajority controlling our state legislature. We must continue to fight and work to ensure that Tennessee is an inclusive, accepting, and safe home for all who reside in or visit our beloved state.
Until we break the GOP supermajority in the Tennessee House, the ever-present threat of more cruel and unjust legislation targeting our LGBTQ+ community will continue to loom over Tennessee. It is up to us to support and elect strong, progressive candidates who will join in our fight for justice and equality.
We look forward to the battle ahead in 2024 with the House Republican candidates, but we need your support to be victorious. Invest in our fight to break the Republican supermajority and help us end the discriminatory attacks on our loved ones, friends and neighbors. Please consider donating to our House Caucus today to support our efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Thank you for standing with the Tennessee House Democrats as we work to achieve justice and ensure equal opportunity for EVERY Tennessean.
Have a safe and happy PRIDE!
With sincere appreciation,
Tennessee House Democrats
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tnhousedems2023]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Gloria Johnson Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

body:
Unquestionable authority? Not in America!
| | | [ ](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kUFvnDAQhX-NuYHM2Nhw4NDE2stKlSq1IreV45nsToINAlOU_vqK1SbX7z2N3qfxcR757bMX9kkA3BhXASDUDwFw1k8vP815OLvSdvNQOtPo_UjhWQDkz5m-q48rFUXP40GtK7CH0EIIBfW1aa2FBrQubj12LaJulfZBSw2t1jUE2dW67mr7il3BPUhQ0kADUqmmqdB3daMbskTkPdZCy51ThVPyI77nZYtzFaZYjP0t53m9TzoJOK0UtoWqndNCeDQO5v9S6SMtHHz5PnHK5duWcPG8crqWYYqRcyYScEphJLS6adUreZBgTC3UacvxEgl5i0K5h6854DptSyChXOCLf7Dg4-z5moRyX05fyZQypSyU67Q2AswljYxCuT8D7c__1O_8cYf3jyj3IQeX8eX8q1h6nHceR16NFVpejwWH2_8AAAD__4A5jQk)
---
Friend,
Crooked Joe’s corrupt Attorney General, Merrick Garland – who controls the FBI and the Department of Justice – went on national TV to CONDEMN _anyone _who dares to _question_ his department.
No matter how much these communists want to believe that we are now living in the Soviet Union, this is _still_ the United States of America.
**_We have every right in the world to question the power of unelected bureaucrats who are trying to JAIL the leading opponent of the current regime._**
**_And that’s a right that we as Americans can NEVER, EVER concede!_**
Not only are these tyrants weaponizing our legal system to try and imprison its opposition, but they’re also trying to intimidate anyone who speaks out against their corruption.
**But I will _NEVER_ be intimidated – and they know that better than anyone else.**
In fact, that’s the real reason they’re so desperate to END our presidential campaign and put me behind bars for the rest of my life.
A lot of other Republicans out there would drop to their knees and appease the Deep State... _But not me_.
The Left knows that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country and I will NEVER give in to their intimidation tactics – no matter how bad they get.

clean_body: Unquestionable authority? Not in America! | | | Friend, Crooked Joe’s corrupt Attorney General, Merrick Garland – who controls the FBI and the Department of Justice – went on national TV to CONDEMN anyone who dares to question his department. No matter how much these communists want to believe that we are now living in the Soviet Union, this is still the United States of America. We have every right in the world to question the power of unelected bureaucrats who are trying to JAIL the leading opponent of the current regime. And that’s a right that we as Americans can NEVER, EVER concede! Not only are these tyrants weaponizing our legal system to try and imprison its opposition, but they’re also trying to intimidate anyone who speaks out against their corruption. But I will NEVER be intimidated – and they know that better than anyone else. In fact, that’s the real reason they’re so desperate to END our presidential campaign and put me behind bars for the rest of my life. A lot of other Republicans out there would drop to their knees and appease the Deep State... But not me. The Left knows that I will NEVER SURRENDER our country and I will NEVER give in to their intimidation tactics – no matter how bad they get. But I also know that I can count on patriots like YOU to NEVER SURRENDER America to tyranny. In response to the Department of Justice claiming that it has unquestionable authority over its citizens, I’m asking you to peacefully show that We The People will NEVER SURRENDER our freedom or our rights to the Deep State. | | Thank you, | Donald J. name: Friends of the Earth
subject: SIGN THE PETITION: Stop trophy hunters from slaughtering bear cubs
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842819?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Bear hunting has already started in several states, which means tens of thousands of bears and cubs will likely be killed.** An estimated 40,000 to 50,000 bears are legally hunted in the U.S. each year -- in addition to the unknown number of bears that are poached illegally. Trophy hunters are permitted to shoot at mama bears and their baby cubs while they are SOUND ASLEEP in their dens, hibernating and trying to stay warm. **And it’s all LEGAL.** We must protect innocent bears and their cubs by demanding that this cruel and inhumane practice be banned. [**_ADD YOUR NAME by midnight tonight to stop trophy hunters from slaughtering bear families in their dens._**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842820?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842821?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
For several years, there was a law that prohibited killing bear cubs and wolf pups in their dens. **The Trump administration not only overturned the ban but actually incentivized hunters with prizes for their kills.**
We must urge the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service to restore this bill immediately. _It could save thousands of bears_. **Your support is essential to gaining enough momentum.**
If we can get 6,043 more signatures by tomorrow’s deadline we have a shot at convincing the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service to act. **Can bear cubs count on your signature today to help keep them safe?** **_[Please sign the petition now to demand the protection of baby bears.](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842822?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)_**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1842821?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you,
Friends of the Earth**
|

[**June 25, 1835:** William A. Richardson, the founder of Yerba Buena (later San Francisco), established its initial residence—a tent dwelling. ---
[**June 25, 1868:** Congress enacted a law on June 25, 1868, mandating an eight-hour workday for laborers and mechanics working under the Federal Government. Although President Andrew Johnson initially vetoed the law, it was overridden by Congress. While Johnson couldn't explicitly endorse an eight-hour day, he expressed his support for the concept of working the fewest possible hours that benefit everyone.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=495bf4ad5c054a39a1b9e4d191acf087&_e=wFLDMcwYWZLRlZESMbUESFnA17_Y98BdXTNxBnd_NxZpX8tDRDh7MZ6IlkKBvy_eJZpz22E6XYQnIGaY_hifdYJ_dAcQEX3ZCuQLWLrVUT4WM5tiWxziUeUcSGzzG6tKA56wM-pVtsl_hNUt2cTrqGRMkidSe7xECt1v20joi5ePqje8HgrG52f5DIUv_PVQznvV2g5me2Mdq3HW2YUQb1MsIX50P7IvFozIZ8CRmuQ-UUibleu0Zx5kcJ-A4YRq40dilOGh0VFv7d2lr4rbCvwoaWixsSkwzqS26K-drsJdop3F3ZVQQ-x-oNmXHdm4) **Source -[wikipedia.org](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=495bf4ad5c054a39a1b9e4d191acf087&_e=wFLDMcwYWZLRlZESMbUESFnA17_Y98BdXTNxBnd_NxZpX8tDRDh7MZ6IlkKBvy_eJZpz22E6XYQnIGaY_hifdYJ_dAcQEX3ZCuQLWLrVUT4WM5tiWxziUeUcSGzzG6tKA56wM-pVtsl_hNUt2cTrqGRMkidSe7xECt1v20joi5f4MH0fxx5A5m4s3qLP1R6YhGAvax72KDCjaQ2ounPV90Fyv1JlIa3ouGOyhB5K2Z6bxhzQDGb2Y7_t5emt1bKMJgVFzrwCfAQCCBmLbMPCe5pxndcNOnSl4eULSl5-uPsP3hPeH0Gxw5JCyVcghNja)**

[**June 25, 1951:** The first-ever commercial network television broadcast in color took place in the United States through the CBS field-sequential color television system. This historic event featured a musical variety special called "Premiere" and was aired on a network of five CBS affiliates on the East Coast.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=495bf4ad5c054a39a1b9e4d191acf087&_e=wFLDMcwYWZLRlZESMbUESFnA17_Y98BdXTNxBnd_NxaxaopQX6j5tDyCyDV4wcToIYXgEYg_D0V0BeSg9GejbevmdDTYIGArjB56P5r45tdXP-bzIsGFFEVDv0QZLSt6k9hSlgQs27ToWY-8kmh9IRCAWK5BvBw6fnBuuW0COpG34-s1rmyCE6iYiXuWICAYO9kuDjUrSHkvUtvJ4Xj1N1A4jGQDIueGSmzKvwW6QRSD2Ghs6wbkeV7MPH4TXw1yaPlrtHrCVSRwQrbuxjd4za0dBK4WhCU2N-Uw-coL_Uc%3D) **Source -[historyofinformation.com](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=495bf4ad5c054a39a1b9e4d191acf087&_e=wFLDMcwYWZLRlZESMbUESFnA17_Y98BdXTNxBnd_NxaxaopQX6j5tDyCyDV4wcToIYXgEYg_D0V0BeSg9GejbevmdDTYIGArjB56P5r45tdXP-bzIsGFFEVDv0QZLSt6k9hSlgQs27ToWY-8kmh9IfMU99Cfs82r-YkgeWl0-v9uSkAXcCak6s4arHzOCFUww6hRYKRe6xPQbN8dUwEt9EaeCDZ-BK7MRF_xnvGMfQpBzJFdIwmmsvtGDFEUQVQDTJQJ_UjrEzIiCag0CDUHIpwy_nU12LYBjmET1nhC_os%3D)**

name: Colin Allred for Texas via Blue Amp Action
subject: 🚨 This is big: Cook Political Ratings Change >>>
body:
Texas Senate race looking up!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81640612-897c-4035-92d9-59e54bb5b1f3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | MAJOR NEWS: Cook Political Report INCREASED Democrats' chances of winning in TX after Allred entered race against Cruz This is incredible, Peter: Just hours after Colin entered the race against Ted Cruz, Cook Political Report UPGRADED our chances of flipping this seat! This is a clear sign that we can win. Experts are noticing – but so are Ted Cruz and his billionaire, special-interest supporters. Ted is even already spreading lies about Colin Allred! [That's why we have to ask: Will you split a donation of $10 or more now between Colin and Blue Amp Action to help Colin fight Cruz's attacks and continue this incredible momentum with a great end-of-quarter donation report? →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6b0f249f-c896-45dc-a93c-77726659b338/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We know Ted Cruz is in the pocket of wealthy donors and corporate lobbyists that will be lining up to support him. Colin, on the other hand, isn't taking a dime of corporate money – instead he's building a grassroots movement from the ground up, and we're counting on you to be a part of it. [We're starting this campaign with momentum the state of Texas has never seen before, but we cannot let our foot off the gas. So please, make a split donation between Colin and Blue Amp Action of $5, $10 or whatever you can so we have the resources to send Cruz packing once and for all. Every dollar helps in our fight to flip Texas blue! →](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf6c786f2-ef48-4219-97af-52ea41cdd5cc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Defeating Ted Cruz is going to take all of us. Thanks for giving what you can. Team Allred
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc92813e6-6a2d-467c-aa09-ce42049784dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Moderate PAC & $20,000,000 against us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

First: Our own fundraising has been steadily declining over the last year
and it’s unsustainable for our organization — if things don’t turn around
we’re going to have to look at where to cut our budget.

Then: Axios reported that ‘The Moderate PAC’ is planning on raising $20
million to stop our movement and protect corporate-backed, entrenched
incumbents.

Now: We urgently need your support to fight back against this PAC that
received $1,000,000 from a GOP-mega donor and billionaire.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135267?refcode=em20230625-29597&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=29597%2E1203867%2E7Rgpk7 ]Will you rush a contribution of $3 right now ahead of our
end-of-month fundraising deadline? As a grassroots-funded organization,
every single donation truly makes a difference to us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135267?refcode=em20230625-29597&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=29597%2E1203867%2E7Rgpk7 ]Contribute $3

The political establishment is coming after us because they’re terrified
of our people-powered movement that is actually shifting political power
in our country to the 99%.

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Summer Lee, or
Cori Bush in Congress.

We recruited each of these leaders to run and win and we’re building the
infrastructure for even more grassroots candidates to do the same, but the
Moderate PAC is planning to raise and spend $20 million against us and our
candidates.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/135267?refcode=em20230625-29597&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=29597%2E1203867%2E7Rgpk7 ]Please make your best gift now to help us counter this obscene amount
of money against us.

Thank you,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=29597%2E1203867%2E7Rgpk7 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=29597%2E1203867%2E7Rgpk7 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230625-29597-footer&t=1024&refcode2=29597_1203867_7Rgpk7&akid=29597%2E1203867%2E7Rgpk7

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=29597%2E1203867%2E7Rgpk7

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: HUGE News (protectvoting.org)
subject: Do you support a 28th Amendment to end gun violence??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
RESPONSE NEEDED 🚨🚨
| | **🚨 DON’T SCROLL AWAY 🚨
DROP EVERYTHING AND LOOK AT THIS!** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/28th-amendment/?source=VPP_20230625_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=6&akid=8690%2E878179%2Ewx0m1p) Democrat Gavin Newsom’s Constitutional Amendment would:

✅ Impose a higher minimum age to buy a gun! ✅
✅ Implement universal background checks! ✅

Team, from beating back the predicted “red wave” last November to electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin in Wisconsin this April, voters have repeatedly shown up in force to voice their support for abortion rights.

**Republicans know that the people are fed up with their extreme, anti-choice agenda. And now, they’re _panicking_.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65401833/413316960/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230625_FR_6EE_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0ODMyODU0LTlkMTMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TU0GCzpytPiyBnp74l-nID1pCrZiy39Gu_o11Kf7YGc=)

It’s not just Arizona, team – across the country, Republicans in states like Arkansas, Florida, and Ohio are all scrambling to make it harder for voters to approve citizen-led ballot initiatives protecting abortion rights.

**And here’s the kicker, team: In many of these states, Republicans only hold supermajority power thanks to gerrymandering!**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/65401834/413316961/-644827789?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230625_FR_6EE_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0ODMyODU0LTlkMTMtZWUxMS1hOWJiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TU0GCzpytPiyBnp74l-nID1pCrZiy39Gu_o11Kf7YGc=)

clean_body: | | Team – MAGA Republicans are afraid that they can’t win elections fair and square, so they use tactics like gerrymandering and voter suppression to gain unearned power. = | = Team, from beating back the predicted “red wave” last November to electing Judge Janet Protasiewicz by a double-digit margin in Wisconsin this April, voters have repeatedly shown up in force to voice their support for abortion rights. Republicans know that the people are fed up with their extreme, anti-choice agenda. And now, they’re panicking. = It’s not just Arizona, team – across the country, Republicans in states like Arkansas, Florida, and Ohio are all scrambling to make it harder for voters to approve citizen-led ballot initiatives protecting abortion rights. And here’s the kicker, team: In many of these states, Republicans only hold supermajority power thanks to gerrymandering! = Here at the NDRC, we refuse to let the GOP get away with silencing voters’ voices. That’s why we’re working across the country to protect our fair maps victories, prevent GOP gerrymandering and voter suppression, and propel fair redistricting. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = The deadline is less than a week away, team, so anything you can give will go a long way to help us reach our goal. – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. name: Joe Biden
subject: MAGA Republicans won’t stop until they accomplish their ultimate goal...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
It’s going to take the full support of this grassroots team to keep pushing our agenda forward. | | |
---
Peter, Fifty years ago, _Roe v. Wade_ was decided -- reaffirming basic principles of equality and reinforcing a fundamental right of privacy, the right of each of us to choose how to live our lives. **But one year ago yesterday, the Supreme Court took away this constitutional right. It was a realization of an extreme ideology -- one with real and immediate consequences.** In the aftermath of the Dobbs decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ , Kamala and I got to work to protect emergency medical care, safeguard access to medication abortion, ensure people are not penalized for crossing state lines to receive care, and more. And if Congress sends a bill codifying _Roe v. Wade_ to my desk, I have promised to sign it. **But right now, across the country, Republicans are pushing their radical agenda, enacting extreme policies to threaten access to basic health care.** Peter, MAGA Republicans won’t stop their campaign against reproductive freedom until they accomplish their ultimate goal: _Banning abortion nationwide_. With so much on the line, we must keep fighting back against their extreme agenda. **[So I’m asking: Will you make a $25 donation to our reelection campaign now? | | Our first End-of-Quarter filing deadline of the campaign is this Friday at midnight, Peter, and it’s a doozy. This is without a doubt the biggest hurdle we’ve faced so far, and the date our opponents have had circled on their calendars since we first launched this campaign for Senate. **Here’s why:** _Once we’ve filed, everyone – pundits, opponents, supporters – will be looking at our campaign through a microscope looking for strengths and weaknesses._ **We’ve got a goal of bringing on 2,000 donors before Friday night.[Can I count on you to chip in $25 so that our first FEC filing shows the strength of this grassroots team?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2821?t=11&amount=25&akid=181%2E52803%2Eu5BtFe)** | | | [Chip in $25](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2821?t=12&amount=25&akid=181%2E52803%2Eu5BtFe)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2821?t=13&amount=30&akid=181%2E52803%2Eu5BtFe)
---
After we file, our numbers will be available for anyone and everyone to see how much money we raised, how many donors have contributed, our cash on hand – _the works._
**While some in our position might be nervous,_I’m actually excited._**
When everyone sees the strength fueling our campaign, I’m confident that even more people will join us. We’ll bring in more endorsements, recruit more volunteers, and send a message that this campaign has what it takes to win.
**[But first, we need to hit our 2,000 donor End-of-Quarter goal, which is why I’m asking: Will you please chip in $25 ASAP to help put us over the top?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2821?t=14&amount=25&akid=181%2E52803%2Eu5BtFe)**

This is without a doubt the biggest hurdle we’ve faced so far, and the date our opponents have had circled on their calendars since we first launched this campaign for Senate. Here’s why: Once we’ve filed, everyone – pundits, opponents, supporters – will be looking at our campaign through a microscope looking for strengths and weaknesses. We’ve got a goal of bringing on 2,000 donors before Friday night. | | | | | After we file, our numbers will be available for anyone and everyone to see how much money we raised, how many donors have contributed, our cash on hand – the works. While some in our position might be nervous,I’m actually excited. When everyone sees the strength fueling our campaign, I’m confident that even more people will join us. We’ll bring in more endorsements, recruit more volunteers, and send a message that this campaign has what it takes to win. If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you! Angela Alsobrooks | | | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, | | | | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please click . | Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate Alsobrooks for Senate PO Box 6058 Largo, MD 20792

name: Emma Dillon, Team Lucas
subject: Four questions for you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter,
**If you knew chipping in $3 right now could help us defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat in 2024... would you do it?**
What if you knew that donating $3 today meant we’d have one more vote in the Senate to end the filibuster, protect abortion access + voting rights, and finally make real investments into the American people?
Or what if I told you GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee are already targeting Lucas Kunce, the 13-year Marine veteran on a mission to give power back to everyday people, with attacks — and that your $3 donation would help him stand up and fight back in the moments it matters most?
Lucas is building this movement without a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors, so early investments (of even just $3) are the best way we can prepare our campaign for the fight ahead.
Tens of thousands of grassroots supporters have already done their part — and now we need your help today.
**So what do you say, Peter?[Will you add your very first donation of $3 (or more) toward our goal of raising 30,000 individual donations by midnight on June 30?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/34560?refcode=em20230625-3313&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3313%2E614464%2EJc4tMo)**

Emma Dillon

body:

Fellow American,

Less than one week from today is a major campaign deadline. It marks halfway through the year AND our second filing deadline since launching the campaign.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

I wanted to take a moment to tell you a bit about why I’m in this fight. I’m not the kind of guy you’d expect to see in Congress. I still get $12 flattop haircuts. And at home on the farm, I butcher my own meat. I didn’t come to Washington to play into partisan hogwash — I came because I didn’t see anyone in our government sticking up for rural communities like mine. I’m running to continue to deliver for Montanans, from holding our government accountable to standing up for veterans and protecting the Montana way of life. **But with Mitch McConnell and his dark money backers hellbent on taking back the Senate majority and targeting my seat to make their pipe dream a reality, I’ll need all the help I can get from my grassroots team.** **[Will you split a donation of any amount today between my campaign and Tammy Baldwin's to help protect our Democratic majority and keep me fighting in the Senate for hardworking Montanans and their families?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-tester.Z0aSwr&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=435%2E35263%2EqyqTKF)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation split between Jon Tester and Tammy Baldwin will go through immediately:_ | | [SPLIT $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-tester.5zk3A_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=435%2E35263%2EqyqTKF)

clean_body: I have a plan to protect vulnerable House seats and ensure our victory. | = Peter, I need you to understand three critical things: Extreme MAGA Republicans raised $38 million to protect their razor-thin majority. They are using that war chest to fund attack ads targeting 35 vulnerable Democrats. The latest polls show House Republicans just surged to a narrow one-point lead. I have a plan to protect these seats and ensure our victory. = Peter, this is an all-hands-on-deck moment. We can either sit around as extreme MAGA Republicans use their massive war chest to blanket the airwaves with attacks against Democrats – or we can meet this moment with the urgency it requires and counter every single GOP attack in the races that will define our majority. We can’t afford to sit on the sidelines while extreme MAGA Republicans destroy all the progress we’ve made. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Keep the faith, Hakeem Rep. name: Alex Padilla
subject: Sherrod Brown
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
#

Hi there, it’s Alex.
I’m writing to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and Senator Sherrod Brown of Ohio so we can maintain our Democratic majority and keep making progress for California, for Ohio, and for our country.
I’ll explain more in a moment, but if that’s all you need to know, here’s the link to make a contribution:
[**https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/Sherrod-Brown**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23-brown.UMd5Xi&refcode=em230625-1-30&t=1&akid=1370%2E159979%2EbWOtlW)
Here’s the situation:
1. **Top elections experts like _FiveThirtyEight_ and _Cook Political Report_ have named Sherrod one of the most vulnerable Democrats in the country.** And since Mitch McConnell and the GOP only need to flip _two_ seats to take control of the Senate, they’re going to be attacking Sherrod with everything they’ve got.
2. **Last year’s Senate race in Ohio was one of the most expensive in the country.** The GOP and their billionaire mega-donors spent millions in Ohio last cycle, and _NBC News_ is saying this race could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
3. **Sherrod fights for workers, not big corporations or the ultra-wealthy.** That means that they’re going to throw everything they’ve got at him to replace him with a GOP lackey who will put corporate profits before the people of Ohio, California, and America.

**So I am asking for you to join me in supporting Sherrod’s campaign and make sure he has what it takes to win.**
[**Can you split a contribution between our campaigns today? Do it before the FEC deadline in just a few days so we can each report strong fundraising numbers and show everyone watching that we’re ready for anything that comes our way.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/553?c0=ap-em-june23-brown.UMd5Xi&refcode=em230625-1-30&t=2&akid=1370%2E159979%2EbWOtlW)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2338?c0=ap-em-june23-brown.oc-Cnm&refcode=em230625-1-30&t=21&akid=1370%2E159979%2EbWOtlW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2339?c0=ap-em-june23-brown.PzDE_p&refcode=em230625-1-30&t=22&akid=1370%2E159979%2EbWOtlW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2332?c0=ap-em-june23-brown.lEmZbt&refcode=em230625-1-30&t=23&akid=1370%2E159979%2EbWOtlW)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2333?c0=ap-em-june23-brown.jf17o2&refcode=em230625-1-30&t=24&akid=1370%2E159979%2EbWOtlW)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.alex-padilla.com/go/2334?c0=ap-em-june23-brown._U14uq&refcode=em230625-1-30&t=25&akid=1370%2E159979%2EbWOtlW)**
---

****
Thank you. Your support means the world to Sherrod, and to me personally.
Alex Padilla

I’m not usually one to brag, but I’ll talk all day about just how lucky I am to count Kirsten Gillibrand as one of my closest friends in the Senate.
**_Kirsten is 100% the real deal._**
She’s fighting for progress on the issues that matter to families. She’s running an authentically grassroots campaign. She refuses to accept money from corporate PACs. But Kirsten is up against some powerful forces this year. New York Republicans are riding a red wave from 2022 — and they’ve got their sights set on Kirsten’s seat. I’m going to do everything I can to make sure that Kirsten wins another term in the Senate so she can keep fighting for families like yours. That’s why I’m personally asking: [**Please, will you donate $5 or more before midnight tonight to help my friend compete with GOP megadonors and defend our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65416223/413324633/-2054302023?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4242-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGEzMjVkNi1hYzEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zvMvhkJ19lT1TMjJvWq82IYwiF1PloVHK58GlSV8jAg=)

I was hoping to share a bit more about why I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate before **[asking for your support ahead of our end-of-quarter FEC deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/65416379/413325278/-358405457?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20230625_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWI1MjJhMy1hZTEzLWVlMTEtYTliYi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VvCuofGWDXUZYk-OM_hiBnvh4e_DqQiMzsQAQxrTI2A=)** I grew up in a working-class family. My dad was a union lineman with the local utility company. My mom was a seamstress and an automobile tire factory worker. I worked my way through college to earn a mechanical engineering degree and worked everywhere from the Air Force Research Laboratory at Kirtland Air Force Base to AmeriCorps to the Albuquerque City Council, before running for Congress and eventually the U.S. Senate. My priorities have always been rooted in making progress for New Mexico and our country. name: Team Casey
subject: Early investments
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=184%2E552475%2EocB6Hw)
Peter,
We’ll say it again: Bob Casey’s re-election is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country in 2024.
**CNN even put us on their “The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024” list.**
But we’ll let you in on a big truth about this race: **early investments will make ALL the difference.** If we start building our campaign’s resources now, we can get ahead of Republican attack ads and organize PA voters from Erie County to Bucks County.
**[The road ahead will be tough, so we’re humbly asking for an early investment in Bob Casey’s campaign: Will you donate now to defend this seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230625-2?refcode=em20230625-2&refcode2=184_552475_ocB6Hw&akid=184%2E552475%2EocB6Hw)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230625-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230625-2&refcode2=184_552475_ocB6Hw&akid=184%2E552475%2EocB6Hw)**
Bob is not in this fight to win the favor of ultra-wealthy or powerful special interests. Instead, we’re reaching out to hardworking Americans — just like you — to chip in what they can, when they can.
It won’t happen overnight, but we’re ensuring our future success in PA by building a strong, well-resourced campaign, day by day. That way, Bob can keep fighting for our families in the U.S. Senate as part of a Democratic majority.
**[Please donate now to defend this must-hold seat in PA and keep Bob in the Senate. Your gift will go incredibly far if you chip in today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230625-2?refcode=em20230625-2&refcode2=184_552475_ocB6Hw&akid=184%2E552475%2EocB6Hw)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230625-2?amount=5&refcode=em20230625-2&refcode2=184_552475_ocB6Hw&akid=184%2E552475%2EocB6Hw)**
Thank you,
Team Casey

clean_body: Peter, We’ll say it again: Bob Casey’s re-election is going to be one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country in 2024. CNN even put us on their “The 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2024” list. But we’ll let you in on a big truth about this race: early investments will make ALL the difference. If we start building our campaign’s resources now, we can get ahead of Republican attack ads and organize PA voters from Erie County to Bucks County. Bob is not in this fight to win the favor of ultra-wealthy or powerful special interests. Instead, we’re reaching out to hardworking Americans — just like you — to chip in what they can, when they can. It won’t happen overnight, but we’re ensuring our future success in PA by building a strong, well-resourced campaign, day by day. That way, Bob can keep fighting for our families in the U.S. Senate as part of a Democratic majority. Thank you, Team Casey
